The time change did more than just give us an extra hour of sleep. It threw off our circadian rhythm – our 24-hour internal clock regulating our sleep, energy, appetite, and mood.

Mito

LET'S DIVE DEEPER
slides.style: Clean, modern, minimalist, typographic
slides.prompt: A minimalist, informative social media slide with clean, light gray sans-serif text overlaid on a softly blurred background featuring subtle gradients of dark olive, taupe, and grayish-green. The main text block is centered, with a small header 'POST-DAYLIGHT SAVINGS' at the top, and 'Mito' on the bottom left, and 'LET'S DIVE DEEPER' on the bottom right.

slides.composition: The slide is divided into two main horizontal sections, each illustrating a clock change. Each section features three moon icons arranged horizontally, followed by a small label, a bold title, and a descriptive paragraph. The overall layout is clean, minimalist, and centrally aligned, against a subtle gradient background.
slides.subject: Impact of clock changes (Daylight Savings Time and Permanent Standard Time) on human circadian rhythm.
slides.textOverlay:
PERMANENT STANDARD TIME
AUTUMNAL CLOCK CHANGE
The clock falling back is actually easier on our bodies as we're exposed to more morning light to stay in sync
DAYLIGHT SAVINGS TIME
SPRING CLOCK CHANGE
The clock moving forward disrupts our rhythm from losing sleep and morning light
slides.style: Minimalist, infographic, clean, modern typography.
slides.prompt: Minimalist infographic slide with a subtle gradient background from olive-brown to warmer olive. Two horizontal sections, each with three white moon shapes (crescent and gibbous phases). Below each set of moons, there's a small uppercase label, a larger bold uppercase title, and a short paragraph explaining the effects of autumn and spring clock changes on circadian rhythm. Clean, sans-serif typography.

slides.composition: The slide features a clean, two-column layout in the upper section for text, and a prominent line graph in the lower section. The top has a large, left-aligned header, followed by a paragraph of explanatory body text. The bottom half is dominated by a clear, minimalist line graph illustrating sunlight exposure over time, with specific time markers and a shaded area.
slides.subject: The benefits of permanent standard time for circadian health and light exposure compared to daylight saving time.
slides.textOverlay:
The autumnal clock change is
gentler on our bodies than
the spring shift.

Our circadian health thrives on morning light and evening
darkness. Permanent standard time aligns best with our
biology through bright light in the morning and darkness
at night, keeping our internal 24-hour rhythm
synchronized to support deeper sleep, steadier energy,
and long-term health.

HOURS OF SUNLIGHT PER DAY
6:11AM 6:11AM
Daylight Permanent
Savings Time Standard Time
MORE MORNING LIGHT
EXPOSURE UPON WAKING
TIME OF DAY
slides.style: Minimalist, modern, clean, editorial, data visualization.
slides.prompt: A minimalist and modern educational Instagram slide. It features a large, left-aligned sans-serif header text, followed by a body text explaining circadian rhythm and the benefits of permanent standard time. The lower section includes a simple line graph titled 'HOURS OF SUNLIGHT PER DAY' vs. 'TIME OF DAY', illustrating a shaded area for 'MORE MORNING LIGHT EXPOSURE UPON WAKING' between 'Daylight Savings Time' and 'Permanent Standard Time' at 6:11 AM. The color palette includes an off-white background, dark grey text, and a light pastel purple for the graph's shaded region.

slides.composition: Two distinct data points, vertically stacked, with a title at the top. Clean, minimal, and typography-focused.
slides.subject: Health benefits of permanent standard time related to obesity and stroke.
slides.textOverlay:
Research from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention show that Permanent Standard Time would lead to:

0.78%
decline in nationwide prevalence
of obesity cases
(Amounts to 2.6 million fewer people with obesity)

0.09%
decline in nationwide prevalence
of stroke cases
(Amounts to 300,000 fewer cases of stroke)
slides.style: Minimalist, professional, data-driven, clean typography.
slides.prompt: A minimalist, clean infographic slide on an off-white background. The title text in black states 'Research from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention show that Permanent Standard Time would lead to:'. Below, two data blocks. Each block features a large, bold percentage (0.78%, 0.09%) in dark purple, preceded by a small purple lightning bolt/down arrow icon. Underneath, explanatory text in black, with key terms ('obesity cases', 'stroke cases') highlighted in dark purple. Followed by smaller parenthetical text in black/grey explaining the total number of cases. Modern sans-serif font.

slides.composition: Text-heavy slide with a clear informational hierarchy. It features a main statement at the top, followed by a sub-heading, a bulleted list of risks with small, abstract symbolic icons, and a concluding explanatory paragraph at the bottom. The text is left-aligned on a dark background.
slides.subject: The serious health concerns and risks associated with turning the clock forward for Daylight Savings Time, specifically heart attacks, stroke, and road traffic accidents, due to disrupted circadian rhythms.
slides.textOverlay:
Turning the clock forward in the spring to Daylight Savings Time has far more serious health concerns.
INCREASES RISK OF :
Heart attacks
Stroke
Road traffic accidents
Fatal crashes increased by 6%

Shifting the clock forward by 1-hour wreaks havoc on our circadian rhythms which have a direct link to blood pressure, heart rate and cortisol levels
slides.style: Clean, minimalist, modern infographic, data-driven
slides.prompt: A minimalist, dark-themed infographic slide for social media, presenting serious health concerns of Daylight Savings Time. Feature white text with a prominent title, followed by 'INCREASES RISK OF :' and a list of 'Heart attacks', 'Stroke', and 'Road traffic accidents' (with a 6% increase for fatal crashes). Each risk should have a small, abstract, symbolic icon. Conclude with a paragraph about disrupted circadian rhythms affecting blood pressure, heart rate, and cortisol levels. Clean layout, high readability.

slides.composition: Minimalist, text-centric, with two paragraphs of white sans-serif text on a dark grey background. The text is left-aligned and centered vertically on the left side of the frame.
slides.subject: The impact of clock changes on the human body's circadian rhythm, sleep, and overall health, highlighting the benefits of standard time.
slides.textOverlay:
It's inevitable that each clock change disrupts the rhythm our bodies work hard to maintain.

But at least this shift, back to standard time, moves us closer to how our bodies were designed to function: with morning light, deeper sleep, and better health.
slides.mood: Informative, reassuring, health-conscious, and slightly scientific.
slides.style: Minimalist, clean, editorial, educational, text-focused.
slides.prompt: A minimalist dark grey background. Display two distinct paragraphs of clean, white sans-serif text, left-aligned and positioned in the central-left area of the frame. The overall composition should be stark and editorial, with no additional graphical elements, focusing entirely on the clear presentation of the text content.

posts.caption:
I thought I was healthy.

That’s how most of our members start their journey with us. But when their results came back, they discovered hidden deficiencies, early risk factors, and patterns no routine checkup had ever shown.

This is a reminder that healthy can look fine on the outside but completely different on the inside.
posts.hookLine: I thought I was healthy.

primary.composition: Minimalist design with prominent dark serif text, aligned to the left, against a soft, blurred gradient background. The brand name 'Mito' is at the top, followed by a large statement, and a smaller descriptive line at the bottom.
primary.subject: Introduction of the brand 'Mito' and an assertion of extensive testing across the U.S., setting up a reveal of testimonials.
primary.textOverlay:
Mito
We've tested
thousands
across the U.S.
Here's what they have to say
primary.hookSignal: A headline serifada enorme “We’ve tested thousands across the U.S.” em charcoal verde-azulado, ocupando o centro-esquerda, contrasta fortemente com o fundo nebuloso sage/menta e espaço negativo amplo à direita. O olho é puxado pelo peso tipográfico e pela serenidade do gradiente soft-focus.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial minimalista soft-focus, ângulo frontal reto, mostrando um fundo orgânico desfocado tipo bokeh (parece folhas através de vidro fosco) com tipografia hero no lado esquerdo. Sujeito principal: slide de carousel da marca Mito com wordmark discreto e headline serifada dominante anunciando escala de testes; narrativa clínica-premium e confiante. Iluminação: luz difusa de daylight atravessando superfície translúcida, 5200K, intensidade baixa-média, contraste macio, sombras amplas e sem bordas, leve vinheta radial. Paleta: gradiente nebuloso sage/menta/azul-acinzentado — olive mist #C8D2A3 → celadon #B9D4C9 → pale mint #E6F1EB → blue-gray #C7D7D6, com áreas off-white #EFF5F1; tipografia em charcoal verde-azulado #1E2B2B; grading com blacks levemente levantados, subexposição -0.2EV e highlight roll-off suave. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm ~4%, blur cinematográfico orgânico, zero banding, leve vignette -10%. Composição: rule-of-thirds; margem segura 7% em todas as bordas; wordmark no terço superior esquerdo; headline ocupando centro-esquerda em 3 linhas; subheadline no bottom-left, alinhado à headline; grande campo negativo à direita para respiro. Camera position context: câmera em tripé a 1,5 m da superfície, lente 50mm f/2.0, ISO 200, shutter 1/125, foco no infinito para manter o fundo soft. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) Conteúdo: Mito; posição: top-left; fonte: Inter Medium; peso: Medium; cor: #1E2B2B; tracking: 0; line-height: 100%; tamanho: sm. 2) Conteúdo: We’ve tested thousands across the U.S.; posição: left-center (mid-left); fonte: Canela Regular; peso: Regular; cor: #1F2F2F; tracking: -1%; line-height: 110%; tamanho: xl. 3) Conteúdo: Here’s what they have to say; posição: bottom-left; fonte: Inter Regular; peso: Regular; cor: #3B4F4C; tracking: 0; line-height: 120%; tamanho: md. Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone, nenhum pictograma; apenas safe area 7% e vinheta radial suave. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, calmo, confiável. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product branding; Equinox editorial light. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo gráfico (apenas wordmark), não usar cores vibrantes saturadas, não centralizar a headline, não aplicar glassmorphism pesado, não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, nítido nas letras, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram slide, minimalist editorial soft-focus photo, straight-on angle. Abstract organic bokeh background (leaf-like through frosted glass) with left-aligned hero typography for Mito. Lighting: diffuse daylight 5200K, low–medium intensity, soft contrast, broad shadows, subtle radial vignette. Palette: olive mist #C8D2A3 → celadon #B9D4C9 → pale mint #E6F1EB → blue-gray #C7D7D6 with off-white #EFF5F1; type in charcoal green-blue #1E2B2B; lifted blacks, -0.2EV, gentle highlight roll-off. Texture: 35mm film grain 4%, organic cinematic blur, no banding. Composition: rule-of-thirds, 7% safe margins; wordmark top-left; headline centered-left in 3 lines; subheadline bottom-left; generous negative space on right. Camera: 50mm f/2.0, ISO 200, 1/125, focus to infinity for soft background. Overlays: 1) “Mito” top-left, Inter Medium, #1E2B2B, size sm. 2) “We’ve tested thousands across the U.S.” mid-left, Canela Regular, #1F2F2F, size xl, tracking -1%, LH 110%. 3) “Here’s what they have to say” bottom-left, Inter Regular, #3B4F4C, size md. No icons. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, calm. References: Apple keynote slide, Aesop minimal. Avoid saturated colors, centered headline, heavy glassmorphism, ornamental fonts, graphic logo. Keep photographic realism, subtle film grain, high-res, crisp type.
primary.artDirection: Fundo abstrato com gradiente suave olive mist #C8D2A3 → celadon #B9D4C9 → pale mint #E6F1EB → blue-gray #C7D7D6 e áreas off-white #EFF5F1. Tipografia: wordmark “Mito” em Inter Medium #1E2B2B; headline em Canela Regular (ou alternativa: GT Super Text/Canela Text) #1F2F2F com tracking -1% e line-height ~110%; subheadline em Inter Regular #3B4F4C. Tamanhos relativos: wordmark sm, headline xl em 3 linhas, subheadline md. Margens: 7% de safe area; alinhamento à esquerda; grande respiro à direita. Iluminação difusa 5200K, contraste baixo, vinheta sutil. Textura com grain 35mm ~4% e blur orgânico; blacks levemente levantados (-0.2EV). Críticos a evitar: 1) cores saturadas neon; 2) centralizar a headline; 3) ícones/ilustrações médicas genéricas. Referências: Apple keynote slide (hierarquia e respiro), Aesop minimal (paleta terrosa e sofisticação). Vibe: luxo científico calmo, clínico-premium, confiança silenciosa com foco total em tipografia e espaço negativo.

posts.caption:
There’s no shortage of health advice out there on the internet. And a lot of it sounds convincing. But how much of it is actually true?

Our Co-Founder and Chief Medical Officer, Dr. Ryan Ware, will be breaking down 4 common health myths making the rounds on the internet to reveal what the science really says about optimizing your health and longevity.
posts.hookLine: There’s no shortage of health advice out there on the internet. And a lot of it sounds convincing. But how much of it is actually true?

primary.composition: The slide features a clean, minimalistic design with a white background. Large, bold text is positioned on the left side, serving as the main title. Below it, smaller explanatory text is aligned left. On the right side, there's a silhouette of two hands holding a smartphone, with the phone screen displaying a soft, colorful gradient. A small logo is placed in the top right corner.
primary.subject: The slide introduces an article or discussion about debunking health myths found online, featuring insights from a Chief Medical Officer. Visually, it uses a smartphone to symbolize internet content.

primary.hookSignal: O choque de contraste entre a headline serifada gigante em preto no canto superior esquerdo e o brilho etéreo da tela pastel do smartphone no terço direito cria um eixo visual imediato que trava o scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial minimalista estilo Apple keynote, ângulo frontal levemente baixo (0–10°), mostrando um set high-key com espaço negativo amplo à esquerda. Sujeito principal: duas mãos humanas em silhueta limpa, ~neutras em tom de pele, segurando um smartphone preto de bordas arredondadas no terço direito; tela com gradiente suave verde→azul→lilás, sem conteúdo, criando um brilho etéreo. Iluminação: fundo atrás do aparelho com softbox grande 5600–6000K (intensidade 90%), key backlight; fill frontal difuso 20% a 5800K; rim light sutil 10% pela direita 6200K para contornar o aparelho; sombras macias, sem hotspots. Paleta: branco-neve #FAFAFF → lilás-muito-claro #EFEFFE no fundo; silhueta quase-preta #0B0B0E; tela: mist green #DFF0C8 → ice blue #D5E9F6 → soft lilac #CFCBFA; texto #111111; acento cinza #B7BBC4. Grading: high-key, contraste moderado, blacks firmes com leve lift (+5), highlights suavizados. Textura/tratamento: clean, nitidez alta porém orgânica; grain de filme 35mm 3%; micro-clarity baixa; zero flare; sem halation. Composição: rule-of-thirds; headline ocupa quadrante superior esquerdo; subtítulo no terço inferior esquerdo; logotipo no canto superior direito; smartphone no terço direito acima do centro; mãos surgem do canto inferior direito; grande respiro negativo à esquerda. Camera position context: full-frame em tripé, 85mm f/4, ISO 200, 1/200s, white balance 5900K, shallow DOF leve (fundo suave porém legível). TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) "Debunking 4 health myths circling the internet." – posição: top-left; fonte: Georgia; peso: Bold; cor: #111111; tracking: -1%; line-height: 110%; tamanho: xl; animação: nenhuma. 2) "What our Co-Founder & Chief Medical Officer, Dr. Ryan Ware, has to say about them." – posição: bottom-third left; fonte: Inter; peso: Regular; cor: #111111; tracking: 0%; line-height: 125%; tamanho: md; animação: nenhuma. 3) "Mito" – posição: top-right; fonte: Helvetica Neue; peso: Medium; cor: #0F0F12; tracking: 0%; tamanho: md; animação: nenhuma. Elementos gráficos: halo elíptico atrás do telefone (1800x1200px), gradiente #EAF2FF→#E9FAD8 com 25% de opacidade; sombra suave do aparelho no fundo (blur 40px, opacidade 20%); sem ícones. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, minimalista, calmo, high-tech, confiável, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logos extras; Não usar cores saturadas; Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; Não criar glow neon agressivo; Não aplicar drop shadows pesadas. Style summary final: Manter realismo fotográfico, luz high-key controlada, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, nítido, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, Apple-keynote minimal editorial photo, slightly low frontal angle, high-key set. Subject: two human hands in clean silhouette holding a black rounded smartphone on the right third; empty screen with soft gradient green #DFF0C8 → blue #D5E9F6 → lilac #CFCBFA. Lighting: large back softbox 5600–6000K at 90% (key backlight), 20% front fill 5800K, 10% right rim 6200K; very soft shadows. Palette: background white #FAFAFF → pale lilac #EFEFFE; silhouette near-black #0B0B0E; text #111111; accent gray #B7BBC4. Grading: high-key, moderate contrast, slightly lifted blacks, smoothed highlights. Texture: clean, 35mm grain 3%, mild sharpening, no flare. Composition: rule-of-thirds; big headline top-left; subhead bottom-third left; logo top-right; phone slightly above center-right; negative space left. Camera: full-frame 85mm f/4, ISO200, 1/200s, WB 5900K, light shallow DOF. Overlays: 1) “Debunking 4 health myths circling the internet.” Georgia Bold, #111111, tracking -1%, LH 110%, size XL, top-left. 2) “What our Co-Founder & Chief Medical Officer, Dr. Ryan Ware, has to say about them.” Inter Regular, #111111, LH 125%, size MD, bottom-left. 3) “Mito” Helvetica Neue Medium, #0F0F12, size MD, top-right. Graphics: soft halo behind phone (gradient #EAF2FF→#E9FAD8, 25% opacity); subtle floor shadow. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, minimal, sophisticated. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product. Avoid saturated colors, generic medical icons, heavy drop shadows, sci-fi AI textures.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: fundo #FAFAFF com leve banho #EFEFFE; textos #111111; silhuetas #0B0B0E; tela com gradiente #DFF0C8→#D5E9F6→#CFCBFA; acentos suaves #B7BBC4. Tipografia: headline em Georgia Bold (#111111), tracking -1%, LH ~110%; subtítulo em Inter Regular (#111111), LH ~125%; wordmark “Mito” em Helvetica Neue Medium (#0F0F12). Layout: rule-of-thirds com grande respiro à esquerda; logotipo discreto no topo direito; hardware no terço direito, acima do centro. Luz high-key estilo estúdio Apple: backlight dominante e fill mínimo para preservar silhueta limpa. Três anti-padrões críticos: evitar cores saturadas/neon; evitar ícones médicos genéricos (stethoscope, cross); evitar sombras duras e efeitos 3D chamativos. Referências: Apple keynote slides (claridade e espaço negativo); Aesop product photography (sofisticação silenciosa). Vibe geral: ciência premium e calma, precisão clínica com calor humano sutil.

slides.composition: The slide features a split layout. The left half is a white/light grey background containing all the text elements. At the top left, there's a purple pill-shaped tag saying 'MYTH #1'. Below it, a large, bold quote reads '“More time in the gym means more gains, faster.”'. Further down, a circular headshot of 'Dr. Ryan Ware' is presented next to a three-paragraph explanatory text block. This text, also a quote, details the negative effects of overtraining, such as lower testosterone, increased cortisol, and stalled gains, with certain keywords like 'recovery' and 'stall your gains' highlighted in purple. The right half of the slide features a cropped, close-up photograph of a person's muscular arm and hand engaged in an exercise (like a push-up) on a rough, stony surface. The person is wearing a dark t-shirt.
slides.subject: Fitness myths; overtraining vs. recovery; testosterone and cortisol levels in fitness; expert advice on exercise duration.
slides.mood: Informative, educational, authoritative, debunking, clean, professional.
slides.style: Modern, minimalist, clean, professional, split-screen layout, Instagram carousel aesthetic.
slides.prompt: Instagram carousel slide with a clean, modern, minimalist design. Split composition: text on the left, an image on the right. Left side: White background, bold quote 'More time in the gym means more gains, faster.', purple 'MYTH #1' tag, a circular headshot of a smiling male doctor, and a three-paragraph explanatory quote about overtraining with purple highlighted keywords. Right side: Cropped close-up photo of a muscular arm and hand doing a push-up on a rough, stony ground, person wearing a black t-shirt. Palette: white, dark grey, light purple, natural stone/skin tones. Aspect Ratio: 1:1.

slides.composition: The slide is divided vertically. The left side features a large, bold text quote (the myth) and a small purple tag. The right side has an atmospheric photo in the upper part, and the bottom section combines a circular headshot of a doctor on the left with explanatory body text on the right. The background is predominantly white.
slides.subject: Debunking the myth that cancer is solely genetic, emphasizing lifestyle factors and early detection, featuring a doctor's expert opinion and an image of an elderly person.
slides.textOverlay:
MYTH #2
“My mom was diagnosed with cancer, so I’ll develop it too.”
Dr. Ryan Ware
“While genetics can raise your cancer risk, most cancers are lifestyle-driven. Lifestyle factors like smoking, alcohol, dietary habits and exercise routines contribute heavily to your risk.
While you can’t change your genetics, you can lower your risk through early detection and testing. I recommend starting with a Galleri® Multi-Cancer Detection Test.
After all, most cancers are treatable if caught early.”
slides.mood: Informative, reassuring, authoritative, serious yet hopeful.
slides.style: Clean, modern, editorial, minimalist, with a strong typographic hierarchy and a high-contrast, angular photographic element.
slides.prompt: Editorial Instagram slide debunking a health myth. Dominant left text: "'My mom was diagnosed with cancer, so I'll develop it too.'" with a purple 'MYTH #2' tag. Top right: High-angle photo of an elderly person, strong shadows, grey tones. Bottom: Circular headshot of Dr. Ryan Ware, next to informative text on lifestyle and early detection, with purple highlighted keywords. Clean white background.

slides.composition: A split-screen layout with text content on the left side and a scenic photograph on the right. The left side features a myth statement, a profile picture with a name, and two paragraphs of explanatory text. The right side shows an outdoor dining table with Mediterranean food and wine, overlooking a coastal landscape with white buildings.
slides.subject: Mediterranean diet and its health benefits, debunking a myth about longevity.
slides.textOverlay:
MYTH #3
“A mediterranean diet is the secret to longevity.”
Dr. Ryan Ware
“While there’s no ‘secret’ or ‘life hack’ to longevity, a Mediterranean diet is scientifically proven to reduce chronic inflammation, improve brain and metabolic health, and support healthy mitochondria which improves cardiovascular resilience, lowers cancer risk in some tissues, stabilizes blood sugar and supports mental health across the lifespan.
The diet is rich of antioxidants, anti-inflammatory phytochemicals, fiber-rich plant foods and healthy fats that all protect cells from age-related damage.”
slides.style: Clean, modern, editorial, minimalist with a touch of luxury.
slides.prompt: Create an Instagram carousel slide. Below, a circular profile photo of a doctor named Dr. Ryan Ware, with two paragraphs of supporting text in a modern font, with key phrases highlighted in blue. Right side: a high-angle photo of an elegant outdoor dining table set for two with Mediterranean dishes and wine glasses, overlooking a breathtaking coastal caldera view with white houses, under warm golden hour lighting.

slides.composition: The slide features a clean, two-column layout. slides.subject: Debunking the myth of a short post-workout protein window, emphasizing a 6-hour window, consistency, and daily protein intake recommendations (0.7g per pound of body weight).
slides.textOverlay:
MYTH #4
“You have only
1 hour to get
protein in after
a workout.”
Dr. Ryan Ware
“Research shows you have more than a
6-hour window to replenish protein after a
workout.
What matters most isn’t rushing to eat, it’s
about consistency. Aim to meet your total
daily protein needs and distribute intake
evenly throughout the day for better
absorption and muscle repair.
For majority, 0.7g of protein per pound of
body weight is recommended each day.”

slides.subject: Health advice, personalized insights, clinician consultation, debunking myths
slides.textOverlay:
The best way to cut through the myths?
There's a lot of information online. But it's important to remember that not all of it is grounded in science.
Test, don't guess.
It's the most reliable way to understand what your body actually needs. Get doctor-led insights personalized to your body and health journey from our expert clinician team.
1:1 clinician consult
Meet 1:1 with Dr. Ryan Ware to debunk any of your health concerns together

primary.composition: Close-up of two light-skinned hands, one gently overlapping the other, centered on a warm, neutral background. Text overlays are positioned in the top-left and bottom-right corners.

primary.textOverlay:
Your health is in your hands
Your body's always sending signals. Find the test that can help you understand it.
primary.style: Minimalist, clean, natural photography, wellness aesthetic
primary.hookSignal: O headline branco “Your health is in your hands” no canto superior esquerdo, suspenso sobre um macro close-up de dedos entrelaçados em tons pêssego-bege, cria alto contraste e imediata leitura, gerando stop‑scroll.
primary.prompt:
Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista ligeiramente de cima, ângulo alto suave, mostrando duas mãos humanas em pele clara neutra, dedos entrelaçados com gesto delicado e contemplativo, enquadradas contra fundo liso bege. Sujeito principal: mãos adultas (~30-40 anos), unhas curtas naturais, pele com microtextura visível e pequenas pintas, posição diagonal do canto inferior esquerdo ao superior direito; narrativa: “cuidar de si é tátil, pessoal e diário”. Iluminação: key light difusa a 45° pela esquerda, 4300K, intensidade baixa-média; fill suave pela direita 20%; back bounce mínimo do fundo; sombras macias, sem hotspots. Paleta: areia #DCC7B4 → pêssego suave #F2C9A9 → tan quente #D7A880 → caramelo claro #B98664; texto branco puro #FFFFFF; grading com blacks levemente lifted, contraste baixo-médio, -0.2 EV. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6%, nitidez orgânica, Pro-Mist 1/8, vinheta sutil 8%, sem HDR. Composição: regra dos terços; negativo amplo no terço superior esquerdo para headline; mãos ocupam centro-direita e bottom-third; fundo desfocado uniforme; foreground é pele, background é parede bege lisa. Camera position context: lente 85mm f/2.0, shallow DOF, ISO 200, 1/200s, balanço 4300K; handheld estável. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Your health is in
your hands” — posição top-left (upper-left third), fonte Inter, peso Medium, cor #FFFFFF, tracking +2, line-height 1.1, tamanho xl, sem sombra. 2) “Your body’s always sending signals. Find the test that can help you understand it.” — posição bottom-center (lower-third), fonte Inter, peso Regular, cor #FFFFFF, tracking +1, line-height 1.25, tamanho md, largura máxima 70% do frame, alinhado ao centro. Elementos gráficos: overlay de gradiente linear inferior para legibilidade, do bottom a 18% da altura: #000000 a 18% → transparente; vinheta radial #000000 a 10% nos cantos; safe margin 8% nas bordas. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, calmo, íntimo, sofisticado, humano. Referências: Apple keynote slide minimal; Aesop product minimalism; Equinox campaign tonality. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não usar ícones médicos genéricos. Não criar aparência de IA. Não aplicar sombreamento pesado no texto. Style summary final: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp controlado, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN:
Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo seen slightly from above, soft high angle, showing two interlaced adult hands against a clean beige backdrop. Subject: natural nails, fine skin texture and tiny moles, diagonal gesture from lower-left to upper-right, intimate and calm. Lighting: soft diffused key 45° left, 4300K, low–medium power; subtle right fill 20%; very soft shadows. Palette: sand #DCC7B4, soft peach #F2C9A9, warm tan #D7A880, light caramel #B98664; text pure white #FFFFFF; lifted blacks, low–medium contrast, -0.2 EV. Texture: 35mm film grain 6%, Black Pro-Mist 1/8, mild vignette 8%, no HDR. Composition: rule-of-thirds; spacious negative area top-left for headline; hands occupy center-right and lower third; uniform blur background. Camera: 85mm f/2.0, shallow DOF, ISO 200, 1/200s, WB 4300K, handheld. Overlays: 1) “Your health is in
your hands” top-left, Inter Medium, white #FFFFFF, tracking +2, lh 1.1, size xl. 2) “Your body’s always sending signals. Find the test that can help you understand it.” bottom-center, Inter Regular, white, tracking +1, lh 1.25, size md, max width 70%. Graphic elements: subtle bottom linear gradient #000000 at 18% → transparent; radial vignette #000000 at 10%; safe margins 8%. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, intimate. References: Apple keynote minimal; Aesop minimalism. No logos, no saturated colors, no generic medical icons, no AI look, no heavy drop-shadows.
primary.artDirection: Recrie um close editorial minimal de mãos sobre fundo bege liso, com luz difusa lateral esquerda (4300K) e sombras muito suaves. Paleta: areia #DCC7B4, pêssego #F2C9A9, tan #D7A880, caramelo #B98664 e texto #FFFFFF; blacks ligeiramente elevados e vinheta sutil. Tipografia: Inter — headline Medium branco, tracking +2, line-height ~1.1, canto superior esquerdo em duas linhas; subhead Regular branco, tracking +1, line-height ~1.25, alinhado ao centro no lower-third, largura máx. 70%. Aplique grain 35mm 6% e Pro-Mist 1/8 para suavizar highlights. Composição com bastante negativo no upper-left; mãos diagonais ocupando centro-direita. Três anti‑padrões críticos: evitar logos, evitar cores saturadas, evitar ícones médicos genéricos. Referências: slides minimalistas da Apple; estética Aesop (quiet luxury). Vibe geral: “luxury wellness científico, íntimo e calmo, com mensagem clara e humana.”

posts.caption:
Your body leaves behind clues long before disease comes into the picture. Subtle changes in your energy, mood, sleep, or focus are not all random, in fact, it could be your body sending signals.

Before it becomes heart disease, thyroid dysfunction, diabetes, or cancer, it’s often small imbalances in your biomarkers that are silently building.

And we’re not saying these are all the definite causes of each conditions, but we’ve seen the patterns firsthand with the patients at Mito. The thing that does hold true every time is that  chronic conditions don’t just happen suddenly, they’ve been building this whole time.

Early detection is your best bet. Because once you know what’s happening inside your body, you can change the outcome through the right supplements, nutrition, and lifestyle shifts.

Test early. Intervene smarter. Live longer.
posts.hookLine: Your body leaves behind clues long before disease comes into the picture. Subtle changes in your energy, mood, sleep, or focus are not all random, in fact, it could be your body sending signals.

primary.subject: Aerial view of a beach and water with textual overlay.
primary.textOverlay:
YOUR BODY LEAVES
BEHIND CLUES

BEFORE IT BECOMES
Thyroid disease
primary.hookSignal: O título Thyroid disease em branco puro #FFFFFF, grande e arejado no centro-esquerda, contrasta com a textura ocre do fundo e é sublinhado por um hairline minimalista que puxa o olhar para a direita.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando texturas orgânicas de areia e lodo salino formando padrões fluidos. Sujeito principal: superfície costeira abstrata tipo maré baixa, dunas micro-rugosas e lâminas de água rasa; narrativa de pistas sutis do corpo traduzidas em geometrias naturais, contemplativa e científica. Iluminação: golden hour suave, key difusa zenital, 4800K, intensidade baixa, sombras macias quase sem contraste, highlight acetinado nas cristas. Paleta: pêssego arenoso #E6C6B0 → nude argiloso #D7B29A → caramelo-ocre #C18A4D → terracotta clara #B1733E; sombras quentes #7D5A3D; tipografia branco-neve #F5F5F5; hairline e ícones em cinza-areia #C9C4BC; grading com blacks levemente lifted e midtones quentes, -0.2EV. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, leve bloom nos highlights, micro-sharpening orgânico, zero IA-glow. Composição: diagonal de banco de areia do canto superior direito ao centro; faixa mais escura no terço inferior direito; grande área de negative space no terço superior esquerdo para tipografia; foreground abstrato homogêneo, background contínuo sem horizonte. Camera position context: como se capturada por drone top-down, 90mm eq, f/4, ISO 100, 1/500s, DOF profunda, sem distorção. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) YOUR BODY LEAVES BEHIND CLUES — posição top-left, fonte Inter, peso Medium, cor #F5F5F5, tracking +60, line-height 1.1, tamanho md, quebra em 2 linhas, entrada fade-in 300ms. 2) BEFORE IT BECOMES — posição bottom-left acima do título, Inter Regular, cor #EDEDED, tracking +80, tamanho sm, line-height 1.0. 3) Thyroid disease — posição bottom-left (centro-esquerda), Inter SemiBold, cor #FFFFFF, tamanho xl, tracking +10, line-height 1.0. 4) Micro ícone quadrado 12x12px com ponto central 3px — posição mid-right alinhado à altura de Thyroid disease; cor #FFFFFF, stroke 1px #FFFFFF; linha hairline 1px #FFFFFF estende-se 40% até a borda direita, função de callout técnico. Elementos gráficos: sem bordas extras; sem sombras; alinhamentos em grid de 8px; safe margins 6% do canvas. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sereno, sofisticado, minimalista. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não usar ícones médicos genéricos. Não criar aparência de IA. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp controlado, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial top-down aerial of coastal sand/salt flats with fluid patterns. Subject: abstract low-tide surface with micro-ripples and shallow water, conveying subtle body signals as natural geometries. Lighting: soft golden hour, diffused zenithal key, 4800K, low intensity, gentle shadows. Palette: peach sand #E6C6B0 → clay nude #D7B29A → caramel ochre #C18A4D → light terracotta #B1733E; warm shadows #7D5A3D; type in white #FFFFFF; hairlines #C9C4BC; lifted blacks, warm mids, -0.2EV. Texture: 35mm film grain 5%, mild highlight bloom, organic micro-sharpening. Composition: diagonal sand bank from top-right to center; darker band bottom-right; large negative space top-left for type; no horizon. Camera: drone top-down, 90mm eq, f/4, ISO100, 1/500s, deep DOF. Overlays: 1) YOUR BODY LEAVES BEHIND CLUES — top-left, Inter Medium, #F5F5F5, tracking +60, line-height 1.1, size md. 2) BEFORE IT BECOMES — bottom-left above title, Inter Regular, #EDEDED, tracking +80, size sm. 3) Thyroid disease — bottom-left/center-left, Inter SemiBold, #FFFFFF, size xl, tracking +10. 4) 12x12px white square with 3px dot and 1px white hairline extending 40% to right edge, mid-right aligned to title baseline. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product. Anti-patterns: no logos, no saturated colors, no generic medical icons, no AI-look, no ornate display fonts. Keep photorealism, subtle film grain, high-res, minimal sophisticated composition.
primary.artDirection: Paleta terrosa quente: #E6C6B0 (base), #D7B29A (meios-tons), #C18A4D e #B1733E (acento), sombras #7D5A3D; tipografia sempre branca #FFFFFF/#F5F5F5 para máximo contraste. Tipografia: Inter (ou SF Pro Display alternativa). Uppercase pequeno para textos de apoio (Regular/Medium, tracking +60 a +80) e título principal em Inter SemiBold com tracking reduzido (+10). Evitar sombras e strokes na tipografia; usar grid de 8px e margens de 6% do canvas. Fundo é foto aérea real de areia/maré com diagonal clara e área negativa top-left. Inserir ícone quadrado 12x12px com ponto central e uma hairline 1px branca puxando à direita como callout técnico. Três anti-padrões críticos: não usar cores saturadas vibrantes; não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; não aplicar efeitos que pareçam IA. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica limpa) e Aesop (minimalismo tátil). Vibe: luxury wellness científico, calmo e editorial com rigor de apresentação de produto.

posts.caption:
Prostate cancer is the second leading cause of death in men, but when caught early, it’s one of the most treatable.

1 in 8 men will be diagnosed with prostate cancer in their lifetime. But early detection can shift the odds entirely. We’ve seen it firsthand: 60% of men who’ve tested with Mito show early risk indicators that they might have otherwise missed.

Early detection isn’t just about testing.
It’s your second chance at prevention.
posts.hookLine: Prostate cancer is the second leading cause of death in men, but when caught early, it’s one of the most treatable.

primary.style: Modern, clean, editorial, minimalist, impactful, health campaign
primary.hookSignal: O ‘60%’ em branco, gigantesco, ancorado por um bloco mint com textura aquarelada e uma linha que corta o quadro, salta do concreto escuro e dispara o stop-scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica em nível dos olhos, ângulo lateral 3/4 levemente baixo, mostrando um atleta masculino ~30-35, pele morena, barba curta, em posição de sprint estático junto a um muro de concreto urbano texturizado. Sujeito principal: homem atlético com tronco inclinado para a direita, olhar focado à frente, braço direito flexionado, usando regata preta #0F0F10, short cinza-claro #C7C7C7 com faixa de compressão preta no quadríceps. Iluminação: hard sunlight como key a 45° vindo da esquerda, 5600K, intensidade alta; fill sutil por bounce do chão bege (10%); rim light suave no ombro direito; sombras nítidas e alongadas no muro. Paleta: concreto greige #AFA79B → taupe escuro #7C746A; preto #1B1B1B; branco #FFFFFF; pele bronze #C78C66; detalhe mint-sage #CDE7D9 com mancha aquarelada teal #1AA79C; hairline cinza #D9D9D9 a 60% opacidade. Grading: contraste médio, blacks levemente levantados (#0E0E0E), subexposto -0.2 EV, saturação -10%, vibe Portra-like. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6%, micro-contraste, ligeiro motion blur 3% na mão, vignette sutil -0.3 EV, nitidez priorizada no rosto e braço. Composição: regra dos terços; sujeito ocupa o terço direito (cabeça no terço superior-direito); espaço negativo no terço esquerdo para tipografia; retângulo mint 24x14% no mid-left com textura aquarela, do qual parte uma linha fina horizontal que cruza o quadro por trás da tipografia; chão não visível, somente parede dividida por junta vertical central. Camera position context: 85mm f/2.8, shutter 1/1000, ISO 200, handheld estável. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” (top-left), fonte similar a SF Pro Display Regular, peso Regular, cor #FFFFFF 95%, tracking 0, tamanho sm. 2) “60%” (mid-left), Inter Bold, peso Bold, cor #FFFFFF, tamanho xl, tracking 0, line-height 90%, sem sombra. 3) “of men tested with Mito revealed early risk for prostate cancer” (abaixo do 60%, alinhado à esquerda em 4 linhas), Inter Regular, cor #FFFFFF 90%, tamanho md, line-height 120%, tracking +10. 4) “THE SECOND LEADING CAUSE OF DEATH” (bottom-left, alinhado à esquerda), Inter Medium All Caps, cor #FFFFFF 70%, tamanho sm, tracking +180, line-height 110%. Elementos gráficos: retângulo mint-sage com textura aquarela (sem borda, radius 4px), hairline #D9D9D9 60% opacidade 1px atravessando o quadro; sem ícones. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, atlético, sério, minimalista, urbano. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores saturadas; Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; Não centralizar o sujeito; Não usar glow/drop shadow pesado; Não aplicar 3D/neon. Style summary: Realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, nitidez controlada, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo at eye level, slight low 3/4 side angle. Subject: athletic male ~30-35, short beard, sprint stance against a textured concrete wall; leaning right, focused gaze, black tank #0F0F10, light gray shorts #C7C7C7 with black compression band. Lighting: hard sunlight key from left at 45°, 5600K, high intensity; subtle ground bounce fill (10%); soft rim on right shoulder; crisp elongated shadows. Palette: greige concrete #AFA79B to taupe #7C746A; black #1B1B1B; white #FFFFFF; skin bronze #C78C66; mint-sage #CDE7D9 with teal watercolor #1AA79C; 1px hairline #D9D9D9 at 60% opacity. Grading: medium contrast, slightly lifted blacks (#0E0E0E), -0.2 EV, -10% saturation, Portra-like. Texture: 35mm film grain 6%, micro-contrast, 3% motion blur on hand, soft vignette -0.3 EV, sharp on face/arm. Composition: rule-of-thirds, subject in right third; negative space left for type; mint rectangle (24x14% frame) mid-left with watercolor texture; a thin line extends horizontally behind typography. Camera: 85mm f/2.8, 1/1000, ISO 200, steady handheld. Overlays: top-left “Mito” (SF Pro-like Regular, white 95%, size sm); mid-left “60%” (Inter Bold, white, size xl); below: “of men tested with Mito revealed early risk for prostate cancer” (Inter Regular, white 90%, size md, LH 120%); bottom-left: “THE SECOND LEADING CAUSE OF DEATH” (Inter Medium All Caps, white 70%, tracking +180). No icons. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, athletic, minimal. References: Apple keynote, Equinox. Avoid saturated colors, generic medical icons, centered subject, heavy glows, 3D/neon. Keep photoreal, subtle film grain, high-res, refined minimalism.
primary.artDirection: Paleta neutra urbana: greige #AFA79B, taupe #7C746A, preto #1B1B1B, branco #FFFFFF, pele bronze #C78C66, acento mint #CDE7D9 + teal #1AA79C. Iluminação hard sunlight lateral 45° (5600K) com sombras definidas. Tipografia: use Inter para números e corpo (Bold para “60%”, Regular para o copy, Medium all-caps para a linha de rodapé); cor #FFFFFF com 90–95% opacidade; tracking +10 no corpo, +180 no rodapé; line-height 120%. Wordmark “Mito” no topo esquerdo em sans geométrica tipo SF Pro Display Regular. Três anti-padrões críticos: 1) não usar cores vibrantes/saturadas, 2) não inserir ícones médicos ou pictogramas genéricos, 3) não recentralizar o sujeito nem poluir com mais blocos de texto. Referências: slides da Apple (clareza tipográfica, espaço negativo), campanhas Equinox (atletismo premium, luz dura). Vibe geral: “health-tech premium encontra editorial esportivo minimalista” — concreto, luxo silencioso, foco em dado único (60%) com acento mint aquarelado e linha guia horizontal.

The left side features a cropped view of a fit man, actively running or exercising, against a background of a weathered, textured concrete wall. On the right, display bold white sans-serif text: '1 in 8 men will get diagnosed with prostate cancer in their lifetime.' Below this, add smaller white text: 'Planning for the future? Testing your PSA levels should be men's top priority.' Include a subtle white horizontal line extending from the left towards the text, with a small square bullet point. slides.composition: A clean, minimalist slide with a large title and subtitle at the top. Below, it features a 2x2 grid presenting four factors. Each factor includes a small square image/icon, a bold heading, and a descriptive sentence explaining its contribution to higher PSA levels. The background is white, and the text is black.
slides.subject: Factors contributing to higher PSA levels and prostate cancer risk
slides.textOverlay:
Elevated PSA levels and prostate cancer risk go hand in hand.
These are factors that contribute to higher PSA levels:
AGE
After age 50, PSA levels double roughly every 4 years.
DIET
Red meat & saturated fats may promote prostate inflammation
GENETICS
A family history of prostate cancer increases your risk
LIFESTYLE
Smoking and excessive alcohol use
slides.style: clean
slides.prompt: A clean, minimalist, and modern educational infographic slide for a carousel post. White background with bold black sans-serif typography. The layout features a main title and subtitle at the top. Below, a 2x2 grid displays four distinct sections. Each section includes a small square icon representing its topic (an older man for AGE, raw red meat for DIET, a DNA helix for GENETICS, and a smoky cigarette for LIFESTYLE), followed by a bold heading and a descriptive sentence explaining its relevance to PSA levels. --ar 1:1

primary.hookSignal: O contraste do título “YOUR HEALTH JOURNEY WITH MITO” em branco puro, perfeitamente centralizado, contra a pluma âmbar desfocada e sedosa no fundo teal-sage cria um foco imediato e luxuoso que interrompe o scroll. primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um fundo abstrato de nuvens de tinta orgânica difusas em água, formando uma coluna âmbar suave que desce do topo ao rodapé, sem pessoas. Sujeito principal: a pluma de tinta âmbar-terrosa, formas arredondadas, bordas macias, flutuando ao centro, criando narrativa de transição/começo de jornada, com negativo amplo para tipografia. Iluminação: backlight difuso com softbox grande por trás do aquário, 4800K, intensidade média (60%), fill lateral 20% a 5200K, sombras muito suaves, leve bloom no contorno da pluma. Paleta: teal acinzentado #6FA7A6 → sage claro #AFC9C2 → bege fosco #E7DED4 no fundo; âmbar #D4832F → terracotta #B25A2B → umber #4A2D21 na pluma; pretos elevados #1A1D20; tipografia branco-off #F5F8FA. Grading: leve subexposição −0.2 EV, blacks lifted, contraste baixo, highlight roll-off suave, matte finish. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, bloom 12%, blur gaussiano 25% nos blobs, micro vignetting −10, aberração cromática sutil 1%. Composição: pluma central ocupando o terço médio vertical; espaço negativo liso nos lados; margem de segurança 6% em todas as bordas; logotipo/título alinhados no eixo vertical; body copy no bottom-third center. Camera position context: full-frame 85mm f/1.8, shallow DOF, 1/125, ISO 200, tripé, overhead. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) "Mito" — posição: top-center (margem 6%); fonte: SF Pro Display; peso: Semibold; cor: #F5F8FA; tracking: +10; line-height: 100%; tamanho: sm; sombra: #000000 20% blur 8px. 2) "YOUR HEALTH JOURNEY WITH MITO" — posição: centro exato; fonte: Inter; peso: Semibold; cor: #FFFFFF; caixa: UPPERCASE; tracking: +6; line-height: 110%; tamanho: xl. 3) "To help you optimize your health and protect it for the long run." — posição: bottom-third center; fonte: Inter; peso: Regular; cor: #EAF2F2; tracking: +2; line-height: 130%; tamanho: md. Elementos gráficos: apenas gradiente linear topo→base #0D0F10 a 35% → transparente, sem boxes; leve text shadow global 15%. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, calmo, contemplativo, sofisticado, minimal, orgânico. Referências de marca: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores neon saturadas; Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; Não aplicar efeitos glitch/IA ou patterns artificiais; Não usar fontes display ornamentadas; Não inserir bordas decorativas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, nitidez controlada, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo seen from above, high overhead angle, featuring an abstract water-ink background: a soft amber plume forming a vertical column through the frame, no people. Lighting: large diffused backlight behind the tank, 4800K at 60% with 20% side fill at 5200K; very soft shadows; gentle bloom. Palette: teal #6FA7A6 → sage #AFC9C2 → matte beige #E7DED4 background; amber #D4832F → terracotta #B25A2B → umber #4A2D21 plume; lifted blacks #1A1D20; type off-white #F5F8FA. Film grade: −0.2 EV, low contrast, lifted blacks, smooth highlight roll-off, matte. Texture: 35mm grain 5%, bloom 12%, Gaussian blur 25% on blobs, micro vignette −10, 1% chromatic aberration. Composition: plume centered in middle third; generous negative space; 6% safe margins; title centered; body copy bottom-third center. Camera: full-frame 85mm f/1.8, shallow DOF, 1/125, ISO 200, tripod, overhead. Overlays: top-center “Mito” (SF Pro Display Semibold, #F5F8FA, tracking +10, size sm); center “YOUR HEALTH JOURNEY WITH MITO” (Inter Semibold, uppercase, #FFFFFF, tracking +6, size xl); bottom-third "To help you optimize your health and protect it for the long run." (Inter Regular, #EAF2F2, size md). Graphics: subtle linear gradient #0D0F10 35% → transparent; no boxes/icons. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, calm, sophisticated. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: teal #6FA7A6, sage #AFC9C2, bege fosco #E7DED4 para fundo; âmbar #D4832F e terracotta #B25A2B na pluma; pretos elevados #1A1D20; tipografia branco-off #F5F8FA. Tipografia: SF Pro Display Semibold para a marca “Mito” (tracking +10); Inter Semibold UPPERCASE para o título central (tracking +6, line-height 110%); Inter Regular para o body (line-height 130%), todas em #FFFFFF/#EAF2F2 com leve shadow 15% para contraste sobre o blur. Críticos anti-padrões: 1) Não usar ícones médicos, pictogramas ou emojis; 2) Não saturar com cores neon ou contrastes duros; 3) Não inserir boxes, glassmorphism ou bordas — texto direto no background com apenas um gradiente sutil para legibilidade. Referências: slide de keynote da Apple (hierarquia tipográfica e espaços generosos) e estética minimal da Aesop (tons terrosos e sofisticação). Vibe geral: “luxury wellness científico” — sereno, editorial e orgânico, com grão 35mm leve, blacks lifted e matte finish.

posts.caption:
The flu season is upon us and while you can’t control the germs around you, you can control how prepared your body is to fight back.

Measure your immune system to know if your defenses are ready and supported for the upcoming season. From inflammation to recovery markers to nutrient levels, see how your body is functioning and whether it needs support.

Your exposure is rising, make sure your defenses are too.
posts.hookLine: The flu season is upon us and while you can’t control the germs around you, you can control how prepared your body is to fight back.

primary.composition: The slide features a dark, almost black background with prominent, textured orange and reddish-brown amorphous blobs resembling microscopic organisms or a spreading substance, concentrated heavily on the left and bottom. White, sans-serif text is strategically placed on top of this background. In the top left, 'Mito' acts as a brand identifier. Four bullet points with a white square and a dot outline factors like 'KIDS ARE BACK IN SCHOOL', 'HOLIDAY TRAVEL IS PICKING UP', 'OFFICES ARE FILLING UP', and 'TEMPERATURE IS DROPPING'. The bottom right provides a summary with 'TRANSLATION:' followed by the impactful, larger text 'Germs are everywhere.', with 'Germs' being particularly emphasized. The overall arrangement creates an infographic-like feel, linking visual 'spread' to factual points.

primary.style: Modern, minimalist typography, high-contrast, microscopic/bio-art aesthetic, infographic.
primary.hookSignal: O contraste brutal entre o campo negro com ruído fino e a massa laranja-ferrugem texturizada no canto inferior esquerdo, somado ao statement grande ‘Germs are everywhere.’ em branco, bottom-right, dispara o stop-scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial macro-científica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um campo negro de dark-field com colônias microbianas laranja-ferrugem espalhadas e uma massa orgânica densa entrando pelo canto inferior esquerdo. Sujeito principal: textura de ‘germs’ granulares, amorfos, com bordas macias, sugerindo temporada de gripe; narrativa de alerta público/saúde. Iluminação: simulação de dark-field com rim light quente sobre as colônias, key light difusa a 35°, 2800–3000K, intensidade média, sombras profundas com brilho sutil nas partículas. Paleta: preto carvão #0A0A0A fundo; laranja queimado #D84C1B → óxido #A23B22 → terracota escura #6B2B1A nas colônias; acentos laranja vivo #FF6A2E em pontos; tipografia branca #FFFFFF e cinza frio #B7BDC7; grading com blacks lifted levemente, contraste alto, subexposição -0.2EV. Textura/tratamento: noise granular fino 18–22%, dither orgânico, bloom leve 8% nos highlights laranja, micro-poeira escura; sem banding. Composição: massa microbiana ocupa 35–40% do quadro do canto inferior esquerdo ao meio; pontos menores dispersos no terço direito superior; grande área de negative space preta à direita para textos; ‘Mito’ pequeno no top-left; quatro callouts distribuídos: topo-direita, meio-esquerda, meio-direita inferior, esquerda-inferior; statement final grande no bottom-right. Camera position context: macro 100mm f/8, top-down, DOF médio, como microscopia dark-field simulada; captura “studio-like”, tripod. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) ‘Mito’ — top-left, Inter SemiBold, peso Medium, #FFFFFF, tracking +2%, size sm. 2) ‘HOLIDAY TRAVEL IS PICKING UP’ — upper-right, SF Mono/IBM Plex Mono, Bold, #FFFFFF, tracking +6%, line-height 110%, size md. 3) ‘KIDS ARE BACK IN SCHOOL’ — mid-left sobre a massa, mesma fonte/peso, #FFFFFF, md. 4) ‘TEMPERATURE IS DROPPING’ — mid-right inferior, mesma fonte/peso, #FFFFFF, md. 5) ‘OFFICES ARE FILLING UP’ — left-lower, mesma fonte/peso, #FFFFFF, md. 6) ‘TRANSLATION:’ — bottom-right acima do statement, Inter Medium, #B7BDC7, tracking +4%, size sm. 7) ‘Germs are everywhere.’ — bottom-right, alinhado à direita, Inter Regular, #FFFFFF, size xl, leading 100%. ELEMENTOS GRÁFICOS: antes de cada callout, um square 24x24px stroke 1px #FFFFFF com dot sólido 6px #FFFFFF centrado; espaçamento 12px à esquerda do texto; pequenos specks laranja #FF6A2E ao redor dos squares (2–3 por label). MOOD: clean, premium, editorial, científico, tenso, minimalista, sofisticado. REFERÊNCIAS: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Equinox campaign pela austeridade. ANTI-PADRÕES: Não usar gradientes saturados; Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; Não usar sombras 3D pesadas; Não aplicar glassmorphism; Não inserir stock de laboratório. STYLE SUMMARY: Manter realismo fotográfico, dark-field verossímil, grão sutil, alta resolução, nítido, composição minimal e high-contrast.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram image, top-down macro-scientific editorial look: dark-field black canvas with rusty-orange microbial colonies. Main subject: granular, amorphous ‘germs’ mass entering from bottom-left, smaller specks scattered to the right; public-health alert narrative. Lighting: dark-field simulation with warm rim light, soft key at 35°, 2800–3000K, medium intensity, deep shadows and slight orange bloom. Palette: black #0A0A0A background; orange range #D84C1B → #A23B22 → #6B2B1A; accents #FF6A2E; text #FFFFFF and grey #B7BDC7; lifted blacks, high contrast, -0.2EV. Texture: fine film grain 18–22%, organic dither, 8% bloom, micro dust. Composition: microbial mass covers 35–40% from bottom-left; negative space on right for text. Camera: 100mm macro, f/8, top-down, medium DOF, dark-field simulated. Overlays: ‘Mito’ top-left (Inter Medium, white, small). Four labels in mono type (IBM Plex Mono/SF Mono Bold, white, md): ‘HOLIDAY TRAVEL IS PICKING UP’ upper-right; ‘KIDS ARE BACK IN SCHOOL’ mid-left; ‘TEMPERATURE IS DROPPING’ mid-right lower; ‘OFFICES ARE FILLING UP’ left-lower. Each label preceded by a 24px white stroke square with 6px white dot centered. Bottom-right: ‘TRANSLATION:’ (Inter Medium, grey #B7BDC7, small) above ‘Germs are everywhere.’ (Inter Regular, white, XL, right-aligned). Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, minimal. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal. Avoid saturated gradients, generic medical icons, heavy 3D shadows, glassmorphism, stock lab imagery.
primary.artDirection: Fundo preto #0A0A0A com textura de dark-field e ruído fino 20%. Colônias em laranja queimado #D84C1B com variações #A23B22 e #6B2B1A; pequenos specks #FF6A2E para brilho. Tipografia: títulos/labels em IBM Plex Mono (ou SF Mono) Bold, branco #FFFFFF, tracking +6%, leading 110%; wordmark ‘Mito’ em Inter SemiBold branco, pequeno no top-left; ‘TRANSLATION:’ em Inter Medium #B7BDC7; frase final ‘Germs are everywhere.’ em Inter Regular branco, grande, alinhada à direita. Inserir, antes de cada label, um square 24x24px stroke 1px #FFFFFF com dot sólido 6px centralizado, espaçado 12px do texto. Três anti-padrões críticos: evitar gradientes saturados/neon; não usar ícones médicos genéricos (estetoscópio, cruz); não aplicar sombras 3D ou glassmorphism. Referências: Apple keynote (clareza tipográfica e negative space) e Aesop (minimalismo premium, textura refinada). Vibe geral: editorial científico, premium e austero com alto contraste e mensagem direta.

slides.subject: Flu season preparedness, immune system, factors weakening immunity (lack of sleep, poor nutrition, chronic stress, age), viral defense.
slides.textOverlay:
The flu season is here. Are you prepared?
Your immune system is your first line of defense. But everyday stressors can quietly weaken it, making it easier to catch the flu (and harder to recover)
LACK OF SLEEP
POOR NUTRITION
CHRONIC STRESS
AGE
The flu doesn't just spread fast.
It hits harder when your defenses are down.

slides.composition: The slide features a large title and a descriptive paragraph in the top left, followed by five vertically stacked rectangular sections. slides.subject: Immune system health tips
slides.textOverlay:
Quick immune wins
Help your body respond faster, recover stronger, and stay resilient through flu season with these small daily habits.
• Prioritize sleep 7-9 hours of sleep support stronger antibody response
• Vitamin D & Zinc Key nutrients for immune signaling
• Stay active Regular movement boosts immune cell circulation
• Manage stress Chronic cortisol suppresses immune function
• Wash your hands Simple but effective in preventing spread

We connect each layer to give you the most comprehensive view of your health and insights that are personal to you and your unique health journey.

primary.style: Modern, minimalist, scientific, digital art, abstract, high-contrast.
primary.hookSignal: O quadrado teal com textura de microscópio e cadeia de pontos brilhantes salta do fundo negro-âmbar, criando alto contraste imediato. A linha branca que sai do card para fora do frame sugere ‘conexões’ e aciona o stop-scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um card quadrado teal com bordas bem arredondadas flutuando sobre um fundo orgânico escuro em tons âmbar, com um fio branco conectando o card ao lado direito do frame. Sujeito principal: um card 1:1 com textura de microscópio exibindo uma cadeia de pontos bioluminescentes (como células/proteínas conectadas), sugerindo “connecting the dots”; nenhum rosto humano. Iluminação: low key com key light suave difusa a 3200K vindo do canto superior direito criando halos âmbar no fundo; fill frio sutil 5600K sobre o card teal; rim light fraco 2800K nos contornos laranja; sombras profundas com falloff rápido, contraste médio-alto. Paleta: obsidian #0B0C0D → umber #2B0F07 → ember orange #D35421 → honey #FF8A3D (fundo) + teal #35C1B6 no card, degradê interno para mint #7DE8D7; dots em ice-mint #CFFCF3; tipografia em off-white #F3F3F3; linha/conector #EAEAEA. Film grading: blacks levemente lifted (#0E0E0E), halation laranja sutil, subexposição -0.2 EV. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 8%, leve bloom (CineBloom 10%), micro-noise no card, blur orgânico no fundo (bokeh macro). Composição: rule-of-thirds; card posicionado no terço central-esquerdo (x=42%, y=38%), ocupando ~34% da largura; linha 1px sai do centro-direito do card e cruza ~55% da largura até a borda; pequeno nó quadrado branco 10x10px ancorando a linha ao card; logo/título no topo central; headline em duas linhas centralizada abaixo do card, no bottom-mid. Camera position context: top-down studio, 100mm macro f/2.8, shallow DOF, ISO 200, 1/125s, capturada como se por medium format digital; tripé overhead. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) "Mito" — top center; fonte SF Pro Display; peso Regular; cor #F5F5F5; tracking 0; line-height 100%; tamanho sm; sem animação. 2) "CANCER RUNS\nIN THE FAMILY" — bottom-third center, duas linhas; fonte SF Mono; peso Medium; cor #FFFFFF; tracking +40; line-height 110%; tamanho md; sem highlights; fade-in 200ms opcional. Elementos gráficos: card 900x900px (proporcional) com raio 48px, sombra externa suave #0A0A0A 20%; nó conector 10x10px #FFFFFF posicionado na borda direita do card; linha 1px #EAEAEA seguindo horizontalmente até a borda direita. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple Keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores neon saturadas; Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; Não inserir pessoas/stock; Não exagerar em glow/AI-look; Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp controlado e composição minimalista sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial top-down shot: a rounded teal square card floats over a dark, organic amber background, a thin white line connects the card to the right edge. Main subject: 1:1 teal card with microscope-like texture showing a chain of bioluminescent dots, implying “connecting the dots.” Lighting: low key; warm diffused key 3200K from top-right creating amber halos; cool fill 5600K on the teal card; slight 2800K rim; deep shadows. Palette: obsidian #0B0C0D → umber #2B0F07 → ember orange #D35421 → honey #FF8A3D background; teal #35C1B6 card with mint #7DE8D7 gradient; dots ice-mint #CFFCF3; type #F3F3F3; connector #EAEAEA. Grade: lifted blacks (#0E0E0E), subtle halation, -0.2 EV. Texture: 35mm film grain 8%, bloom 10%, micro-noise on card, macro bokeh background. Composition: rule-of-thirds; card at x=42%, y=38%, ~34% width; 1px line leaves card’s mid-right toward frame edge; 10x10px white node at card edge; brand top-center; headline centered below card. Camera: studio overhead, 100mm macro f/2.8, shallow DOF, ISO200, 1/125s. Overlays: “Mito” top-center (SF Pro Display Regular #F5F5F5, size sm). “CANCER RUNS IN THE FAMILY” two lines bottom-center (SF Mono Medium #FFFFFF, tracking +40, size md). Graphics: card radius 48px, soft shadow; node 10x10px; 1px connector. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific. References: Apple Keynote; Aesop minimal. No neon, no generic medical icons, no people, no heavy AI glow, no ornate display fonts.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: preto/obsidian #0B0C0D, umber #2B0F07, ember orange #D35421, honey #FF8A3D; card em teal #35C1B6 com gradiente para mint #7DE8D7; tipografia em off-white #F3F3F3. Tipografia: topo “Mito” em SF Pro Display Regular, kerning padrão; headline em SF Mono Medium, all caps, tracking +40, sem itálico. Fundo com formas orgânicas âmbar desfocadas, low key, halation leve; card 1:1 com raio 48px, micro-noise e cadeia de pontos soft-glow; linha 1px #EAEAEA saindo do meio-direito do card, com nó quadrado branco 10x10px. Três anti-padrões críticos: não usar ícones médicos genéricos; não saturar com neon; não inserir fotos de pessoas/stock. Referências: Apple Keynote (hierarquia limpa, espaço negativo) e Aesop (minimalismo táctil). Vibe geral: luxury health-tech, científico e contemplativo com contraste alto e mensagem direta.

posts.caption:
1 in 3 people will develop cancer in their lifetime. But most won’t see it coming until the cancer has already advanced.

Even with normal labs, no symptoms, or even no family history of cancer, it can still hide quietly in your body without you ever realizing it.

We’re proud to announce the launch of the Galleri® Multi-Cancer Early Detection Test that can identify signals of over 50+ cancer types through a simple blood draw, helping you act early before symptoms show. 

This technology detects for DNA fragments circulating in your blood to catch a potential cancer signal long before it can even show up on a standard lab or routine checkup.

With cancer, timing matters. The earlier it’s found, the more choices you have and the more life you get to live. At Mito, our mission has always been to give people a deeper, earlier, and more proactive understanding of their health. Partnering with Galleri alongside our 100+ biomarkers panel brings us one step closer to that vision.

Now available at exclusive pricing with Mito Health.
posts.hookLine: 1 in 3 people will develop cancer in their lifetime. But most won’t see it coming until the cancer has already advanced.

primary.hookSignal: O choque do título em caixa-alta ‘1 IN 3 PEOPLE’ gigante no terço esquerdo, com ‘CANCER’ destacado em lavanda #B8A7FF contra o fundo quente desfocado, cria contraste imediato e para o scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica minimalista com macro bokeh, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um fundo orgânico em tons de pele desfocado que sugere o contorno suave de um ombro/rosto fora de foco, criado para servir como canvas limpo para tipografia de alto impacto. Sujeito principal: um campo abstrato quente, sem rosto, com manchas ovais escuras sugerindo sombra de cabeça no canto superior direito e profundidade suave; narrativa: silêncio clínico + urgência preventiva, preparando o leitor para dados duros sobre detecção precoce de câncer. Iluminação: key light difusa a 45° vinda do topo-direita, 3800K (golden hour indoor), intensidade baixa/soft, sombras macias com vignette sutil no canto inferior esquerdo; fill mínimo e negative fill à esquerda. Paleta: pêssego #EEB089 → âmbar #C97A3C → terracotta #A4573C → marrom-umber #3B2A23 com mancha oliva-escura #18241A; tipografia branca #FFFFFF e destaque lavanda #B8A7FF; grade com blacks levemente levantados (#0F0F11), leve warm bias e subexposição -0.2 EV. Textura/tratamento: blur orgânico (bokeh elíptico), grain de filme 35mm 5%, halation discreta nas altas, sem artefatos IA. Composição: rule-of-thirds; grande área negativa no terço esquerdo-centro para o título; logotipos no topo-esquerda; micro-copy no rodapé esquerdo e direito; equilíbrio óptico central. Camera position context: iPhone vertical handheld ou 50mm f/1.4 full-frame, f/1.2 shallow DOF, foco atrás do plano da tipografia (background propositalmente desfocado). TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito  |  Galleri” no top-left; fonte Inter Semibold, tamanho sm, cor #FFFFFF; barra vertical fina #FFFFFF entre nomes; ícone asterisco de Galleri (6 pontas) 10px, gradiente #6D5AF6→#8AD1FF; tracking +2, line-height 110%. 2) Headline (center-left, ocupando mid-left até bottom-third): “1 IN 3 PEOPLE” quebra de linha; “WILL DEVELOP”; “CANCER” (lavanda #B8A7FF); “IN”; “THEIR”; “LIFETIME.” Fonte Inter Bold, tamanho xl, cor #FFFFFF exceto “CANCER”; tracking -1, line-height 92%. 3) Rodapé bottom-left: “NOW AVAILABLE” quebra “AS ADD-ON” Inter Medium, tamanho xs, #E6E6E6, tracking +8. 4) Rodapé bottom-right: “GALLERI® MULTI-CANCER” quebra “EARLY DETECTION TEST” Inter Regular, xs, #E6E6E6, tracking +6. Elementos gráficos: vignette radial suave (#000000, 12% opacity) nos cantos; linha divisória 1px entre “Mito” e “Galleri”; sem caixas. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, calmo, urgente, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo grande extra; Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; Não centralizar tudo simetricamente; Não criar aparência de IA. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp nas letras, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram slide, cinematic editorial minimal photo with macro bokeh, high aerial angle, showing an abstract warm skin-tone background (out-of-focus shoulder/face suggestion) as a clean canvas for bold type. Lighting: soft key from top-right at 45°, 3800K, low intensity, gentle shadows, slight vignette. Palette: peach #EEB089 → amber #C97A3C → terracotta #A4573C → umber #3B2A23 with dark olive blotch #18241A; text white #FFFFFF with lavender highlight #B8A7FF; lifted blacks #0F0F11, -0.2 EV. Texture: organic blur/bokeh, 35mm film grain 5%, subtle halation. Composition: rule-of-thirds; big negative space mid-left for headline; logos top-left; micro-copy bottom-left/right. Camera: iPhone vertical handheld or 50mm f/1.4 at f/1.2, shallow DOF. Overlays: Top-left “Mito | Galleri” (Inter Semibold, small, white; thin divider; 6-point star icon with gradient #6D5AF6→#8AD1FF). Center-left headline in stacked lines: “1 IN 3 PEOPLE / WILL DEVELOP / CANCER / IN / THEIR / LIFETIME.” Inter Bold, XL, white except “CANCER” lavender #B8A7FF, tight leading 92%. Bottom-left: “NOW AVAILABLE / AS ADD-ON” Inter Medium, XS, #E6E6E6, wide tracking. Bottom-right: “GALLERI® MULTI-CANCER / EARLY DETECTION TEST” Inter Regular, XS, #E6E6E6. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, calm-urgent. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal. Avoid saturated colors, generic medical icons, AI-ish artifacts. Keep photoreal, natural shadows, crisp type.
primary.artDirection: Fundo abstrato quente com blur orgânico, sem sujeito nítido, para tipografia dominante. Paleta: pêssego #EEB089, âmbar #C97A3C, terracotta #A4573C, umber #3B2A23, oliva-escuro #18241A; texto #FFFFFF e destaque lavanda #B8A7FF; micro-copy #E6E6E6. Tipografia: Inter — Headline Bold (XL), tracking -1, line-height 92%; Marca top-left em Inter Semibold (sm), divisor 1px branco; Rodapés em Inter Medium/Regular (XS) com tracking amplo (+6 a +8). Três anti-padrões críticos: não usar fotos nítidas de pessoas; não saturar as cores; não incluir ícones médicos genéricos/estetoscópios. Referências: Apple keynote slide (hierarquia tipográfica limpa), Aesop (minimalismo premium). Vibe geral: silêncio clínico com urgência serena — um canvas quente e desfocado que faz o dado duro saltar em tipografia high-contrast.

posts.caption:
Cancer is no longer an “old” person’s disease anymore. Younger adults are seeing rising rates, as of recently.

But research shows what you eat, drink, and do every day can dramatically shift your cancer risk. Up to 40% of cancers are preventable through lifestyle and early detection.

At Mito, we’re making prevention measurable through our Galleri Multi-Cancer Earlt Detection Test that helps you catch signals of over 50+ cancer types in one blood draw.

The sooner you test, the earlier you can act.
posts.hookLine: Cancer is no longer an “old” person’s disease anymore. Younger adults are seeing rising rates, as of recently.

primary.hookSignal: O choque do cabeçalho branco gigante “More young people are getting cancer.” no topo esquerdo, flutuando sobre um retrato quente de golden hour, cria um contraste duro entre beleza e urgência que trava o scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica em close-up, ângulo de câmera ligeiramente acima da linha dos olhos (≈15° lateral esquerdo), mostrando metade do rosto de uma jovem adulta de pele clara com sardas, ~25-30 anos, cabelos ruivo-acobreado ao sol, expressão pensativa enquanto toca o rosto com a mão direita (anel prateado minimalista). Iluminação golden hour lateral-direita: key light solar quente a 4300K, intensidade suave 70%, rim light sutil no contorno do nariz e lábios, fill natural rebatido do mar à esquerda, sombras macias sem recorte duro. Paleta exata: pele pêssego #E6BFA6 → blush rosé #D9967F; cabelo cobre #A95E3B; mar teal-acinzentado #3E6C89; céu haze #A5C4D6; sombras quentes #6E4C3B; tipografia branca #FFFFFF. Film grading estilo Kodak Portra: leve subexposição -0.2EV, blacks levemente lifted (+5), contraste moderado, balanço quente, vignette suave -10. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, micro-contraste baixo, blur cinematográfico orgânico nas bordas, bokeh suave no mar. Composição: regra dos terços; metade direita ocupada pelo rosto (olho direito cortado pelo topo); mão no terço inferior-central; negativo amplo no lado esquerdo com mar desfocado para acomodar texto; horizonte fora de foco no terço superior-esquerdo. Camera position context: full-frame mirrorless, 85mm f/1.8, shallow DOF (f/2), 1/800s, ISO 100, handheld estável. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) "More young people are getting cancer." — posição: top-left, margem 10%/8%; fonte: Inter; peso: SemiBold; cor: #FFFFFF; tracking: -1%; line-height: 1.08; tamanho: xl; quebras em 4 linhas equilibradas; sem sombra. 2) "And this isn’t some coincidence." — posição: bottom-left, margem 10%/14%; fonte: Inter; peso: Regular; cor: #FFFFFF; tracking: 0%; line-height: 1.15; tamanho: md. ELEMENTOS GRÁFICOS: overlay linear sutil esquerda→direita para legibilidade (preto #000000 a 18% → 0% em 45% da largura), sem bordas; vignette circular -10. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, íntimo. Referências: Apple keynote slide minimal; Aesop minimal product; Calvin Klein editorial; Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos. Não criar aparência de IA. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp no plano dos olhos/lábios, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial close-up, camera slightly above eye level (~15° from left). Half-face of a young adult woman with freckles, copper hair glowing in golden hour, pensive, right hand touching cheek (minimal silver ring). Lighting: warm side key 4300K from right, 70% intensity, soft rim on nose/lips, natural sea bounce on left, soft shadows. Palette: skin #E6BFA6/#D9967F, hair #A95E3B, sea #3E6C89, sky #A5C4D6, shadows #6E4C3B, text #FFFFFF. Film grade: Kodak Portra look, -0.2EV, lifted blacks +5, moderate contrast, warm balance, subtle vignette -10. Texture: 35mm film grain 5%, gentle edge blur, soft sea bokeh. Composition: rule-of-thirds; right half occupied by face; hand lower-center; generous negative space left with defocused sea; horizon soft top-left. Camera: full-frame mirrorless, 85mm f/1.8, f/2 shallow DOF, 1/800s, ISO 100, handheld. TEXT/OVERLAYS: 1) “More young people are getting cancer.” — top-left, 10%/8% margins; Inter SemiBold; #FFFFFF; tracking -1%; LH 1.08; size XL; 4 balanced lines. 2) “And this isn’t some coincidence.” — bottom-left, 10%/14%; Inter Regular; #FFFFFF; tracking 0%; LH 1.15; size MD. Graphic elements: faint left-to-right black overlay (#000 18%→0% at 45% width). Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote, Aesop, Calvin Klein, Equinox. Avoid: logos, saturated colors, medical icons, AI look, ornate fonts. Keep photographic realism, subtle film grain, high-res, minimal sophisticated composition.
primary.artDirection: Objetivo: retrato minimal com tipografia clara sobre negativo à esquerda. Paleta: pele pêssego #E6BFA6/rosé #D9967F; cabelo cobre #A95E3B; mar #3E6C89; céu #A5C4D6; texto #FFFFFF; sombras #6E4C3B. Iluminação golden hour lateral direita (4300K), sombras macias; grading Kodak Portra com -0.2EV e blacks +5. Tipografia Inter: título SemiBold branco (XL, tracking -1%, LH 1.08) no top-left; subtítulo Regular branco (MD, tracking 0, LH 1.15) no bottom-left. Margens generosas 10%-14%. Overlay linear preto 18% à esquerda para legibilidade; nada além disso. Três anti-padrões críticos: não inserir logotipos; não usar cores saturadas/neon; não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica limpa) + Aesop (paleta orgânica e calma). Vibe: luxury wellness clínico e contemplativo — beleza natural em contraste com mensagem dura, composição minimalista com muito negativo e grão sutil de filme.

posts.caption:
You don’t feel muscle loss, but it’s happening quietly. Muscle loss doesn’t just begin at old age, it actually starts after your 30s and you’re losing up to 8% of it every decade.

And this shift isn’t just affecting your strength or physique, it changes how your body ages, regulates energy, and recovers. In fact, it’s one of the strongest predictors of early death as declining muscle mass single-handedly raises your risk of diabetes, heart disease, osteoporosis, cognitive decline, and frailty.

While muscle loss is inevitable, how much you lose isn’t. That’s up to you. A DEXA scan helps you stay ahead of it.
posts.hookLine: You don’t feel muscle loss, but it’s happening quietly. Muscle loss doesn’t just begin at old age, it actually starts after your 30s and you’re losing up to 8% of it every decade.
