Mito
60% of Type 2 diabetes cases can be prevented if caught early.
primary.hookSignal: O olho bate primeiro no “60%” em branco grande no bottom-center, contrastando com o fundo terracota escuro, seguido pelo destaque “if caught early.” em verde-sage que sinaliza urgência e prevenção.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um macro close-up abstrato de pele humana em dobras suaves como dunas, com um pequeno tile científico central contrastando no fundo escuro. Sujeito principal: superfície cutânea orgânica, tons terracota, poros sutis, sem pessoa identificável; no centro, um quadrado 1:1 com micrografia fluorescente de ilhotas pancreáticas (células redondas magenta sobre matriz turquesa). Iluminação: key light difusa a 45° pela direita, 3000 K, intensidade média-baixa; fill 10% pela esquerda, sombras macias com falloff suave; leve rim light destacando a curva principal. Paleta: fundo gradiente espresso #1A120D → umber queimado #5B2F22 → canela #7C4A39; sombras nogueira #0E0806; texto branco macio #F2F2F0; destaque sage #A4C5A2; micrografia turquesa #00A7B3 e cian #0FD1C8 com núcleos magenta #F48AAE e coral #E36A4F. Grading: blacks levemente lifted, subexposição -0.2 EV, contraste baixo, tonalidade quente; grain de filme 35mm 6%; vignette -15; blur cinematográfico orgânico sutil nas bordas. Composição: rule-of-thirds; enorme campo negativo; wordmark “Mito” top-center; tile científico central (≈8% da largura), sem toque; manchete no bottom-third center em três linhas, com a última em verde; nenhum elemento tocando a borda. Camera position context: full-frame 100mm macro f/4, ISO 200, 1/125s, tripod; perspectiva top-down estável. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” — top center, SF Pro Display Medium, cor #F3F3F0, tracking +60, line-height 1.0, tamanho sm. 2) “60% of Type 2 diabetes cases can be prevented” — bottom-third center, Inter Regular, cor #F5F5F3, tamanho xl (com “60%” em Inter Bold), tracking +5, line-height 1.15. 3) “if caught early.” — imediatamente abaixo, Inter Medium, cor #A4C5A2, tamanho lg, tracking +5. Elementos gráficos: um tile 1:1 (64–96 px aprox.) mid-center, borda 1 px #1E1E1E 40% opacidade, sem sombra; nenhum ícone. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, calmo, minimal. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores saturadas vivas; Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; Não aplicar drop shadows fortes ou glow artificial; Não usar fontes display ornamentadas; Não inserir marcas d’água ou logotipos além do wordmark textual. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, nitidez controlada, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial top-down macro of soft skin folds like dunes, dark terracotta backdrop with a small science tile at center. Key subject: organic skin texture (no person shown), plus a 1:1 fluorescent micrograph of pancreatic islets (magenta dots on turquoise matrix). Lighting: soft key at 45° from right, 3000K, medium-low intensity; 10% fill left; gentle rim; soft shadows. Palette: espresso #1A120D → burnt umber #5B2F22 → cinnamon #7C4A39; deep shadow #0E0806; text off-white #F2F2F0; sage #A4C5A2; micrograph turquoise #00A7B3, cyan #0FD1C8, magenta #F48AAE, coral #E36A4F. Grading: lifted blacks, -0.2EV, low contrast, warm tone; 35mm film grain 6%; vignette -15; subtle edge blur. Composition: rule-of-thirds, vast negative space; “Mito” top-center; science tile dead-center (~8% width); headline in bottom-third center, last line in sage. Camera: full-frame 100mm macro f/4, ISO 200, 1/125s, tripod, top-down. Overlays: 1) “Mito” — top center, SF Pro Display Medium, #F3F3F0, tracking +60, size sm. 2) “60% of Type 2 diabetes cases can be prevented” — bottom-center, Inter Regular (with “60%” Bold), off-white #F5F5F3, size xl, line-height 1.15. 3) “if caught early.” — below, Inter Medium, sage #A4C5A2, size lg. Graphic elements: single 1:1 tile, 1px border #1E1E1E 40% opacity, no shadow. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal. No saturated colors, no generic medical icons, no heavy drop shadows, no ornate fonts. Maintain realistic photographic look, subtle grain, high resolution, minimalist premium composition.
primary.artDirection: Paleta quente, escura e sofisticada: espresso #1A120D, umber #5B2F22, canela #7C4A39; texto off-white #F5F5F3 e destaque sage #A4C5A2; micrografia com turquesa #00A7B3 e magenta #F48AAE. Tipografia: wordmark “Mito” em SF Pro Display Medium (tracking amplo), headline em Inter Regular/Bold (xl) e a frase final em Inter Medium (lg) em verde-sage. Use blacks levemente lifted, contraste baixo e grain 35mm 6% para um toque editorial premium. Anti-padrões críticos: 1) não use ícones médicos clichê (seringa, cruz, estetoscópio), 2) não aplique sombras/drops marcados, 3) não sature as cores — mantenha a sobriedade. Referências: Apple Keynote (tipografia limpa e hierarquia impecável) e Aesop (minimalismo sensorial e textura rica). posts.caption:
ApoB is one of the strongest predictors of heart disease. Yet it’s rarely tested in routine labs. Routine blood work often stops at cholesterol, but even “normal” cholesterol levels don’t always mean your heart is healthy.

4 in 10 people who’ve tested with Mito have discovered dangerously high levels of ApoB, even when their LDL levels were clear.

Testing for ApoB can help you take control of your metabolic health, reduce disease risks and stroke, and potentially add healthy years to your lifespan.

primary.style: Modern, dynamic, health tech, blurred motion photography, minimalistic text overlay.
primary.hookSignal: O título “4 in 10 people” em branco puro, grande e centrado, repousa sobre um fundo quente em motion blur — criando alto contraste imediato. A sombra longa do corredor atravessando a direita da cena adiciona drama e depth que prende o scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um corredor masculino ~30 anos, pele morena, cabelo curto crespo, em corrida rápida projetando sombra longa numa parede quente de concreto. Sujeito principal ligeiramente desfocado por motion blur, corpo em diagonal do canto inferior esquerdo ao centro, expressão determinada, camiseta off‑white e shorts escuros. Iluminação golden hour lateral direita, key light a 45° baixo, temperatura ~4100K, intensidade média-alta, sombras alongadas e suaves com rim light sutil no perfil. Paleta: areia quente #D9A17B → cobre queimado #9A4C2F → caramelo escuro #5A2E22 → sombra antracite #0F0F10; tipografia em branco puro #FFFFFF e cinza-neve #EDEDED; grading filme com blacks levemente levantados (#141414), subexposição -0.2 stop. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, blur cinematográfico orgânico (panning 1/30s), vinheta radial suave -20, halation discreto em highlights. Composição: fundo de parede e chão formando faixa diagonal; sujeito ocupa terço inferior esquerdo; área limpa no centro para texto; sombra do corredor no terço direito; espaço negativo no topo. Camera position context: como se capturada de sacada a ~4 m de altura, 50mm f/2.0, 1/30s, ISO 100, pan segue o sujeito; shallow DOF moderado. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” — top-center levemente acima do rosto, fonte Inter Medium, cor #FFFFFF, tracking +2%, line-height 100%, tamanho sm, fade-in 200ms. 2) Headline: “4 in 10 people” — centro exato, Georgia Semibold, tamanho xl, cor #FFFFFF, tracking 0%, line-height 110%, fade-up 300ms. 3) Subheadline: “have discovered dangerously high ApoB levels with Mito” — bottom-third center logo abaixo do título, Inter Regular, cor #EDEDED, tamanho md, tracking +1%, line-height 130%. 4) Copy secundário: “One of the strongest predictors of heart disease. Yet rarely tested.” — abaixo do subheadline (pequeno espaçamento), Inter Regular, cor #D6D6D6, tamanho sm, tracking +1%, line-height 140%. Elementos gráficos: hairline horizontal 1 px #D6D6D6 no mid-right alinhado ao subheadline, 120 px de comprimento, função de equilíbrio visual; leve glow branco 8% atrás do título (oval 480x220 px, blur 60). Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Equinox campaign; Aesop minimal product; Calvin Klein editorial. ANTI-PADRÕES: Não adicionar logo extra; Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não usar ícones médicos genéricos; Não exagerar no blur; Não criar aparência de IA. STYLE SUMMARY: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp controlado, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo from a high aerial-like top-down angle. Runner (male, ~30) sprinting diagonally bottom-left to center, slight motion blur; long shadow cast on a warm concrete wall. Golden hour side light from right, 45° key, ~4100K, medium-high intensity, soft elongated shadows, subtle rim light. Color palette: sand #D9A17B → burnt copper #9A4C2F → dark caramel #5A2E22 → charcoal #0F0F10; type in #FFFFFF and #EDEDED. Filmic grade with lifted blacks (#141414), -0.2 stop exposure. Texture: 35mm film grain 5%, organic panning blur (1/30s), soft radial vignette, slight halation. Composition leaves clean center for type; runner in lower-left third; shadow on right third. Camera: ~4 m height, 50mm f/2.0, 1/30s, ISO 100, shallow DOF, panning with subject. Overlays: 1) “Mito” top-center, Inter Medium, #FFFFFF, sm. 2) Headline “4 in 10 people” centered, Georgia Semibold, xl, #FFFFFF. 3) Subheadline “have discovered dangerously high ApoB levels with Mito” below, Inter Regular, md, #EDEDED. 4) Secondary copy “One of the strongest predictors of heart disease. Yet rarely tested.” below, Inter Regular, sm, #D6D6D6. Graphic: 1 px hairline #D6D6D6 mid-right aligned to subheadline; soft white oval glow behind headline. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific. References: Apple keynote, Equinox, Aesop. Avoid: logos, saturated neon, medical icons, over-blur, AI look.
primary.artDirection: Paleta quente e sóbria: areia #D9A17B, cobre #9A4C2F, caramelo #5A2E22, antracite #0F0F10, tipografia em #FFFFFF/#EDEDED. Headline serif (Georgia Semibold) xl; subheadline e corpo em Inter Regular/Medium, tracking leve (+1%), line-height confortável (110–140%). Layout centralizado com área negativa ao redor. Motion blur direcional (panning 1/30s) e grain 35mm 5% para toque editorial. Três anti‑padrões críticos: evitar cores vibrantes/neon; não usar ícones médicos genéricos; não exagerar no blur que prejudique a leitura. Referências: Apple Keynote (tipografia limpa, hierarquia impecável) e Equinox Campaign (energia atlética premium). Vibe geral: health‑tech de luxo, científico e minimal, com drama de golden hour e contraste alto para stop‑scroll.

posts.caption:
You might not see them, but they’re everywhere.

They’re part of our everyday environment. They make their way into soil, water, fish, vegetables, and even the air we breathe.

That means they also make their way into us. And once inside, they don’t leave easily. Over time, they gradually build up and chronic exposure to it impacts your energy, mood, hormones, and long-term health.

Most routine bloodwork never checks for them. Mito’s Core Test includes heavy metal testing for mercury so you can uncover what’s silently impacting your health and future.
posts.hookLine: You might not see them, but they’re everywhere.

primary.hookSignal: O texto serifado “This water has metal in it.” em off‑white #F5F4F0, grande e à esquerda sobre o fundo musgo desfocado, contrastando com as gotas cristalinas congeladas e as mãos em concha no lado direito.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo ligeiramente alto (≈30°), mostrando duas mãos humanas em concha no terço direito, recebendo e deixando escorrer água em gotas nítidas. Sujeito principal: mãos de pele quente caramelo, ~30-45 anos (neutro), unhas curtas limpas, textura de pele realista; plano de fundo é gramado desfocado em bokeh orgânico. Iluminação: luz natural difusa de céu nublado com leve key light vinda da direita (5200K), intensidade média, sombras macias; micro highlights especulares nas gotas criando rim light sutil. Paleta: musgo escuro #2F4A35 → sage #6E8B72 (bokeh) → cobre de pele #C4774F → castanha #8E4F34 → highlights d’água #E9F4FF → texto off‑white #F5F4F0. Grading: blacks ligeiramente levantados (+5), contraste moderado, subexposição leve (-0.2), film emulation com grain 35mm 6%, halation suave nos highlights, vignette circular 8%, blur de fundo orgânico. Composição: rule‑of‑thirds; mãos ocupam o terço direito médio-inferior; cascata de água desce ao longo do canto inferior direito; grande espaço negativo no terço esquerdo para tipografia; horizonte de grama sem detalhes. Camera position context: full‑frame, 85mm f/2.2, shutter 1/1000s para congelar gotas, ISO 200, handheld estável. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) "This water has metal in it." — posição: left-center (ocupando dois terços verticais); fonte: Georgia; peso: Semibold; cor: #F5F4F0; tracking: -1%; line-height: 0.98; tamanho: xl; sombra: #000000 20% blur 6px; quebra em 2 linhas após "has"; animação: fade-up 250ms. 2) "Mito" — bottom-right; fonte: Inter; peso: Medium; cor: #F5F4F0; tracking: 0%; tamanho: sm; sem animação. ELEMENTOS GRÁFICOS: nenhum ícone/pill; apenas vignette 8% e grain 6% como camada de textura. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, natural. Referências: Apple Keynote slide (tipografia limpa e respiro), Aesop minimal product (paleta terrosa), Equinox campaign (realismo atlético elegante). Anti‑padrões: Não usar cores neon ou saturação alta; Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; Não aplicar HDR exagerado ou sharpening agressivo; Não centralizar o texto; Não criar aparência sintética de IA nas mãos/água. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp no sujeito, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo from a slightly high angle (~30°). Two cupped human hands on the right third catch and release water; droplets are tack-sharp while the background is grassy bokeh. Lighting: soft overcast daylight, key from right (5200K), medium intensity, soft shadows, gentle rim on droplets. Palette: moss #2F4A35 → sage #6E8B72 (bokeh) → skin copper #C4774F → chestnut #8E4F34 → water highlights #E9F4FF → text off‑white #F5F4F0. Film grade: lightly underexposed (‑0.2), lifted blacks (+5), moderate contrast, 35mm grain 6%, mild halation, 8% vignette, organic background blur. Composition: rule of thirds; hands occupy right mid‑lower third; water streak runs down lower-right; generous negative space on left for type. Camera: full‑frame 85mm f/2.2, 1/1000s, ISO 200, handheld. Overlays: “This water has metal in it.” left‑center, Georgia Semibold, #F5F4F0, tracking ‑1%, LH 0.98, XL, 2 lines (break after “has”), subtle shadow; “Mito” bottom‑right, Inter Medium, #F5F4F0, small. No icons/pills; keep minimal. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple Keynote, Aesop, Equinox. Avoid neon, generic medical icons, HDR/oversharpen, centered text, AI‑synthetic look.
primary.artDirection: Paleta terrosa e premium: musgo #2F4A35, sage #6E8B72, pele cobre #C4774F, castanha #8E4F34, highlights #E9F4FF, tipografia em off‑white #F5F4F0. Tipografia: título em Georgia Semibold (duas linhas, LH 0.98, tracking ‑1%) à esquerda; logotipo “Mito” em Inter Medium no canto inferior direito. Textura com grain 35mm 6%, vignette 8%, halation leve; blacks ligeiramente levantados, subexposição ‑0.2. Anti‑padrões críticos: não usar ícones médicos genéricos; não saturar cores/neon; não centralizar o título (preservar espaço negativo à esquerda). Referências: Apple Keynote (clareza e respiro) + Aesop (paleta terrosa minimal). Vibe: luxury wellness científico — natural, silencioso, com foco nas gotas congeladas e tipografia serena.

posts.caption:
You can eat less and work out more. But if your hormones are out of balance, fat loss will always feel like an endless, uphill battle.

Chronic stress elevates your cortisol which raises blood sugar, cravings, and disrupting sleep. Frequent insulin spikes signal your body to store fat and increase hunger.

So even in a calorie deficit, these hormonal shifts can stall your progress and even higher your risk of insulin resistance, inflammation, and long-term metabolic disease.

Track where your cortisol and insulin levels are at so you can start working with your biology, and not against it.
posts.hookLine: You can eat less and work out more. But if your hormones are out of balance, fat loss will always feel like an endless, uphill battle.

primary.hookSignal: O jato diagonal de blur pêssego‑rosé sobre o bloco de preto absoluto cria um corte dramático que prende o olhar; em seguida, duas frases brancas grandes, alinhadas em colunas opostas, entregam o punchline.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica abstrata com long exposure, vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando véus de cor suaves atravessando a cena em diagonal. Sujeito principal: faixas etéreas como tecido de seda translúcido, em motion blur, varrendo do topo‑direita ao centro‑esquerda, sobre um campo de negativo preto profundo; narrativa de contraste entre caos hormonal (fluxo colorido) e disciplina (tipografia limpa). Iluminação: soft key difusa frontal 4800K, intensidade baixa, highlights sedosos sem hotspots; fill lateral 20% à esquerda; sombras suaves e contínuas, sem edges duros. Paleta: neblina off‑white #ECE9E6 → blush #E9C8CF → pêssego #F5BFA6 → coral queimado #D87967 → mauve #A77C7F, sobre preto rico #0B0C0F; color grading sutil, blacks profundos, leve matte nas altas (+3), sombras com leve ciano. Textura/tratamento: long exposure/ICM (0.5–0.7s), grain de filme 35mm 6%, micro‑vignette 8%, nitidez fina só na tipografia; sem banding. Composição: rule‑of‑thirds; terço superior dominado pelo blur claro; canto inferior‑esquerdo com massa preta para textos; fluxo diagonal conduz o olhar até dois blocos tipográficos ancorados no bottom‑third. Camera position context: full‑frame 50mm f/4, ISO 100, em tripé com pan controlado; shutter 0.6s; captura RAW. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” — posição: bottom-left acima do corpo, fonte Inter Medium, peso Medium, cor #EDEFF2, tracking +2%, line-height 110%, tamanho sm. 2) “Fat loss isn’t just about calories & exercise.” — posição: bottom-left, duas linhas, Inter Regular, peso Regular, cor #F2F4F6, tracking +1%, line-height 120%, tamanho lg. 3) “It’s about your spiked hormones.” — posição: bottom-right, duas linhas alinhadas pela mesma linha de base do bloco esquerdo, Inter Regular, peso Regular, cor #F2F4F6, tracking +1%, line-height 120%, tamanho lg; sem destaques de cor. Elementos gráficos: sem ícones; grid invisível de 12 colunas com safe‑margins 6% nas bordas; baseline dos dois blocos alinhada; nenhuma borda ou box. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, minimalista. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Equinox campaign. Anti‑padrões: Não adicionar logo vetorial; Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não aplicar drop shadows ou glow em texto; Não usar ícones médicos genéricos; Não centralizar todo o texto. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp nas letras, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial abstract long‑exposure photo, top‑down high angle. Subject: silky translucent color veils in motion blur sweeping from top‑right to mid‑left over deep black negative space, symbolizing hormonal chaos vs. disciplined clarity. Lighting: soft key 4800K, low intensity, creamy highlights, 20% side fill left, no hard edges. Palette: off‑white #ECE9E6 → blush #E9C8CF → peach #F5BFA6 → burnt coral #D87967 → mauve #A77C7F over rich black #0B0C0F; subtle grade, deep blacks, slight highlight matte, cool‑cyan in shadows. Texture: ICM 0.5–0.7s, 35mm film grain 6%, micro vignette 8%, crisp text. Composition: rule‑of‑thirds; bright blur fills upper area; black wedge bottom‑left for type; two text blocks aligned on same baseline across bottom third. Camera: full‑frame 50mm f/4, ISO100, tripod pan, shutter 0.6s, RAW. Overlays: “Mito” (bottom‑left, Inter Medium, #EDEFF2, tracking +2%, LH 110%, size sm). Left block: “Fat loss isn’t just about calories & exercise.” (Inter Regular, #F2F4F6, tracking +1%, LH 120%, size lg). Right block: “It’s about your spiked hormones.” (bottom‑right, Inter Regular, same specs). No icons; 12‑col invisible grid, 6% safe margins. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, minimal. Refs: Apple keynote, Aesop, Equinox. Avoid logos, saturation, text shadows, medical icons, centered layout. Maintain photo realism, subtle film grain, high‑res, sharp type.
primary.artDirection: Recrie um fundo abstrato com long exposure: véus suaves em off‑white #ECE9E6, blush #E9C8CF, pêssego #F5BFA6 e coral queimado #D87967 deslizando na diagonal sobre preto #0B0C0F. Tipografia Inter: ‘Mito’ em Medium (cor #EDEFF2), e corpo em Regular, cor #F2F4F6, tracking +1 a +2%, line-height 120%. Dois blocos: esquerda “Fat loss isn’t just about calories & exercise.”; direita “It’s about your spiked hormones.” Alinhe pela mesma linha de base no bottom‑third; mantenha margens internas de 6% e grid invisível 12 colunas. Três anti‑padrões críticos: sem logo vetorial (apenas wordmark tipográfico), sem saturação vibrante, sem sombras ou glow no texto. Referências: Apple keynote slide (hierarquia limpa) e Aesop (minimal, tons neutros). Vibe geral: luxury wellness científico — calmo, preciso, com contraste forte entre blur orgânico e tipografia clínica.

slides.textOverlay:
Fat loss can feel like an endless battle.

Even when you cut calories or workout consistently, you might still not be seeing any results on the scale. This struggle isn't always about willpower or discipline.

Stress and insulin spikes play a huge role in how your body processes food, stores fat and regulates hunger. Ignoring them can make fat loss nearly impossible.

slides.subject: The physiological mechanisms by which high cortisol (stress) impedes fat loss, even in a calorie deficit.
slides.textOverlay:
How cortisol blocks fat loss.
Stress isn't just mental. It's a biological disruptor. And when cortisol stays high, it can:
1 Raise blood sugar
2 Stimulates appetite + sugar cravings
3 Disrupts sleep
So even if you're in a calorie deficit, stress can rewire your physiology to fight against fat loss.

slides.subject: The role of insulin in fat storage and its metabolic effects, explaining why insulin spikes lead to storing more fat.
slides.textOverlay:
Insulin: The Hidden Fat Storage Signal

Insulin moves glucose into your cells. But when spikes happen too often (from sugar + refined carbs), your body gets one clear message: store more fat.

1 Encourages fat storage
2 Reduces fat breakdown
3 Increases hunger
4 Lowers energy use

This is why two people can eat the same calories but see different results. It depends on how their bodies process glucose.

Signs this could be happening to you.

Chronic stress + poor blood sugar control
often show up before weight gain is obvious.
Watch for:

1   Fatigue, even after sleeping
2   Intense sugar or carb cravings
3   Frequent headaches or brain fog
4   Bloating or stomach pain
5   Fluctuating appetite/weight

These red flags suggest your
metabolism is under strain and blood
sugar balance is being disrupted.

slides.subject: The serious health consequences of stalled fat loss and hormonal imbalance, including insulin resistance, Type 2 Diabetes, systemic inflammation, cardiovascular disease, and long-term metabolic damage.
slides.textOverlay:
Why this matters?
It's not just about stalled fat loss. Left unchecked, the impact gets more serious:
Persistent insulin spikes -> Insulin resistance Type 2 Diabetes
Elevated cortisol -> Systemic inflammation Cardiovascular disease
Metabolic damage -> Harder to lose fat over time
What begins as a plateau can evolve into long-term chronic health conditions without intervention.

posts.caption:
Constant fatigue is one of the most common, and overlooked, signs that your health may be off balance. The reason isn’t always obvious, but your blood work can explain why.

Six key biomarkers, including cortisol, testosterone, CRP, vitamin D, HbA1c, and iron, can reveal why your energy is chronically low and what steps to take next.

Uncover the silent signals your body’s been trying to tell you.

primary.hookSignal: O stop‑scroll vem do retrato desfocado em tons âmbar‑sálvia que ocupa o quadro e cria sensação de sonolência, combinado ao headline branco, centralizado, “6 Biomarkers Can Tell You Why You’re Waking Up Groggy”. primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica em retrato close-up, eye-level, mostrando uma pessoa jovem de pele clara e cabelo loiro-platinado médio, ~20 e poucos anos, olhar baixo para a esquerda, em pose introspectiva, com motion blur artístico sugerindo cansaço matinal. Iluminação: key light quente lateral direita a 45° (golden hour), 4200K, intensidade média; fill suave da esquerda 10% com rebatedor 5200K; leve rim backlight âmbar 15% separando do fundo; sombras macias, caindo para verdes frios. Paleta: verde-sálvia acinzentado #8CA099 → musgo pálido #C9D2C7 nas sombras; pêssego difuso #EAC39A → âmbar #D79A57 → marrom sépia #5A4338 nos highlights; pretos levantados #1B1B1B; textos em off-white #F5F7F8. Grading: filmic com blacks lifted, contraste baixo, matiz ciano nas sombras, highlight halation dourado. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, motion blur direcional 25–30% (1/10s), leve bloom nos highlights, vignette orgânico -10%, lens diffusion (CineBloom 10%). Composição: sujeito ocupa terço direito superior, cabeça cortada no topo; grande negativo no terço esquerdo para respiro tipográfico; fundo é parede lisa com gradiente sage→âmbar; foreground sem objetos. Camera position context: full-frame 50mm f/1.4, 1/10s, ISO 200, handheld vertical; foco suave no plano dos olhos porém arrastado pelo movimento; bokeh cremoso. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” — top center, fonte SF Pro Display, Medium, #FFFFFF, tracking +20, line-height 100%, tamanho sm. 2) “6 Biomarkers Can Tell You Why You’re Waking Up Groggy” — mid-center levemente acima do meio, Inter Regular, #FFFFFF, tracking +10, line-height 120%, tamanho lg; quebra em 2 linhas equilibradas. 3) “Know the feeling all too well?” — bottom-center, Inter Regular, #FFFFFF, tracking +10, line-height 120%, tamanho md. Sob todos os textos, scrim sutil linear preto #000000 a 18% de opacidade, 20px de padding ótico (sem caixas visíveis). Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone; apenas vignette radial suave para contraste de leitura. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, onírico, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide, Aesop minimal product, Calvin Klein editorial. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo extra. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não usar ícones médicos genéricos. Não criar aparência de IA. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico com motion blur intencional, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, look minimalista e sofisticado.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post. Cinematic editorial close-up portrait at eye level: a young, fair-skinned person with medium platinum-blond hair, gaze down-left, contemplative, with artistic motion blur conveying morning fatigue. Lighting: warm right-side key at 45°, 4200K medium; soft left fill 10% at 5200K; subtle amber rim 15%; soft shadows, cool-green bias. Palette: sage-gray #8CA099 → pale moss #C9D2C7 in shadows; peach #EAC39A → amber #D79A57 → sepia #5A4338 in highlights; lifted blacks #1B1B1B; text off-white #F5F7F8. Film grading: lifted blacks, low contrast, cyan shadows, warm halation. Texture: 35mm grain 5%, directional motion blur 25–30% (1/10s), gentle bloom, organic vignette -10%, cine diffusion. Composition: subject on upper-right third; negative space on left; soft wall gradient background sage→amber. Camera: full-frame 50mm f/1.4, 1/10s, ISO200, handheld vertical; shallow DOF with smear. Overlays: top-center “Mito” (SF Pro Display Medium, #FFFFFF, tracking +20, size sm); mid-center “6 Biomarkers Can Tell You Why You’re Waking Up Groggy” (Inter Regular, #FFFFFF, tracking +10, size lg, 2 lines); bottom-center “Know the feeling all too well?” (Inter Regular, #FFFFFF, size md). Add subtle black scrim 18% behind text; no icons. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote, Aesop minimal, Calvin Klein editorial. Avoid saturated colors, generic medical icons, AI look, ornate fonts, extra logos. Keep realistic, minimal, high-res.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: verde‑sálvia #8CA099 e musgo pálido #C9D2C7 nas sombras; pêssego #EAC39A, âmbar #D79A57 e sépia #5A4338 nos highlights; pretos levantados #1B1B1B; textos #F5F7F8. Tipografia: usar Inter para corpo (Regular/Medium, tracking +10) e SF Pro Display para a marca “Mito” (Medium, tracking +20). Todos em branco puro ou off‑white; alinhamento central; line-height 120%. Criar retrato close-up com motion blur intencional (1/10s), luz lateral quente 4200K e fill frio mínimo, fundo com gradiente sage→âmbar. Aplicar grain 35mm 5%, bloom suave e vignette orgânico. Anti‑padrões críticos: não saturar cores, não inserir ícones médicos genéricos, não criar aparência “AI glossy”. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica limpa) e Aesop (paleta terrosa premium). Vibe: “luxury wellness científico e contemplativo”, minimal, editorial, com contraste entre texto nítido e retrato onírico.

slides.subject: Cortisol and its role in stress and morning energy
slides.textOverlay:
■ CORTISOL
Your body's main "stress responder". It helps us get going in the mornings where a little boost in cortisol is normal. But if you're constantly stressed, your cortisol is all over the place, ultimately wearing your body out.

slides.subject: Testosterone's role in energy, muscle strength, and its relation to fatigue and cortisol levels.
slides.textOverlay:
■ TESTOSTERONE

While often linked to men, testosterone still plays a role in energy and muscle strength for everyone. If your levels dip, you might feel more fatigued. When your cortisol is always high and your testosterone level is low, it could be a sign that your body is under a lot of strain.

slides.subject: abstract blurred shapes
slides.textOverlay:
■ C-REACTIVE PROTEIN (CRP)

CRP is a marker that goes up when there's inflammation in your body. High levels of inflammation don't tell us exactly what is causing the problem, but they are a sign that a health issue might be making you feel tired.

■ VITAMIN D
You've probably heard Vitamin D called the "sunshine vitamin" because our bodies make it when our skin gets some sun. But lots of people, especially those in places with less sun or who are indoors a lot, don't get enough of it.

slides.textOverlay:
■ HBA1C
If your blood sugar is often too high, like with prediabetes or diabetes, your body struggles to use that sugar for energy, leaving you feeling tired. Plus, your body has to work extra hard to handle high blood sugar, which wears you out. A low blood sugar also makes you feel weak and dizzy.

slides.subject: Iron's role in the body and iron deficiency anemia
slides.textOverlay:
- IRON
Iron is an important mineral that transports
oxygen all around your body. It's a big part of
hemoglobin, a protein in red blood cells that
carries oxygen from oxygen from your lungs to your
tissues.

When your iron levels drop too low, your
body struggles to make enough healthy red
blood cells. This leads to a condition known
as iron deficiency anemia. A common sign
of this is feeling really tired or weak.

posts.caption:
Can stress really change your biology?
The answer is yes and the hormone at the center of it is cortisol.

When balanced, cortisol helps regulate energy, sleep, blood sugar, and recovery. But when it’s chronically high, it can drive weight gain, anxiety, cravings, poor sleep, and even accelerate aging.

Subtle cortisol changes often happens years before bigger health problems appear so it’s important to track your levels and optimize your stress response before symptoms spiral later on.
posts.hookLine: Can stress really change your biology?

primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial macro-científica vista de cima, ângulo top-down, mostrando um padrão orgânico radial que remete a tecido/camada dérmica com veios translúcidos e centro levemente off-center inferior. Sujeito principal: macro abstrata biomédica em close extremo, parecendo uma explosão vascular rosada, textura molhada e sem ruído visual, servindo de canvas para tipografia hero. Iluminação: soft dome difusa overhead, key suave central a 4800K, intensidade 35%, fill amplo 20%, leve rim light nas ramificações; sombras suaves, sem hotspots; bloom sutil 6%. Paleta: blush #F2E8E5 → pêssego #F5C9B3 → coral-rose #D97A6C → terracotta #B76459, highlights perolados #F7F5F3; linhas/guias #D8D6D1; texto branco puro #FFFFFF. Grading: low contrast, blacks ligeiramente lifted, vibração reduzida -10, dehaze -5. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, leve vignette 8%, clarity -10, micro-contraste orgânico; zero banding. Composição: centro radial no terço inferior-central; amplo negative space no terço superior e lado esquerdo para texto; rule-of-thirds; foreground é a malha de veios; background é o mesmo padrão desfocado suave. Camera position context: full-frame, 100mm macro f/5.6, ISO 200, 1/125, tripé, captura RAW, como still editorial científico. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) "Mito" — top-center, fonte Inter Medium, peso Medium, cor #F2F2F2 (90%), tracking +20, line-height 100%, tamanho sm, fade-in 250ms. 2) "Cortisol" — center-left (eixo médio horizontal, levemente acima do centro), Times New Roman Regular, peso Regular, cor #FFFFFF, tracking +5, line-height 100%, tamanho xl, fade-up 300ms. 3) "Stressed? Gaining weight? Trouble sleeping?\nFeeling overwhelmed & exhausted?" — mid-left abaixo do título, Inter Regular, peso Regular, cor #ECECEC (85%), tracking +10, line-height 125%, tamanho md, fade-up 350ms. 4) "The stress hormone that shapes your energy, mood, metabolism, and aging" — bottom-third left, Inter Regular, cor #EAEAEA (85%), tracking +10, line-height 120%, tamanho sm; hairline à direita 1px, 25% da largura, cor #D8D6D1 (50%). Elementos gráficos: apenas a hairline descritiva; sem ícones; sem boxes. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, calmo, contemplativo, sofisticado, orgânico, minimalista. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo extra; Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não aplicar ícones médicos genéricos; Não usar sombras duras ou drop shadows; Não criar aparência de IA/3D. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução 8K, nítido, composição minimalista e sofisticada.

Trouble sleeping?\nFeeling overwhelmed & exhausted?" mid-left under title, Inter Regular, #ECECEC, size md, LH 125%. 4) "The stress hormone that shapes your energy, mood, metabolism, and aging" bottom-left, Inter Regular, #EAEAEA, size sm; 1px hairline to the right, 25% width, #D8D6D1 (50%). primary.artDirection: Base cromática orgânica e calma: blush #F2E8E5, pêssego #F5C9B3, coral-rose #D97A6C, terracotta #B76459, highlights perolados #F7F5F3, linha guia #D8D6D1, texto #FFFFFF. Tipografia: Título “Cortisol” em Times New Roman Regular (ou Canela alternativa) branco, tracking +5. Corpo e microcopy em Inter Regular/Medium, branco suave (#ECECEC–#EAEAEA, 85–90% opacidade), tracking +10, line-height 120–125%. Hierarquia: logo “Mito” pequeno top-center; título xl center-left; perguntas em 2 blocos logo abaixo; descrição pequena no bottom-left com hairline 1px a partir do baseline para a direita. Três anti-padrões críticos: 1) nada de ícones médicos genéricos ou pictogramas; 2) evitar saturação alta/neon e sombras duras; 3) não usar drop shadows ou efeitos 3D/IA. Referências: Apple keynote (limpo, hierarquia tipográfica) e Aesop (minimalismo sensorial/texturas orgânicas). slides.subject: Cortisol hormone, its functions, and effects of imbalance
slides.textOverlay:
Cortisol is your body's main stress hormone, released by the adrenal glands. It helps regulates blood sugar & metabolism, inflammation & immune response, and even how your body stores fat.

Healthy cortisol naturally rises in the morning (to wake you up) and lowers at night (to help you sleep).

Small, daily fluctuations are normal. But chronic imbalance can disrupt nearly every system.
slides.style: Modern, clean, biological illustration, digital

Place clean, white sans-serif text on the left side, explaining cortisol's role.

slides.composition: The slide features a central glowing point from which abstract, organic, vein-like structures radiate outwards. White text is overlaid on the left and center, divided into two main bulleted lists.
slides.subject: Symptoms of cortisol imbalance (too high and too low)
slides.textOverlay:
Cortisol is too high:
1 Increased cravings (sugar/carbs)
2 Anxiety, irritability, or brain fog
3 Abdominal weight gain
4 Poor sleep
5 Suppressed immune system
6 Slow recovery

Cortisol is too low:
1 Constant fatigue
2 Low motivation or depression
3 Dizziness/lightheadedness
4 Low blood pressure

slides.subject: The systemic effects of chronic stress and elevated cortisol on the human body, leading to accelerated biological aging.
slides.textOverlay:
When stress never lets up, cortisol stays elevated and the effects ripple through your body:

1 Metabolic: insulin resistance, diabetes risk

2 Cardiovascular: hypertension, heart disease

3 Cognitive: memory issues, brain aging

4 Hormonal: disrupted thyroid, sex hormones, cycles

5 Immune: higher inflammation, slower healing

Chronic imbalance accelerates your biological aging.

slides.subject: Cortisol levels and their impact on health, including 'fight or flight' mode, metabolism, hormones, and early disease warnings.
slides.textOverlay:
Cortisol shifts often show up years before disease. Tracking your levels can reveal:

1 If your body is stuck in “fight or flight” mode
Chronic stress keeps cortisol elevated even when the trigger is gone, straining your nervous system.

2 How stress is impacting your metabolism, energy, and hormones
High cortisol drives belly fat, cravings, and hormone imbalances that ripple through your thyroid, insulin, and reproductive systems.

3 Early warning signs of burnout or metabolic disease
Long before diabetes, heart disease, or adrenal fatigue appear, cortisol patterns flag underlying stress on your body.

slides.composition: A numbered list of five points providing practical advice, with a main title. The text is left-aligned over an abstract, organic background.
slides.subject: Cortisol optimization and stress management tips
slides.textOverlay:
Optimize Your Cortisol By:
1 Prioritize quality sleep & consistent routines
Go to bed/wake up at the same time, reduce late-night screen exposure, and create a wind-down ritual
2 Eat whole foods + protein
Frequent spikes and crashes push cortisol higher. Focus on fiber, protein, and slow carbs to balance your blood sugar.
3 Regular exercise
Moderate strength + cardio lowers stress hormones. Excessive high-intensity can do the opposite.
4 Stress reduction practices
Daily breathwork, meditation, journaling, or time outdoors help reset your nervous system.
5 Test and track
Monitoring cortisol levels over time shows whether lifestyle changes are working and catches hidden imbalances early.

primary.hookSignal: O contorno da sombra teal profundo do rosto, gigantesca e nítida, recortada sobre o papel cru, cria um shape gráfico que domina a metade esquerda. Em contraste, o serifado grande “Just ten minutes” pousa exatamente sobre essa sombra, gerando stop‑scroll imediato.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica close-up lateral, ângulo de câmera levemente acima (~15°), mostrando o perfil direito de uma mulher ~30-35, pele bronze pêssego, olhos fechados, expressão serena; sua silhueta projeta uma sombra grande na parede texturizada à esquerda, criando espaço negativo para tipografia. Iluminação: key light dura tipo sunlight a 45° vinda da direita, 3600–3800K (warm tungsten/golden hour), intensidade alta com especularidade na pele; fill quase zero (ratio 1:6), sombras definidas; leve rim light de retorno do fundo (4200K) só para separar a mandíbula. Paleta: papel cru #E8D8C8; sombra teal profundo #2D4956; pele pêssego #F2C7A6 → caramelo #B8755D → terracotta #8C4C3E; branco suave do texto #F4F2EC; micro manchas sépia #C9A889. Film grading: blacks levemente lifted, curva S suave, subexposto −0.2 EV. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 8–10%, halation sutil nas highlights, micro-sharpen nos poros, blur cinematográfico orgânico nos cantos (vignette suave −0.3). Composição: rule-of-thirds; rosto ocupa terço direito vertical, queixo no terço inferior; grande sombra orgânica ocupa metade esquerda (background), servindo de placa para o texto; negative space amplo no topo e no canto inferior esquerdo; profundidade rasa destacando pele. Camera position context: full-frame 85mm f/2.8, ISO 200, 1/200s, em tripé; como editorial de beauty. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) "Mito" — posição top-left a 6% das bordas; fonte SF Pro Text; peso Medium; cor #F4F2EC; tracking +20; line-height 1.0; tamanho sm; sem animação. 2) "Just ten\nminutes" — left-center (meio-esquerda) alinhado verticalmente sobre a sombra; fonte Canela Regular (ou Georgia como fallback); peso Regular; cor #F4F2EC; tracking 0; line-height 1.06; tamanho xl; quebra forçada após "ten". 3) "& you can finally be\nfree from ..." — bottom-right, a 8% do rodapé e 10% da borda direita sob a linha do queixo; fonte Canela Regular; peso Regular; cor #F4F2EC; tracking 0; line-height 1.08; tamanho md. Elementos gráficos: sem ícones; somente safe area invisível 6% e leve overlay de ruído fino 5% para coesão. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, sensorial. Referências: Apple keynote slide (tipografia/white space); Aesop minimal; Calvin Klein editorial; Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo extra; Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; Não criar aparência de IA/plástico; Não aplicar drop shadows na tipografia. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp nas áreas de pele, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial beauty close-up, slight high angle (~15°), showing the right side profile of a serene woman, eyes closed, with a large crisp shadow of her face cast on a textured wall to the left. Lighting: hard key at 45° from camera-right, 3600–3800K, high intensity with specular skin; near-zero fill (1:6); faint rim from background 4200K. Palette: parchment #E8D8C8; deep teal shadow #2D4956; skin peach #F2C7A6 → caramel #B8755D → terracotta #8C4C3E; off-white text #F4F2EC; speckles #C9A889. Film grade: slightly lifted blacks, soft S-curve, −0.2 EV. Texture: 35mm film grain 8–10%, subtle halation, organic vignette −0.3. Composition: rule-of-thirds; face on right third, chin near lower third; large left-side shadow as negative space for type; shallow DOF. Camera: full-frame 85mm f/2.8, ISO 200, 1/200s, tripod. Overlays: “Mito” top-left (SF Pro Text Medium, #F4F2EC, sm); “Just ten\nminutes” center-left stacked (Canela Regular, #F4F2EC, xl); “& you can finally be\nfree from ...” bottom-right (Canela Regular, #F4F2EC, md). No icons, just 6% safe margins and fine noise overlay. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote minimal type; Aesop product minimal; Calvin Klein editorial; Equinox campaign. Avoid saturated colors, generic medical icons, AI-ish plastic skin, or drop shadows.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: base papel cru #E8D8C8 com manchas #C9A889; sombra teal #2D4956; pele pêssego #F2C7A6 a caramelo #B8755D; tipografia em off‑white #F4F2EC. Tipografia: wordmark pequeno “Mito” em SF Pro Text Medium; títulos e frases em Canela Regular (ou Georgia/Times como fallback), tracking neutro, line-height compacto. Hierarquia: título "Just ten minutes" em xl, empilhado; apoio “& you can finally be free from ...” em md no canto inferior direito. Três anti‑padrões críticos: sem ícones ou pictogramas médicos; sem saturação vibrante; sem sombras artificiais na tipografia (nem glow). Referências: Apple keynote (espaço em branco e clareza), Aesop (minimalismo texturizado). Vibe: luxo wellness científico—pele real com brilho saudável, sombra gráfica bold, composição minimal e contemplativa que parece anúncio de fragrância, porém com mensagem health-tech.

primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando composição premium de dois smartphones sobre fundo preto profundo com headline serifada em branco no topo. Sujeito principal: dois smartphones premium; o traseiro em alumínio cobre acetinado (canto superior com trio de lentes grandes) e o frontal exibindo a UI do app Mito Health (dashboard de Biological age), sem mãos, estética clean e luxo tech. Iluminação: key light soft 45° à esquerda, 5200K, intensidade 70%; fill 25% à direita 5400K; rim light sutil 10% por trás para recorte metálico; sombras macias, sem hotspots; polarizer para controlar reflexos. Paleta: preto antracite #0E0F10; branco puro #FFFFFF; cinza texto #B7BDC6; cobre metálico #D9722F → âmbar #C46028; aço polido #E5E7EB; UI off-white #F9FAFB; verde card #1FAE78 → #3BC38E; acento azul #3A8DFF. Grading: contraste S-curve suave, blacks verdadeiros, midtones levemente levantados, lifted blacks +5, highlights controlados. Textura/tratamento: superfícies metálicas glossy, film grain 35mm 3%, vignette -10, micro-bloom 2% nas highlights, nitidez alta. Composição: rule-of-thirds; metade superior é negative space com tipografia; metade inferior mostra os aparelhos sobrepostos: o traseiro ocupa bottom-left, rotacionado +4°; o frontal centralizado ligeiramente à direita, sobrepondo 40% o traseiro; margem de segurança 6% nas bordas. Camera position context: captura em estúdio, como se por tripé alto, 85mm f/5.6, ISO 100, shutter 1/125, DOF média para ambos nítidos. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “[GIVEAWAY CLOSED]” em top-center, Inter Medium, cor #B7BDC6 com capsule borda #2A2B2E, tracking +4, tamanho sm; 2) “Mito” top-center acima do título, SF Pro Display Medium, #FFFFFF, size sm; 3) “Win the New iPhone 17 Pro” center-top, New York Serif Bold, #FFFFFF, tracking 0, line-height 1.1, size xl; 4) “Next-generation tech meets next-generation health.” mid-top center, SF Pro Text Regular, #B7BDC6, size md. Na tela do telefone: “Mito” top-left, SF Pro Display Semibold #0B0D0E; pill “Give $50, get $50” top-right, cápsula #111214 com texto #FFFFFF (size xs); badge “Latest results” mid-right, cápsula #FFFFFF com ícone ponto azul #3A8DFF e texto #1E293B; título “Your health” top-left #0B0D0E; card verde “Biological age” com gauge branco 2px; número “15” center, SF Pro Display Bold #FFFFFF size lg; subtítulo “6.3 years younger” abaixo em #E6FFF4 80%; parágrafo em #E6FFF4 70%; botão “Share” capsule #EEF2F7 com ícone share #475569. Elementos gráficos: notch preto superior; lentes com anéis metálicos; sombras soft drop 12px #000000 30% sob os devices. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, clínico, aspiracional, high-tech. Referências: Apple Keynote slide; Aesop minimal product. Anti-padrões: não usar neon saturado; não aplicar sombras duras; não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; não adicionar reflexos especulares exagerados; não incluir mãos/mockups. Style summary: realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, edges sharp, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial product shot from a high overhead angle, showing two premium smartphones on deep black. Main subject: copper satin aluminum phone (rear, triple lenses) overlapped by a front-facing phone with the Mito Health app (Biological age card). Lighting: soft key 45° left 5200K 70%, fill 25% right 5400K, subtle rim 10% from behind; soft shadows, controlled highlights. Palette: black #0E0F10, white #FFFFFF, gray #B7BDC6, copper #D9722F → #C46028, steel #E5E7EB, UI off-white #F9FAFB, green #1FAE78 → #3BC38E, accent blue #3A8DFF. Treatment: 35mm grain 3%, mild vignette, slight bloom 2%, crisp edges. Composition: top half negative space for typography; bottom half devices overlapped (rear bottom-left rotated +4°, front slightly right of center). Camera: studio tripod, 85mm, f/5.6, ISO100, 1/125, medium DOF. Overlays: “[GIVEAWAY CLOSED]” small capsule top-center (#B7BDC6, border #2A2B2E); “Mito” small above; headline “Win the New iPhone 17 Pro” large serif; subhead “Next-generation tech meets next-generation health.” medium gray center. On-screen UI: “Mito” top-left; pill “Give $50, get $50” black #111214; badge “Latest results” white with blue dot #3A8DFF; title “Your health”; green card with white arc; number “15” large white; “6.3 years younger”; body copy; “Share” button #EEF2F7. Mood: clean, premium, clinical, tech-luxury. References: Apple Keynote, Aesop. Keep realistic, minimal, high-res.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: preto antracite #0E0F10 como base; branco #FFFFFF para tipografia principal; cinza #B7BDC6 para subhead; cobre #D9722F → #C46028 nos metais; UI em off‑white #F9FAFB com verde #1FAE78 → #3BC38E e azul de acento #3A8DFF. Tipografia: headline em New York Serif Bold (ou Georgia Bold), branco #FFFFFF; subhead e microcopy em SF Pro Text/Display Regular–Medium, cinza #B7BDC6; badge “[GIVEAWAY CLOSED]” em Inter Medium, cinza #B7BDC6 dentro de cápsula com borda #2A2B2E. Layout: metade superior para tipografia alinhada ao centro; metade inferior com dois devices sobrepostos (traseiro cobre ligeiro ângulo; frontal central mostrando a tela do app Mito). Três anti‑padrões críticos: evitar cores neon/oversaturated; não usar sombras duras ou glow artificial; não inserir ícones médicos clichê (estetoscópio, cruz). Referências: Apple Keynote (hierarquia tipográfica e negative space) e Aesop (minimalismo e materialidade premium). Vibe geral: luxo científico e clínico, tech de próxima geração com serenidade editorial.

posts.caption:
Having abnormally high testosterone levels without TRT is something worth paying attention to, but also not talked about much. 

We mostly hear about low testosterone tracing back to fatigue, low drive, and mood dips. But high testosterone can be just as concerning as it increases your risk of prostate cancer, stroke, infertility, and other high-risk conditions.

Therefore, it’s worthwhile to check up on your symptoms of irritability, sleep issues, acne and see if it traces back to high testosterone levels which is only traceable through bloodwork.
posts.hookLine: Having abnormally high testosterone levels without TRT is something worth paying attention to, but also not talked about much.

primary.prompt: 1. Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica com panning lateral, ângulo de câmera na altura do peito, mostrando um ciclista em movimento cortando uma estrada sombreada por árvores. 2. Sujeito principal: homem ciclista anônimo, ~35 anos, capacete preto fosco, óculos esportivos envolventes, jersey de ciclismo bege texturizado, mãos firmes no guidão; expressão neutra, corpo parcialmente borrado pelo motion blur, narrativa de performance e biomarcadores fora da curva. 3. Iluminação: golden hour filtrada por folhagem, key light suave lateral esquerda a 5200K, fill natural ambiente 30%, rim light quente no contorno do capacete; sombras orgânicas médias, contraste moderado. 4. Paleta: verde-escuro da mata #0F2A1F → verde denso #1E4738 → bege jersey #C6AD91 → pele pêssego #F2C7A4 → preto carvão #0B0C0D → branco off #F6F7F8; film grading com shadows ligeiramente teal #1B3E3A, highlights quentes; blacks levantados em 8%. 5. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, leve subexposição -0.2EV, blur de movimento orgânico (sem artefatos IA), vignette suave -10, nitidez seletiva nos óculos/guia do guidão. 6. Composição: rule-of-thirds; ciclista ocupa o terço esquerdo-médio; fundo de árvores em streaks diagonais à direita; guidão cruza a base; grande área negativa no terço inferior para tipografia; logo pequeno no topo-esquerda; label técnico no topo-direita. 7. Camera position context: mirrorless full-frame, 50mm f/2.0, 1/15s com panning esquerdo→direito, ISO 100, polarizer leve; distância curta para close dinâmico; proporção 4:5. 8. Texto/overlays: "Mito" (top-left, SF Pro Display Bold, branco #FFFFFF, tracking +2%, tamanho sm); "HERE'S THE SCIENCE" (top-right, SF Mono Regular, #E6ECE9, tracking +6%, tamanho xs); "Testosterone is high. But not on TRT?" (bottom-center, Inter Medium, branco #FFFFFF, line-height 1.1, tracking +1%, tamanho xl; destaque "TRT" em Inter Bold). 9. Elementos gráficos: gradiente linear preto #000000 45% → 0% do bottom 30% para cima; safe margins de 64px invisíveis; sem boxes, sem ícones; micro grão overlay 3% para unificar tipografia ao fundo. 10. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, atlético, científico, enérgico, sofisticado, minimal. 11. Referências: Apple keynote slide (hierarquia tipográfica), Equinox campaign (atletismo de luxo), Rapha editorial (estética cycling). 12. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores vibrantes/neon; Não aplicar drop shadows pesadas em texto; Não usar ícones médicos genéricos; Não centralizar tudo; Não congelar o movimento (manter motion blur elegante). 13. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, sharp seletivo, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo with side panning, chest-height angle, showing a moving cyclist on a tree-lined road. Subject: anonymous male cyclist ~35, matte black helmet, wraparound shades, beige textured jersey, firm hands on bars; body motion-blurred for performance narrative. Lighting: golden hour through foliage, soft key left at 5200K, ambient fill 30%, warm rim; medium natural shadows. Palette: #0F2A1F → #1E4738 greens, jersey beige #C6AD91, skin peach #F2C7A4, charcoal #0B0C0D, off-white #F6F7F8; teal shadows #1B3E3A, warm highlights, lifted blacks 8%. Texture: 35mm film grain 5%, -0.2EV, organic motion blur, subtle vignette, selective sharpness on glasses/bar. Composition: rule-of-thirds; rider left-mid, streaked forest right, handlebar across bottom, negative space for type; small logo top-left, technical label top-right. Camera: full-frame 50mm f/2, 1/15s panning L→R, ISO100, polarizer. Overlays: "Mito" top-left (SF Pro Display Bold, #FFFFFF, sm), "HERE'S THE SCIENCE" top-right (SF Mono Regular, #E6ECE9, xs), "Testosterone is high. But not on TRT?" bottom-center (Inter Medium, #FFFFFF, xl; "TRT" Bold). Graphics: bottom 30% black gradient #000 45%→0, invisible 64px safe margins. Mood: clean, premium, athletic, scientific, minimal. References: Apple keynote, Equinox, Rapha. No neon, no heavy shadows, no generic medical icons, keep elegant motion blur.
primary.artDirection: Recrie um close dinâmico de ciclista com panning e motion blur elegante. Paleta: verdes #0F2A1F e #1E4738 no fundo, bege jersey #C6AD91, pele #F2C7A4, carvão #0B0C0D, texto #FFFFFF/#E6ECE9. Grading com sombras teal #1B3E3A e blacks levantados 8%. Tipografia: headline Inter Medium/Bold em branco (tracking +1%, LH 1.1), label técnico SF Mono Regular em #E6ECE9 (tracking +6%), marca "Mito" em SF Pro Display Bold branco pequeno. Aplique gradiente preto 45% no bottom 30% para legibilidade, grain 35mm 5%, subexposição leve. Três anti-padrões críticos: sem neon/saturação alta; sem drop shadows pesadas; sem ícones médicos genéricos. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia limpa) e Equinox campaign (luxo atlético); como terceira inspiração, Rapha editorial para autenticidade do ciclismo. Vibe geral em 1 frase: ciência de performance premium apresentada com energia contida, minimalista e sofisticada.

slides.subject: The risks associated with high testosterone levels, challenging the common misconception that only low levels are problematic, and suggesting potential underlying health issues.
slides.textOverlay:
Mito
HIGH TESTOSTERONE RISKS
SHOULDN'T I ONLY WORRY IF MY TESTOSTERONE LEVELS ARE LOW?
Low testosterone gets most of the attention, but high testosterone can be just as concerning. Elevated levels are often a sign that something deeper is going on, like thyroid dysfunction, adrenal or testicular tumors, or hormone resistance.
So no. High testosterone isn't always a win. It's your body signaling that something deserves a closer look.

primary.hookSignal: O contraste do título serifado “Back To School, Back To You” em branco #F2F2F2, perfeitamente nítido e central no topo, contra o fundo com motion blur da criança correndo, cria um stop‑scroll imediato. O texto estático ‘paira’ sobre a cena quente de golden hour, destacando-se do bosque escuro.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de trás, ângulo levemente alto, mostrando uma criança de 6–8 anos com cabelos castanho‑claro médios, correndo com braços abertos num campo, cabelo e vestido esvoaçando em motion blur, sugerindo energia do back-to-school. Iluminação golden hour com rim light suave vindo de trás‑lado direito, key light natural difusa, 4800K, intensidade média, sombras longas e macias caindo à esquerda. Paleta: verde‑floresta #0E1B12 → olive #6F7754 → sage #9CAA7B no gramado; bege‑areia do vestido #C8BA9A; pele quente #D9B79B; tipografia branca #F2F2F2; vignette escuro #0B0B0B a 20%. Grading: look Kodak Portra 400, levemente subexposto (-0,2), blacks lift 8%, contraste baixo‑médio. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, motion blur de panning ~25px, leve bloom no highlight do cabelo, blur cinematográfico orgânico no fundo. Composição: regra dos terços; linha do bosque ocupando o terço superior escuro; sujeito central‑esquerda no terço inferior; grande negative space no topo para headline; fundo homogêneo desfocado (bokeh suave) separando sujeito. Camera position context: full‑frame 50mm f/2.0, 1/60s, ISO 100, panning acompanhando a criança; handheld estável. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) "Back To School,\nBack To You" — posição top‑center; fonte Times New Roman; peso Semibold; cor #F2F2F2; tracking +2; line-height 110%; tamanho xl; sem animação; quebra de linha após vírgula. 2) "You make sure they’re ready for school...\nbut what about you?" — posição bottom‑third center; fonte SF Pro Text; peso Regular; cor #F2F2F2 com sombra #000000 a 25% blur 6; tracking 0; line-height 120%; tamanho md. Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone, nenhum box, sem logo; apenas vignette suave radial 20% para legibilidade. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, nostálgico, caloroso, humano, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide (tipografia clara sobre fundo escuro suave), Aesop minimal (paleta terrosa), Calvin Klein editorial (motion blur elegante), Equinox campaign (energia atlética refinada). Anti‑padrões: Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não adicionar logo; Não inserir ícones médicos; Não usar sombras duras; Não criar aparência de IA. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, nítido no texto, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo from behind, slightly high angle, a 6–8yo child with medium light‑brown hair running with arms wide across a field, dress and hair in motion blur. Golden hour rim light from back‑right, soft natural key, 4800K, medium intensity, long soft shadows. Palette: forest #0E1B12, olive #6F7754, sage #9CAA7B grass; sand‑beige dress #C8BA9A; warm skin #D9B79B; type #F2F2F2; vignette #0B0B0B 20%. Film grade: Kodak Portra‑style, slightly underexposed (‑0.2), lifted blacks 8%, low‑medium contrast. Texture: 35mm grain 5%, panning motion blur ~25px, gentle highlight bloom, organic cinematic blur. Composition: rule‑of‑thirds; dark tree line top third; subject center‑left bottom third; generous top negative space for headline; smooth bokeh background. Camera: full‑frame 50mm f/2.0, 1/60s, ISO100, handheld panning. Overlays: 1) "Back To School,\nBack To You" top‑center, Times New Roman Semibold, #F2F2F2, tracking +2, LH 110%, size XL. 2) "You make sure they’re ready for school...\nbut what about you?" bottom‑third center, SF Pro Text Regular, #F2F2F2 with #000000 25% shadow blur 6, LH 120%, size M. No icons, no logo; subtle radial vignette. Mood: clean, premium, nostalgic, contemplative. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal; Calvin Klein editorial; Equinox energy. Keep realistic, minimal, high‑res.
primary.artDirection: Paleta terrosa e premium: verde‑floresta #0E1B12, olive #6F7754, sage #9CAA7B, areia #C8BA9A, pele quente #D9B79B, tipografia branca #F2F2F2, vignette #0B0B0B 20%. Iluminação golden hour 4800K com rim light atrás‑direita. Grading Kodak Portra‑like, -0,2 EV, blacks lift 8%, contraste baixo‑médio. Tipografia: headline em Times New Roman Semibold branco (#F2F2F2), tracking +2, line-height 110%, quebra em duas linhas; subcopy em SF Pro Text Regular (#F2F2F2) com sombra #000000 25% blur 6, line-height 120%. Anti‑padrões críticos: evitar logos/selos; não usar cores saturadas ou gradients chamativos; não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; sem filtros artificiais que “gritam IA”. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica clara) e Aesop (minimalismo terroso). Vibe geral: editorial premium e calor humano — energia infantil em blur versus copy nítida convidando o pai/mãe para priorizar a própria saúde.

posts.caption:
Introducing the Gut Microbiome Test, the most comprehensive dive into the 120,000+ microbes shaping your digestion, mood, immunity, and metabolism.

We’re partnering with @tiny.health to bring you the gold standard in microbiome science: advanced shotgun metagenomic sequencing. This technology identifies microbes at the strain level, giving you a far more detailed and actionable view of your gut than traditional methods.

The gut impacts nearly every system in your body. Knowing what’s living in your gut can help you uncover:

• 120,000+ microbe insights (bacteria, parasites, fungi)
• Beneficial vs. disruptive microbes
• Inflammation-related bacteria
• Microbiome diversity
• Genetic predispositions

Paired with our Core 100+ biomarkers bloodwork, it’s the most complete picture of your health yet.
posts.hookLine: Introducing the Gut Microbiome Test, the most comprehensive dive into the 120,000+ microbes shaping your digestion, mood, immunity, and metabolism.

primary.hookSignal: O retângulo inferior com bactérias pixeladas em coral #FF6C5C e roxo #8A43D6, em forte contraste contra o slate escuro #1E2A2C, corta as bordas do quadro e dispara o stop-scroll. primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, editorial minimalista premium, vista ortográfica frontal (ângulo 90°), mostrando um slide clean de lançamento de produto health-tech. Sujeito principal: layout tipográfico da marca Mito Health em fundo slate-escuro com um quadro inferior de micrografia estilizada (bactérias em forma de cápsula) em dithering coral→roxo, narrativa de “introducing test” séria e científica. Iluminação: simulação de softbox difuso, 5600K, intensidade baixa, sem hotspots; contraste suave, sombras quase inexistentes para sensação flat. Paleta: fundo slate profundo #1E2A2C; branco suave do texto #ECF2F2; cinza de apoio #9AA7AD; hairlines #5E6B6F; acento sage/teal #47D18C; quadro interno mais escuro #182326; bactérias coral #FF6C5C com dithering magenta/roxo #8A43D6 sobre pontos azuis #3D3BF0; borda do quadro #A4B0B5. Grading: blacks levemente lifted, -0.1 EV, sem saturação exagerada. Textura/tratamento: papel fosco sutil, grain 2–3%, dithering pontilhado nas bactérias (halftone 35%), nitidez alta no texto. Composição: margem generosa; logotipo “Mito” no canto superior direito; bloco de headline alinhado à esquerda ocupando o terço superior; duas hairlines horizontais finíssimas separando título/sub e o callout verde; rodapé visual com um retângulo centrado (80% largura, 48% altura do bottom-half) contendo as formas bacterianas parcialmente cortadas nos cantos. Camera position context: captura como poster flat lay, 50mm equivalente, sem distorção, zero shallow DOF. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” (top-right, Inter SemiBold, peso Medium, cor #ECF2F2, tracking 0, line-height 100%, tamanho md). 2) “Gut Microbiome Test” (top-left, Times New Roman SemiBold, Bold, #ECF2F2, tracking -1%, line-height 110%, tamanho xl). 3) “Your health decoded. To the next level.” (abaixo do título, left, Inter Regular, #9AA7AD, tracking 0, line-height 120%, tamanho md). 4) Hairline 1px #5E6B6F acima e abaixo do subtítulo (full-width do bloco). 5) “Launching Microbiome Insights” (bottom-third left, Inter Medium, #47D18C, tracking 0, line-height 110%, tamanho md). 6) “Powered by:” (à esquerda do logo-parceiro, baseline com a linha verde, Inter Regular, #9AA7AD, sm). 7) “tiny health” (após “Powered by:”, Inter SemiBold, #ECF2F2, sm). Elementos gráficos: quadro inferior com borda 1px #A4B0B5; dentro, 5 formas ovais orgânicas coral #FF6C5C com dithering roxo #8A43D6, cortadas nas bordas superior direita, inferior direita e inferior esquerda; fundo do quadro #182326. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, meticuloso, sofisticado, calmo. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product layout. Anti-padrões: Não usar ícones médicos genéricos; Não aplicar sombras pesadas/gloss; Não usar cores neon saturadas; Não adicionar texturas 3D; Não quebrar margens. Style summary: Manter realismo gráfico, tipografia nítida, hairlines precisas, grão sutil, alta resolução, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram slide, premium minimal editorial, orthographic front view (90°). Dark slate background #1E2A2C with left-aligned headline block and a framed microbiology panel at the bottom. Lighting: softbox-like, 5600K, low intensity, flat contrast, almost no shadows. Palette: text white #ECF2F2, support gray #9AA7AD, hairlines #5E6B6F, accent sage/teal #47D18C, inner panel bg #182326, bacteria coral #FF6C5C with purple dithering #8A43D6 and blue dots #3D3BF0, frame border #A4B0B5. Slightly lifted blacks, -0.1 EV. Texture: matte paper, 2–3% film grain, crisp type, halftone bacteria. Composition: generous margins; “Mito” top-right; “Gut Microbiome Test” top-left (Times New Roman Bold, xl); subline below (Inter Regular, gray); hairlines 1px above/below subline; “Launching Microbiome Insights” in green (Inter Medium) with “Powered by: tiny health” small. Bottom panel centered (80% width, ~48% of lower half) containing 5 cropped pill-shaped bacteria in coral/purple dithering on dark bg. Camera: poster flat lay, 50mm equiv, zero DOF. Mood: clean, scientific, luxurious, calm. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop product minimal. Avoid: neon colors, heavy shadows/gloss, generic medical icons. Keep high-res, precise hairlines, subtle grain.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: fundo slate #1E2A2C; texto principal #ECF2F2; apoio #9AA7AD; hairlines #5E6B6F; acento #47D18C; quadro #182326; bactérias coral #FF6C5C com dithering roxo #8A43D6 e pontos azuis #3D3BF0; borda do quadro #A4B0B5. Tipografia: título em Times New Roman Bold (ou Lora SemiBold), branco #ECF2F2; subtítulo e metadados em Inter Regular/Medium, cinza #9AA7AD; callout em Inter Medium verde #47D18C; “Mito” no canto superior direito em Inter SemiBold branco. Hierarquia: headline xl; sub md; callout md; powered-by sm. Layout: margens amplas; duas hairlines 1px; painel microbiológico centralizado no bottom-half (80% largura). Anti-padrões críticos: não usar ícones médicos clichê, não aplicar sombras pesadas ou gradientes glossy, não saturar as cores além dos hex definidos. Referências: Apple keynote (clareza, grids, respiro) e Aesop (minimalismo textural, sofisticação). Vibe geral: ciência premium silenciosa, precisão editorial com um toque de arte de dados.

posts.caption:
Brain fog? Low energy? Struggling to focus?
This may be more than just stress and aging. It could be the early signs of Vitamin B12 deficiency.

Even with the healthiest diet, you could still be deficient. The cause is because absorption declines as you age, especially after your 30s.

That’s why early symptoms look subtle: fatigue, brain fog, restless sleep. But over time, deficiency increases risks for long-term damages to your health.

It’s one of the most correctable deficiencies - if you catch it early. Measuring your B12 levels reveals whether your body is truly absorbing it and also how to fix your diet or supplementation so you do it right.
posts.hookLine: Brain fog? Low energy? Struggling to focus?

slides.textOverlay:
Vitamin B12 is a water-soluble vitamin critical for energy metabolism, red blood cell formation, neurological function, and DNA synthesis.

Especially after turning 30, your body's ability to naturally absorb B12 significantly declines which puts you at risk of deficiency without even realizing it.

Unlike other nutrients, your body can't make vitamin B12. Therefore, you must get it from food or supplements – making supplementation key to preventing fatigue, brain fog, and long-term deficiency.

slides.textOverlay:
A B12 deficiency may look like:
1 Fatigue and low energy
2 Muscle weakness
3 Numbness or tingling
4 Cognitive difficulties
5 Gastrointestinal issues

Chronic B12 deficiency may lead
to long-term risks such as:

1 Nerve damage
2 Elevated homocysteine
3 Increased cardiovascular risk
4 Anemia
5 Shortness of breath
6 Impaired energy metabolism

Therefore, early diagnosis and
treatment of a B12 deficiency is
critical to avoid permanent
damage.

Excellent sources of Vitamin B12
1 Beef liver

Incorporating these vitamin B12-rich foods into your diet can help ensure you're getting adequate amounts of this essential nutrient for optimal health.

posts.caption:
Your hormones are the body’s messengers, and estradiol is one of the most powerful. Beyond reproduction and fertility, it influences mood, metabolism, skin, bone health, and even how your brain functions.

When estradiol falls out of balance, the signs often show up in ways we don’t immediately connect: bloating, hot flashes, irregular cycles, mood changes, dry skin. Tracking this hormone can give you answers—and a clearer path toward feeling like yourself again.

At Mito, we measure estradiol alongside 100+ other biomarkers, connecting the dots between your symptoms and what’s happening inside your body. Because understanding your biology is the first step to changing it.

slides.textOverlay:
Estradiol is one of the main forms of estrogen, a key female sex hormone. It helps regulate your menstrual cycle, supports fertility, keeps your bones healthy, and affects your mood.

Estradiol levels in women don't stay the same throughout life. They shift depending on your age, whether you're in your menstrual cycle, or if you're approaching or past menopause.

slides.subject: Explanation of premenopausal, perimenopausal, and postmenopausal stages with details on estradiol levels and associated symptoms/risks.
slides.textOverlay:
Premenopausal Stage
For women with regular periods, estradiol levels naturally rise and fall during follicular phase, ovulation, and luteal phase.
These fluctuations are completely normal, however if levels are too high or too low, it could indicate hormone-related concerns like polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) or low ovarian reserve.
Perimenopausal Stage
Hormone levels are typically all over the place. Estrogen levels could instantly drop during this phase which leads to symptoms like hot flashes, mood swings, or irregular periods.
Postmenopausal Stage
You’re considered postmenopausal if you’ve gone a full year without a period. Estradiol levels are expected to drop but critically low levels increases risk of bone thinning, heart disease, and vaginal dryness.

posts.caption:
Not all supplements play nice together. You could be taking the right supplements…but at the wrong time or in wrong doses.

Some compete for absorption. Others cancel each other out or even block benefits entirely.

When it comes to supplements, timing and pairing matter just as much as what you take. Learn how to take them the right way so you actually feel the difference.
posts.hookLine: Not all supplements play nice together. You could be taking the right supplements…but at the wrong time or in wrong doses.

slides.subject: Nutrient interactions and competition for absorption, specifically calcium and magnesium, and iron and zinc.
slides.textOverlay:
NUTRIENTS THAT COMPETE FOR ABSORPTION

Calcium + Magnesium

Often bundled together for bone and muscle health, high doses can cause them to compete in your gut – reducing absorption and counteracting their benefits.

Tip: Split the doses – Take your calcium in the morning and a magnesium supplement at night for sleep and muscle relaxation.

Iron + Zinc

Both are essential minerals, but they share the same absorption pathway. High doses of one can block the other, limiting their benefits.

Tip: Take zinc in the morning and iron later in the day, or use a balanced supplement with the right ratio.

Features two distinct sections: 'Calcium + Magnesium' and 'Iron + Zinc', each with a bold title, descriptive text, and a 'Tip'. A smaller main title 'NUTRIENTS THAT COMPETE FOR ABSORPTION' at the top. Emphasize ample negative space and a modern, health-conscious aesthetic.

slides.composition: Minimalist text-heavy slide with a main overarching title at the top, followed by two distinct sections. Each section features a bold heading, explanatory body text, and a 'Tip:' sub-section. All text is left-aligned with ample white space, creating a clean and organized layout.
slides.subject: The importance of balancing specific nutrient pairs (Vitamin D & K, Zinc & Copper) and their interactions within the body.
slides.textOverlay:
NUTRIENTS THAT NEED TO STAY IN BALANCE

Vitamin D + K

Vitamin D helps your body absorb calcium, while vitamin K2 directs it into your bones and teeth instead of your arteries. Without enough K2, high vitamin D intake – especially with calcium – can contribute to calcium buildup in blood vessels.

Tip: Pair vitamin D3 with K2 for better bone health and to help prevent arterial calcification. Fermented foods like natto and hard cheeses are also natural K2 sources.

Zinc + Copper

Zinc supports immunity and healing, while copper helps make red blood cells and protect against oxidative stress. But they share the same transporter in the gut – too much zinc can block copper absorption, leading to deficiency over time.

Tip: If you take zinc regularly, be sure to get copper too – ideally in a 10:1 or 15:1 zinc-to-copper ratio.

slides.subject: Nutrient interactions and supplement compatibility
slides.textOverlay:
NUTRIENTS THAT INTERFERE WITH FUNCTION

Vitamin C + B12

Vitamin C boosts immunity, while B12 supports nerve health and red blood cell production. But high doses of vitamin C can break down B12, making it harder to absorb.

Tip: Take B12 in the morning and vitamin C later in the day, spacing them at least two hours apart.

Vitamin A + E

Vitamin A is best for good vision, healthy skin, and a strong immune system, while vitamin E protects your cells from oxidative stress. Over supplementing on Vitamin E messes with Vitamin A absorption.

Tip: Stick to moderate doses unless advised by a healthcare professional, and avoid pairing high-dose E with A unless in a balanced formula.

posts.caption:
Not getting enough quality sleep can be frustrating. And people suffering from poor sleep naturally turn to supplements like magnesium to unwind and reset. But not all forms of magnesium work the same way.

Glycinate is best for the restless body.
Threonete is best for the restless mind.

Once you start to match the right magnesium to your sleep type, better nights (and better days) follow.

slides.subject: Different forms of magnesium for sleep and their specific benefits.
slides.textOverlay:
Magnesium regulates over 300 biochemical reactions. One of its core roles is helping calm the nervous system. But not all forms of magnesium work the same way in the body. Some are better absorbed. Others target specific tissues. When it comes to sleep, two types are especially popular:
Magnesium Glycinate
calms the muscles, eases anxiety, and helps you fall (and stay) asleep.
Magnesium Threonate
crosses the blood-brain barrier to calm your mind, improve focus, and support healthy sleep cycles.

posts.caption:
What if your “healthy diet” is pushing you into folate overload? Folate is essential as it supports pregnancy health, cell growth, and DNA production. But in today’s world of fortified foods and daily supplements, it’s easy to get more than your body needs. 

That means your morning cereal, daily multivitamins, and even your “healthy” protein bars could be stacking up more folate than your body can use.

Too much folate can:
• Mask a vitamin B12 deficiency 
• Disrupt your immune response
• Increase certain health risks over time

Test your folate levels and fine-tune your diet and supplement routine so your body gets exactly what it needs - no more, no less.
