primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post. Cinematic editorial photo, frontal, static mid angle: a single translucent lotus leaf centered against a peach–ochre gradient backdrop. Subject: underside of the leaf, ~30 cm, milky light green #E9F3BE with crisp radial veins #6E9E4B; slim stem #3E7C3C rising from bottom center to the core. Lighting: diffused backlight through the leaf (120 cm softbox, 45° back-right, 70%); soft front fill 20%; subtle rim 10% left; 4400K warm-neutral, soft shadows. Palette: background gradient #F2C18A → #E7B276 → #CD8F5C; text off-white #F7F6F2. Grading: slight underexposure −0.2, lifted blacks, gentle S-curve, 35mm film grain 5%. Texture: high sharpness on veins; organic background blur. Composition: rule-of-thirds; generous top negative space for headline; leaf occupies lower-center; stem on vertical axis. Camera: 105mm macro, f/8, ISO160, 1/160s, tripod, focus on node; moderate shallow DOF. Overlays: Top-center headline “Folate: How much becomes too much?” (Canela Regular, lg, #F7F6F2, +2% tracking). Bottom-third center subhead “Your “healthy diet” could be pushing you into folate overload” (Inter Medium, md, #F7F6F2, +1% tracking). Mood: clean, premium, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product. Avoid logos, saturated neons, generic medical icons, AI-ish artifacts; keep realistic, high-res, minimal.
primary.artDirection: Recrie uma cena botânica minimal contra fundo gradiente pêssego‑ocre (#F2C18A → #E7B276 → #CD8F5C). Folha única de lótus vista pelo verso, verde‑claro #E9F3BE com veias #6E9E4B e pecíolo #3E7C3C, nítida e central. Iluminação: backlight difuso 120 cm a 45° por trás/direita (70%), fill frontal 20%, rim leve à esquerda; 4400K. Tipografia: título em Canela Regular, branco off‑white #F7F6F2, tracking +2%, alinhamento top center; subtítulo em Inter Medium #F7F6F2, tracking +1%, bottom‑third center. Grading suave, blacks levemente levantados, grain 35mm 5%. Três anti‑padrões críticos: evitar logos e selos; não usar cores neon ou saturadas; não inserir ícones médicos genéricos (pílulas, estetoscópio). Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia e respiro) e Aesop (minimalismo tátil). Vibe geral: quiet‑luxury científico — orgânico, clínico e premium, com muito negative space e foco na translucidez da folha.

slides.composition: The slide features a text-heavy layout with three distinct text blocks against a subtle gradient background. A heading is positioned at the top-left, followed by a larger body of explanatory text below it, both left-aligned. A concluding statement is placed in the bottom-right corner, right-aligned.
slides.subject: The negative health implications of excessive folate intake, including masking B12 deficiency and potential cancer risk, emphasizing the importance of nutritional balance.
slides.textOverlay:
Why too much becomes a problem

Getting too much folate can actually work against your health. Excess levels can mask a vitamin B12 deficiency, making it harder to detect and treat early. It may also interfere with your body’s natural immune response, and research has linked chronically high folate intake to an increased risk of certain cancers.

Your body’s balance matters and with nutrients, more isn’t always better.

No other graphics or elements.

slides.subject: Recommended daily folate intake and the role of food versus supplements, visually supported by a person holding leafy greens.
slides.textOverlay:
Recommended daily intake:

Adults ~400 mcg DFE/day
Pregnant ~600 mcg DFE/day

DFE = Dietary Folate Equivalents = food + supplements

Most people can hit this through food alone - supplements should only fill the gap, not overflow it.

slides.subject: Folate level assessment, dietary tracking, and personalized health support from Mito.
slides.textOverlay:
The best way to know if your folate is in the optimal range is through blood testing for serum folate and red blood cell (RBC) folate.
From there, look closely at your supplement labels and track how much fortified food you're eating – things like cereals, breads, and energy bars can add up quickly.
Mito can tell you where your folate levels stand and help you fine-tune your diet and supplement routine for optimal health.

posts.caption:
Can stress actually make you live longer?
When done right, yes.

Cold plunges trigger your resilience by boosting dopamine and stress tolerance. Saunas mimic exercise, lowering cardiovascular risk and even reducing all-cause mortality in long-term studies.

This synergistic longevity duo shows how deliberate exposure to heat and cold can improve recovery, protect heart health, and build long-term resilience.

primary.artDirection: Fotografia subaquática minimalista com grande espaço negativo. Foto: 100mm macro f/4, 1/1000, ISO 200; luz difusa 5800K de cima; grading frio com blacks lifted e -0,2 EV; grain 35mm 5% e halation 2%. Três anti-padrões críticos: sem cores saturadas, sem ícones/ornamentos, sem sombras projetadas em textos. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia e respiro) e Aesop (minimalismo táctil). slides.subject: Benefits of cold plunges and saunas for health and longevity
slides.textOverlay:
Cold plunge and saunas aren’t just wellness trends. They’ve been used for centuries to boost health and recovery. Science now confirms their benefits:
Cold Plunges improve mood, reduce inflammation, and support sleep.
Saunas are linked to better heart health, lower cholesterol, and stronger immunity.
Together, this hot-cold combination enhances cardiovascular function, relieves stress, improves sleep quality, and may even support longevity when practiced consistently.
slides.style: Minimalist, clean, textual, modern
slides.prompt: Minimalist Instagram carousel slide with a clean light grey background (#F0F2F4). Display informative dark grey sans-serif text (#343C45). The top text block is left-aligned, followed by two bullet-point style paragraphs slightly indented. A concluding text block is positioned at the bottom-right, maintaining a modern, readable typography.

slides.composition: Minimalist, text-heavy slide with a main title at the top, followed by a numbered list of benefits, each with a bold heading and a descriptive paragraph, all left-aligned on a plain background.
slides.subject: Benefits of hot and cold therapy/duo
slides.textOverlay:
The Benefits of the Hot & Cold Duo

1 Manages Stress Response
Cold plunges boost dopamine, alertness, and resilience. Saunas lower cortisol and release endorphins, training your body to better manage daily stress.

2 Promotes Better Sleep
Cold immersion improves deep slow-wave sleep, while saunas mimic the body’s natural cooling cycle. Together supporting faster sleep onset and better recovery.

3 Boosts Heart Health
Cold plunges burn fat, reduce LDL cholesterol, and strengthen metabolism. Saunas mimic exercise, improving circulation, lowering cholesterol, and reducing cardiovascular risk.
slides.style: Minimalist, clean, corporate, educational, modern

slides.composition: Text-heavy informational layout with a question at the top, followed by two distinct points with bolded headings and explanatory paragraphs. A concluding sentence is placed at the bottom. Ample negative space provides a clean, minimalist feel.
slides.subject: The link between hot and cold therapies (cold plunges and saunas) and longevity, supported by research findings.
slides.textOverlay:
Are hot + cold therapies linked to longevity?

Cold plunges
Early animal studies show up to a 20% increase in lifespan with slight reductions in core body temperature.

Saunas
Robust human research shows a 40% lower risk of premature death in frequent sauna users, plus reduced risk of cardiovascular events.

Together, heat + cold may be powerful allies in extending health span.
slides.mood: Informative, clean, factual, educational, slightly hopeful.
slides.style: Minimalist, clean, textual, professional, sans-serif typography, academic.

slides.composition: Minimalist text-based layout with a title at the top, two main sections with bulleted details, and a concluding explanatory paragraph at the bottom. Text is left-aligned.
slides.subject: Instructions for sauna and cold plunge practice and their health benefits
slides.textOverlay:
How to Practice

Saunas:
1 hour per week
(split across 2-3 sessions)
176-212°F (80-100°C)

Cold Plunge:
11 minutes per week
(split across 2-3 sessions)
2-5 minute sessions at 50-59°F (10-15°C)

Using both in conjunction harnesses their synergistic effects.
The contrasting temperatures creates a "vascular pump" -
saunas dilate your blood vessels while cold plunges constrict
them, improving circulation & heart health.

slides.textOverlay:
Everyone talks about GLP-1s for weight loss and blood sugar.
But when one number changes, so do six others.

Kidney function.
Liver fat & inflammation.
Pancreas workload.
Cholesterol & lipid profile.
Nutrient absorption.
Thyroid balance.

They're all shifting.

slides.composition: The slide features white text aligned to the left on the right side of the image, set against an abstract, textured dark olive-green background. slides.subject: Abstract biological representation of molecular chains or cellular structures related to GLP-1, accompanying explanatory text.
slides.textOverlay:
Your gut makes a natural hormone called GLP-1.
It helps control blood sugar and appetite by:

1 Triggering insulin from the pancreas after meals
2 Blocking glucagon, which raises blood sugar
3 Slowing digestion, so glucose enters your
  bloodstream more gradually
4 Signaling fullness to your brain via the vagus
  nerve

GLP-1 drugs mimic these effects, which explains
their initial appeal.
slides.style: Abstract, scientific illustration, minimalist text overlay, clean.
slides.prompt: An abstract, dark scientific illustration for a GLP-1 explainer slide. The background is a textured, deep olive green. A diagonal chain of blurry, glowing, light green amorphous shapes or microbial forms stretches from top left to bottom right. White text overlays the right side, maintaining a clean, informative aesthetic.

slides.composition: The slide features white text presented in two main sections with numbered bullet points, set against a warm gradient background. The text is left-aligned and centrally placed for readability. A transitional sentence connects the two main ideas.
slides.subject: GLP-1s: short-term benefits vs. long-term downsides without lifestyle changes
slides.textOverlay:
GLP-1s can help in the short term:
1 Lowering blood sugar and A1c
2 Reducing appetite
3 Supporting rapid weight loss
But without lifestyle changes, these benefits are often temporary.
Long-term use can have downsides you won't see on a scale:
1 Worsened insulin resistance if diet isn't addressed
2 Weight regain after stopping (often with more fat, less muscle)
3 Loss of lean muscle mass which slowers metabolism
4 Digestive distress (nausea, vomiting, constipation)
5 Possible nutrient depletion from slower digestion
slides.style: Minimalist, professional, text-centric, clean design
slides.hookSignal: The contrast between 'short term' benefits and 'long-term downsides you won't see on a scale' acts as a hook, prompting the reader to understand the full picture beyond initial observations.

Catching these early means adjusting before
problems develop.

posts.caption:
The sport you choose now could change your lifespan by nearly a decade. A 2025 study in GeroScience analyzed 95,210 elite athletes from 44 sports across 183 countries, comparing their lifespans.

Findings show that these sports are linked to adding 5-8+ years to your lifespan: pole vaulting, gymnastics, and fencing.

While the biggest drops in lifespan were tied to the following sports: sumo, volleyball, and mountaineering.

The best “longevity sport” isn’t just a single activity. It’s a combination that blends endurance, strength, coordination, and flexibility that will give you the best return on longevity.
posts.hookLine: The sport you choose now could change your lifespan by nearly a decade. A 2025 study in GeroScience analyzed 95,210 elite athletes from 44 sports across 183 countries, comparing their lifespans.

primary.hookSignal: A palavra Years em verde-sage (#9CBF87), centralizada em tamanho XL sobre o motion blur quente das pernas correndo, cria alto contraste imediato contra o fundo escuro e dispara o stop-scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica com câmera na altura do joelho, panning lateral, mostrando duas pessoas correndo em pista urbana com foco nas pernas e tênis, motion blur dinâmico e tipografia central hero. Sujeito principal: dois corredores anônimos, ~20-35 anos, apenas metade inferior do corpo enquadrada; perna esquerda (short preto) entra pelo terço esquerdo; perna direita (short branco) entra pelo terço direito; ambos com tênis brancos com detalhe verde. Iluminação golden hour lateral a 45° vinda da direita, 4900K, intensidade média-alta, sombras longas e suaves no asfalto, rim light quente destacando panturrilhas. Paleta: pele pêssego #F1C4A8 → âmbar suave #E3A977; asfalto cinza quente #8E857D → borda #B8B1A9; vegetação verde-escuro desfocado #1F3A2D; branco creme do texto #F5F2E8; destaque sage #9CBF87; micro-sombra em #0E0E0E a 15%; grading com blacks levemente elevados e contraste suave (S-curve). Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6%, leve halation em altas-luzes, blur de movimento orgânico (shutter 1/30s), nitidez seletiva nos tênis, subexposição -0.2 EV. Composição: regra dos terços; linha do horizonte (copas) no terço superior; faixa da pista cortando horizontal no terço inferior; tipografia centralizada no mid-frame; espaço negativo escuro atrás das pernas para legibilidade. Camera position context: 85mm f/2.8, ISO 100, panning em gimbal lateral, distância ~3 m, foco contínuo nos calçados, como still de campanha Equinox. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) Top-center: "Based on a 2025 GeroScience study of 95,210 elite athletes." fonte Inter Regular, cor #EDE7D3, tamanho sm, tracking +2%, line-height 120%. 2) Centro (três linhas): "The Sports That Are" (Times New Roman Regular, cor #F5F2E8, tamanho xl, tracking -1%); "Adding Years to Your" (mesma, com a palavra "Years" em #9CBF87, Semibold, itálico); "Lifespan" (Times New Roman Medium, #F5F2E8). Sombra de texto 10% #000 a 2px blur. ELEMENTOS GRÁFICOS: sublinhado fino de 1px em #9CBF87 sob "Years" (largura da palavra), nenhum ícone. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, atlético, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide (tipografia e espaçamento), Equinox campaign (atleticismo cinematográfico), Aesop minimal (paleta contida). Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores neon ou saturadas. Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos. Não aplicar glow artificial pesado. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp seletivo, composição minimal e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo, knee-height lateral panning shot of two anonymous runners on an urban path, focusing on legs and white sneakers with green accent; strong motion blur on background, central hero typography. Golden hour side key at 45° from right, 4900K, medium-high intensity, long soft shadows, warm rim light on calves. Palette: skin #F1C4A8/#E3A977, asphalt warm gray #8E857D/#B8B1A9, blurred dark foliage #1F3A2D, text cream #F5F2E8, highlight sage #9CBF87; subtle S-curve, lifted blacks. Texture: 35mm film grain 6%, slight halation, 1/30s motion blur, -0.2 EV, selective sharpness on shoes. Composition: rule-of-thirds; tree line top third, track on lower third; space-negative mid for copy. Camera: 85mm f/2.8, ISO 100, gimbal panning, ~3 m distance. Overlays: top-center small Inter Regular cream line: "Based on a 2025 GeroScience study of 95,210 elite athletes." Center three lines in Times New Roman: line1 "The Sports That Are" cream; line2 "Adding Years to Your" cream with "Years" in sage, semibold italic + 1px underline; line3 "Lifespan" cream. No icons. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, athletic. References: Apple keynote spacing; Equinox campaign. Anti-patterns: no logos, no neon, no generic medical icons, no heavy glow, no ornate display fonts. Keep realistic, subtle film grain, high-res, minimal composition.
primary.artDirection: Paleta contida e quente: pele #F1C4A8/#E3A977, verde-escuro de fundo #1F3A2D, asfalto #8E857D, tipografia creme #F5F2E8 com destaque sage #9CBF87. Tipografia: título serifado Times New Roman (Regular/Medium), corpo auxiliar Inter (Regular). Hierarquia: topo sm Inter em creme; título central em três linhas com "Years" em sage, Semibold itálico e sublinhado de 1px. Sombra suave 10% preto para legibilidade. Fotografia com golden hour lateral 4900K, panning, 85mm f/2.8, 1/30s; grain 6% e blacks levemente elevados. Três anti-padrões críticos: 1) não usar cores vibrantes/neon; 2) não inserir ícones/elementos médicos genéricos; 3) não aplicar glow/gradientes artificiais que pareçam IA. Referências: Apple keynote (espaçamento/calibragem tipográfica) e Equinox campaign (físico cinematográfico). Vibe geral: luxury wellness esportivo e científico, minimal, com energia de performance contida e credibilidade editorial.

slides.composition: Two main text blocks with headings, bullet points, and paragraphs, arranged vertically on a dark background. The top section explains how sports contribute to longevity, and the bottom section discusses other socioeconomic factors. The layout is clean and text-heavy.
slides.subject: Reasons why specific sports add years to lifespan and other contributing factors beyond the sport itself.
slides.textOverlay:
Why the Top Sports
Are Adding Years

Sports like pole vaulting, gymnastics, and
fencing work multiple systems at once:

[1] Strength – builds muscle mass to protect
joints and support healthy metabolism.

[2] Cardio – strengthens the heart and
improves oxygen delivery.

[3] Agility & balance – lowers fall risk later in
life.

[4] Skill learning – challenges the brain and
supports cognitive health.

This “full-body, full-brain” approach seems to
be key for longevity.

But It’s Not Just the Sport

Some sports show bigger benefits because of who plays them. For
example, fencing and certain precision sports are more common in
athletes with higher income and better access to:

[1] Quality nutrition
[2] Preventive healthcare
[3] Recovery resources

This can create an advantage beyond the training itself.
slides.style: Minimalist, clean, textual infographic, editorial.
slides.prompt: An educational infographic slide with a dark gray background and crisp white text. Feature two distinct sections: a title 'Why the Top Sports Are Adding Years' with a bulleted list explaining benefits like strength, cardio, agility, and skill learning; and a second section 'But It’s Not Just the Sport' with another list on nutrition, healthcare, and recovery resources. Emphasize clean typography, clear headings, and a professional, minimalist aesthetic.

slides.composition: A dark-themed infographic slide with a prominent title at the top. The central part features a horizontal bar chart listing five sports with corresponding negative lifespan impacts, indicated by pale yellow bars and numerical values. Below the chart, there are detailed textual explanations regarding the underlying reasons for these impacts, presented as bullet points and a concluding statement.
slides.subject: Sports that negatively impact lifespan and the reasons for these trade-offs.
slides.textOverlay:
Top 5: Sports Removing 2-10+ Years to Your Lifespan
Handball - 2.2 years
Martial Arts - 2.5 years
Mountaineering - 3.8 years
Volleyball - 5.4 years
Sumo - 9.8 years
Lower scores don't mean the sport is necessarily "bad" but they often reflect trade-offs:
[1] Injury risk (e.g., high-impact collisions in volleyball or martial arts)
[2] Extreme weight gain (e.g., sumo)
[3] Environmental hazards (e.g., mountaineering)
Repeated injuries, chronic strain, or metabolic stress can offset exercise benefits over time.
slides.style: Minimalist, clean, modern, data visualization, infographic.

Beneath the chart, explanatory white text detailing trade-offs like injury risk, extreme weight gain, and environmental hazards.

slides.composition: Minimalist text-based slide with left-aligned content on a dark background. It features a main title, an introductory paragraph, a bulleted list (using '+' symbols), and a concluding paragraph. Ample negative space is present, especially on the right side.
slides.subject: Fitness and health advice, balanced exercise types, longevity
slides.textOverlay:
The Smartest Approach for Most People
The study suggests the best strategy isn't picking just one sport, but mixing training types:
+ Cardio for heart health
+ Strength for muscle and bone
+ Agility/flexibility for mobility
+ Skill-based activities for brain health
This variety gives your body and brain the most complete protection as you age.

posts.caption:
Your hormones have a gatekeeper but you’ve probably never heard of it. It’s called SHBG (sex hormone-binding globulin) and it decides how much testosterone and estrogen are actually active in your body.

When your SHBG is out of balance, you might notice energy dips, mood swings, irregular period cycles, and changes in skin or hair. 

Support healthy SHBG by nourishing your liver, balancing blood sugar, managing stress - but most importantly, start tracking it. That way, you’re able to spot subtle hormone shifts early and make changes before they impact your energy, mood, or cycles.
posts.hookLine: Your hormones have a gatekeeper but you’ve probably never heard of it. It’s called SHBG (sex hormone-binding globulin) and it decides how much testosterone and estrogen are actually active in your bod

primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando uma superfície mineral orgânica tipo ônix/ágata em macro, com camadas onduladas suaves que remetem a “portões” — metáfora visual para o gatekeeper hormonal SHBG. Sujeito principal: texturas estratificadas nude‑sálvia ocupando 100% do quadro; narrativa: ciência premium e calma, convidando à leitura do título “SHBG”. Iluminação: key light difusa via softbox 60x90cm a 45° a partir do topo‑direita, 5600K, intensidade média; fill bounce suave à esquerda 5300K 40%; leve rim/back fill 10% para realçar bordas; sombras macias nas valas das dobras. Paleta: oyster #EDE6E0 → blush #E8CFC4 → pêssego #F5CDB6 → taupe #C7B2A5 → sálvia clara #B9C3BA → teal profundo #2F3F3C; texto em marfim #F3F1EE; grading filmic desaturado (-20%), blacks levemente lifted (+8), subexposto -0.1EV, highlight warm +3. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6%, halation/bloom 4%, Pro-Mist 1/8, clarity -10, nitidez controlada, zero banding. Composição: fundo abstrato preenche; “Mito” pequeno no top-center; grande “SHBG” ancorado no terço inferior esquerdo (rule-of-thirds); abaixo/à direita dele, três perguntas em duas linhas alinhadas à esquerda; canto inferior direito com tagline pequena + linha hairline; amplo negative space ao centro‑esquerda. Camera position context: macro 100mm f/4, top-down em tripé/copy-stand, ISO 200, 1/60s, shallow DOF moderado. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” — top-center; fonte SF Pro Display, Regular, cor #F3F1EE, tracking +20, line-height 1.0, tamanho sm, fade-in 300ms. 2) “SHBG” — bottom-left; fonte Canela (serif high-contrast) Regular, cor #F3F1EE, tracking +5, line-height 0.95, tamanho xl, fade-up 300ms. 3) “Irregular cycles? Mood swings? Fluctuations in weight and skin?” — mid-left, duas linhas, Inter Regular, cor #F3F1EE, tracking +4, line-height 1.25, tamanho md, fade-in 300ms. 4) “The overlooked hormone regulator that’s key to balances” — bottom-right, Inter Regular, cor #F3F1EE, tracking +2, line-height 1.2, tamanho sm, fade-in 300ms. Elementos gráficos: linha hairline 1px, #D9D6D1 a 60% opacidade, 90px, alinhada à baseline da tagline estendendo-se à direita; margens internas de 7% do canvas. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, minimalista, orgânico, etéreo, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Kinfolk editorial. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; Não adicionar sombras duras ou drop shadows; Não distorcer/inventar logotipos; Não criar aparência de IA (plastic/over-smooth). Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp controlado, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial top-down macro of layered onyx/agate texture, soft biomorphic folds as a metaphor for the SHBG hormone “gatekeeper.” Lighting: diffused softbox key 45° from top-right at 5600K, medium intensity; left bounce fill 5300K at 40%; subtle back/rim 10%; soft valley shadows. Palette: oyster #EDE6E0, blush #E8CFC4, peach #F5CDB6, taupe #C7B2A5, light sage #B9C3BA, deep teal #2F3F3C; text in ivory #F3F1EE; filmic grade, -20% saturation, lifted blacks +8, -0.1EV, warm highs +3. Texture: 35mm film grain 6%, slight bloom/halation 4%, Black Pro-Mist 1/8, clarity -10. Composition: background fills frame; small “Mito” top-center; big “SHBG” anchored lower-left (rule-of-thirds); Q&A copy mid-left; small tagline bottom-right with a thin 1px divider line (#D9D6D1, 60% opacity, 90px). Camera: 100mm macro f/4, tripod top-down, ISO 200, 1/60s, moderate shallow DOF. Typography overlays: “Mito” SF Pro Display Regular (sm); “SHBG” Canela Regular (xl); questions Inter Regular (md); tagline Inter Regular (sm); all in #F3F1EE, gentle tracking and fade-in. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, minimal, serene. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal.
primary.artDirection: Baseie-se numa macro abstrata de ágata/ônix com dobras suaves e sensação etérea. Paleta: oyster #EDE6E0, blush #E8CFC4, pêssego #F5CDB6, taupe #C7B2A5, sálvia #B9C3BA, teal profundo #2F3F3C; textos em marfim #F3F1EE. Tipografia: logotipo “Mito” em SF Pro Display Regular; título “SHBG” em serif elegante high-contrast tipo Canela Regular; corpo e tagline em Inter Regular. Tracking leve (+2 a +5), line-height 1.2, sem sombras. Três anti‑padrões críticos: 1) não usar cores neon/saturadas; 2) nada de ícones médicos genéricos ou ilustrações; 3) evitar efeitos digitais agressivos (glow, drop shadow, gradients metálicos). Referências: slides da Apple (hierarquia tipográfica limpa) e estética minimal da Aesop (paleta terrosa, silêncio visual). Vibe geral em 1 frase: ciência premium serena — estética biomórfica clean com título autoritário em serif sobre textura mineral suave.

slides.composition: The slide features text aligned to the left, occupying the top-left and middle-left section of the frame. The entire background is an abstract, full-bleed image composed of smooth, layered, organic textures.
slides.subject: Abstract layered organic texture resembling polished stone (like agate or onyx) with flowing, undulating lines.
slides.textOverlay:
SHBG is a protein made by your liver that latches onto testosterone and estradiol in your bloodstream. It's in charge of carrying these hormones to different parts of your body. SHBG controls how much of these hormones are free and active in your body.

High SHBG = body uses fewer active sex hormones

Low SHBG = more hormones are free to be used by your body
slides.style: Modern, minimalist, abstract, natural.
slides.prompt: Abstract layered background resembling polished agate or onyx, with smooth, flowing, undulating curves. Use a palette of muted earthy tones, including creamy white, soft beige, and desaturated greenish-grey. The overall mood should be calming and sophisticated, designed to provide a clean backdrop for informative text overlay on the left side.

slides.composition: The slide features a dominant abstract background resembling polished natural stone or agate with smooth, swirling layers of various neutral tones. Text is overlaid on the left side, presenting a main explanatory paragraph, followed by a clear heading and a numbered list of health impacts, all in a clean, sans-serif typeface.
slides.subject: SHBG (Sex Hormone-Binding Globulin) and its impacts on women's health.
slides.textOverlay:
Struggling with low energy, mood swings, irregular cycles, or unexpected hair or skin changes? It could be SHBG as this marker controls how much testosterone and estrogen are actually active in your body. Imbalances can therefore affect energy, metabolism, fertility, and even bone health — often without obvious signs in standard lab work.
Impacts of SHBG on Women's Health:
[1] Menstrual Cycles & Fertility
[2] Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS)
[3] Menopause
[4] Skin and hair health
slides.style: Minimalist, elegant, modern, abstract organic.
slides.prompt: An elegant, minimalist Instagram carousel slide featuring a sophisticated abstract background of smooth, swirling layers reminiscent of polished natural stone or agate, rendered in shades of off-white, beige, light grey, and dark greenish-brown. Overlay informative text in a clean sans-serif font, left-aligned, detailing SHBG's role and its specific impacts on women's health with a numbered list, creating a serene and educational aesthetic.

slides.composition: The slide features text overlays on an abstract background. The background consists of a smooth, layered, and swirling organic pattern, resembling polished agate or marble. The text is divided into four distinct blocks, with the first two aligned to the left and the last two aligned to the right, against the neutral and earthy tones of the background.
slides.subject: Abstract organic layered pattern, agate texture, health information text
slides.textOverlay:
High SHBG can suppress available testosterone and estrogen – potentially causing low energy, irregular periods, or bone density concerns.

Low SHBG means more free hormones – raising risks of things like acne, hair loss, insulin resistance, or metabolic problems.

Why does tracking your SHBG matter?

Because SHBG reflects more than hormones – it mirrors liver health, metabolic stress, thyroid function, inflammation, and even cardiovascular and metabolic disease risk.
slides.style: Clean, modern, minimalist, abstract, organic
slides.prompt: An abstract, high-resolution background featuring a smooth, organic layered pattern reminiscent of polished agate or marble. slides.composition: A numbered list of text is overlaid on an abstract, organic background texture. The text is left-aligned.
slides.subject: Ways to support healthy SHBG
slides.textOverlay:
Smart Ways to Support Healthy SHBG
1 Nourish your liver
cut excess alcohol, minimize processed fats, and gut friendly whole-foods
2 Lean metabolic habits
support insulin sensitivity through balanced nutrition and movement
3 Hormone-smart choices
stay informed if you're on estrogen or birth control as these can affect SHBG significantly.
4 Test and track
tracking SHBG alongside hormones gives clarity on hormone balance and energy shifts.

primary.composition: A macro, ultra close-up shot focusing on a vibrant orange/reddish plant leaf or flower petal covered in tiny, glistening dew drops. The background is a soft, blurred bokeh of warm orange and brown tones, creating a shallow depth of field. The dew-covered petal forms a strong diagonal element across the foreground, while other blurred petals are visible in the background.
primary.subject: Macro shot of a plant leaf or flower petal with dew drops
primary.textOverlay: Water the plants
primary.mood: Calm, serene, natural, reflective, peaceful, warm
primary.style: Macro photography, close-up, natural light, high detail, shallow depth of field
primary.hookSignal: O brilho especular das micro-gotas alinhadas na folha em diagonal cria um tapete de pontos luminosos âmbar e puxa o olhar para o centro. Em cima desse negativo quente, a frase “Water the plants” em branco puro, minimalista, gera o stop-scroll imediato.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica macro, close-up extremo, ângulo oblíquo de ~30°, mostrando folhas alaranjadas com veios translúcidos cobertas por micro-gotas de orvalho, com copy minimalista no centro. Sujeito principal: uma folha tropical larga, cor âmbar-acerola, com nervuras finas iluminadas de trás, gotas recém-borrifadas formando pontos especulares; narrativa de pequeno hábito diário (cuidar das plantas) como metáfora de consistência. Iluminação: key light difusa a 45° pela direita (4300K, intensidade 60%), fill suave pela esquerda (3800K, 20%), back/rim baixo atrás da folha para translucência (4700K, 50%); sombras soft, penumbra cremosa, highlights controlados. Paleta: âmbar #E8862A → tangerina #F1933C → coral queimado #C65A2A → terracotta #A3472C → marrom cacau #4A2619 no fundo; veios dourados #F4C36B; highlights úmidos #F7F3EF; grade com leve warm push, blacks ligeiramente levantados, contraste em S suave, -0.2 EV. Textura/tratamento: microcontraste alto nas gotas, nitidez seletiva no plano focal, bokeh orgânico; grain de filme 35mm 2%; bloom discreto 4% nos highlights; nada de overly-sharpened. Composição: curva principal da folha atravessa o terço inferior esquerdo para o meio; segunda lâmina desfocada ocupa topo-direita; negativo quente no centro para acomodar texto; fundo desfocado profundo. Camera position context: lente macro 100mm f/2.8, shallow DOF (f/4), distância ~20 cm, ISO 200, 1/60s, tripé; como fotografia de estúdio, não drone. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: "Water the plants" — posição mid-center, fonte SF Pro Text, peso Regular, cor #F2F4F7, tracking +2, line-height 100%, tamanho md (aprox. 6% da altura), sem sombra, sem animação; alinhamento central perfeito. Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone/pill; apenas vinheta radial sutil 8% (#0E0A08, multiplicação) e máscara de clareza suave no arco da folha. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, sereno. Referências: Apple keynote slide (tipografia mínima sobre fundo rico), fotografia de produto Aesop (tons terrosos, textura tátil). Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos. Não criar aparência de IA plastificada. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, sharp localizado, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post. Cinematic editorial macro photo, extreme close-up at ~30° oblique angle, showing orange-amber tropical leaves with translucent veins and dew micro-drops; minimalist center copy. Lighting: soft key 45° right (4300K, 60%), gentle fill left (3800K, 20%), low back/rim for translucency (4700K, 50%); soft shadows, controlled speculars. Palette: amber #E8862A → tangerine #F1933C → burnt coral #C65A2A → terracotta #A3472C → cocoa brown #4A2619; golden veins #F4C36B; wet highlights #F7F3EF; warm grade, lifted blacks, mild S-curve, -0.2 EV. Texture: high micro-contrast on droplets, selective sharpness, organic bokeh; 35mm film grain 2%, subtle 4% bloom. Composition: main leaf arc crosses lower-left to center; secondary blurred blade top-right; warm negative space center for text; deep background blur. Camera: 100mm macro f/2.8 (shot at f/4), ~20 cm, ISO 200, 1/60s, tripod. Overlay: “Water the plants” centered, SF Pro Text Regular, #F2F4F7, tracking +2, size medium (~6% height). No icons; slight radial vignette 8% (#0E0A08). Mood: clean, premium, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote slide, Aesop product photography. Avoid logos, oversaturated colors, generic medical icons, AI-plastic look, ornate display fonts. Realistic, minimal, high-res, subtle film grain.
primary.artDirection: Paleta quente e tátil: âmbar #E8862A, tangerina #F1933C, coral queimado #C65A2A, terracotta #A3472C, fundo cacau #4A2619, veios dourados #F4C36B, texto branco #F2F4F7. Tipografia: SF Pro Text Regular (ou Inter Regular como fallback), tracking +2, sem sombra, alinhamento central; tamanho aprox. 6% da altura do quadro. Iluminação de estúdio com key 4300K à direita e rim 4700K para dar translucência nas nervuras e highlights nas gotas; fill 3800K discreto. Três anti-padrões críticos: 1) Não inserir logos/selos. 2) Não saturar além do range indicado (manter look orgânico). 3) Não usar ícones/ilustrações médicas. Referências: Apple keynote (mínimo, respiro amplo) e Aesop (textura terrosa, premium). Vibe geral: luxo silencioso e científico — macro tátil com copy curta que celebra pequenos hábitos.

posts.caption:
You’re going through the motions. And from the outside, you seem fine.

But underneath? You’re exhausted. Not sleeping well. The mood swings, the bloat, the fog - it all keeps resurfacing inside. Something just feels off.

Make sense of it with data that goes deeper and reflects what your day-to-day actually feels like.
posts.hookLine: You’re going through the motions. And from the outside, you seem fine.

primary.composition: The image features a double exposure or layered effect. Two hands, appearing somewhat translucent, are positioned in the lower half of the frame, reaching gently upwards. They are overlaid on a dreamy, misty forest landscape with dense green foliage and a calm body of water (a lake or river) at the bottom. The text "Looks peaceful." is centered in the upper-middle part of the image.

primary.textOverlay: Looks peaceful.
primary.style: Double exposure, ethereal, dreamy, soft focus, nature photography, impressionistic.
primary.hookSignal: O olho trava no texto branco minimalista "Looks\npeaceful." central, flutuando sobre a névoa esverdeada. As mãos elevadas nos cantos inferiores ancoram a cena e criam contraste humano contra o fundo suave.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica em estilo luxury wellness, POV frontal na altura do peito, câmera levemente acima das mãos, mostrando um par de mãos femininas com anéis minimalistas erguidas diante de um lago esmeralda cercado por árvores, com leve sensação de dupla exposição/vidro úmido criando névoa suave. Sujeito principal: mãos de pele morena-clara, unhas curtas sem esmalte, anéis finos em prata envelhecida, dedos alongados; narrativa: do lado de fora tudo parece calmo enquanto a pessoa tenta alcançar a luz. Iluminação: golden hour filtrada pela copa; key light solar difusa a 35° vindo do topo-esquerdo; rim light suave contornando os dedos; bounce da água no plano inferior; temperatura ~5100K; intensidade média; sombras dappled com falloff macio. Paleta: musgo #6E8B61 → sage #9FB88E → teal do lago #3A7F7C; pele pêssego #D8A07C; highlights off‑white #F2EFEA; sombras verde-profundo #1E3026; texto branco #F6F6F6; film grading com blacks levantados (#101314), green cast sutil, contraste baixo‑médio, saturação −10%. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 7%; bloom leve; filtro Black Pro‑Mist 1/4; vignette suave #0E0E0E 8%; bokeh orgânico pequeno; sem sharpening agressivo. Composição: rule-of-thirds; linha d’água no terço inferior; mãos ocupam o centro-inferior (direita mais alta, esquerda mais baixa), fundo de árvores em soft focus; área negativa nebulosa no terço superior‑direito para acomodar texto; foreground apenas as mãos; reflexos suaves da copa na água. Camera position context: full‑frame 50mm f/2.2, shallow DOF; ISO 200; 1/250s; foco nos nós dos dedos; handheld estável a ~60 cm. Texto/overlay: "Looks\npeaceful." (duas linhas) em mid-center; fonte SF Pro Display; peso Regular; cor #F6F6F6; tracking +2; line-height 110%; tamanho md; sem sombra; margens de segurança 8% nas bordas. Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone; sem labels; apenas safe area invisível e vignette já descrita. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, sereno, introspectivo, contemplativo, científico-poético, orgânico-luxo. Referências: Apple keynote slide, Aesop minimal campaign, Equinox wellness editorial. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores neon/saturadas. Não usar ícones médicos genéricos (ECG, coração). Não aplicar HDR/luz dura. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, nitidez nos dedos, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram frame, cinematic editorial photography, luxury wellness vibe, chest‑height POV slightly above two feminine hands with minimalist silver rings raised toward light over an emerald lake, trees all around, faint double‑exposure/glass haze. Lighting: golden hour through canopy; soft solar key 35° from top‑left; gentle rim on fingers; bounce from water; ~5100K; medium intensity; dappled shadows. Palette: moss #6E8B61 → sage #9FB88E → lake teal #3A7F7C; skin peach #D8A07C; highlights off‑white #F2EFEA; deep green shadows #1E3026; text white #F6F6F6; grading with lifted blacks (#101314), slight green cast, low‑medium contrast, −10% saturation. Texture: 35mm film grain 7%, subtle bloom, Black Pro‑Mist 1/4, soft vignette #0E0E0E 8%, small organic bokeh. Composition: rule‑of‑thirds; waterline on lower third; hands centered lower area (right higher than left); soft‑focus trees; negative space upper‑right for text. Camera: full‑frame 50mm f/2.2, shallow DOF, ISO 200, 1/250s, focus on knuckles, stable handheld ~60 cm. Overlay: "Looks\npeaceful." centered; SF Pro Display Regular, #F6F6F6, tracking +2, line‑height 110%, size md. Mood: clean, premium, contemplative. References: Apple keynote, Aesop minimal. Avoid logos, neon colors, medical icons, HDR, ornate fonts. Keep photographic realism and subtle film grain.
primary.artDirection: Paleta terrosa e aquática: musgo #6E8B61, sage #9FB88E, teal #3A7F7C, pele #D8A07C, highlights #F2EFEA, sombras #1E3026, texto #F6F6F6. Grading com blacks levantados #101314 e green cast leve; saturação baixa. Tipografia: SF Pro Display ou Inter; título/overlay em Regular, tracking +2, line-height 110%, cor #F6F6F6, centralizado. Composição com rule-of-thirds: linha d’água no terço inferior; mãos no centro-inferior; reservar negativo superior‑direito para o texto. Iluminação golden hour filtrada; dappled shadows; rim suave nos dedos. Lente 50mm f/2.2 com Black Pro‑Mist 1/4; grain 35mm ~7%; vignette 8%. Anti‑padrões críticos: 1) nunca usar neon ou saturação alta; 2) não inserir ícones médicos/ilustrações; 3) evitar HDR, oversharpen e logos. Referências: Apple keynote (tipografia e espaçamento) e Aesop (paleta orgânica e minimalismo). Vibe geral: luxury wellness contemplativo com calma clínica e realismo fotográfico.

The background is a simple, light-colored wall with a prominent diagonal shadow from the top-left, creating visual depth. Text overlays are strategically placed at the top, middle, and bottom of the image.
primary.subject: A happy woman eating bread with butter, symbolizing health and simple pleasures.
primary.textOverlay:
Mito
Health you can actually feel.
Your 90-day health timeline with Mito.
primary.mood: Joyful, authentic, wholesome, healthy, content, natural, optimistic.
primary.style: Lifestyle photography, warm and natural lighting, candid moment, minimalist background, clean aesthetic, modern typography.
primary.hookSignal: O headline serif branco “Health you can actually feel.” flutuando no centro, enorme, sobre o rosto banhado de sol — contraste alto contra a parede bege clara — dispara o stop‑scroll. O gesto saboroso da mordida no pão, com sombra dura gráfica, reforça a sensação de ‘saúde que se sente’.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo alto ~35° sobre uma mulher jovem de pele morena clara, ~25-30 anos, cabelos curtos molhados para trás, olhos semicerrados sorrindo enquanto dá uma mordida em uma fatia de pão branco; narrativa de prazer simples e saúde tangível. Iluminação: sol direto de fim de manhã, key light dura vinda da direita a 45°, temperatura ~5000K, intensidade alta com sombras definidas; leve fill natural por bounce do banco claro; rim light suave nas maçãs do rosto. Paleta: areia #EADFCC → manteiga #F4E5B0 → pêssego quente #E9B99A → terracota suave #C7856C → branco fosco #F6F3EE → sombra chumbo #4A443E; color grading tipo Kodak Portra, levemente subexposto (-0.2), blacks levantados (+5), contraste médio. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6%, halation sutil em highlights, micro-clarity -10, bloom leve, sem oversharpen; blur cinematográfico orgânico nos planos profundos. Composição: sujeito central ocupando o terço médio; parede branca texturizada no fundo (terço superior direito) projetando sombra diagonal; banco claro no terço inferior esquerdo; prato branco centralizado no terço inferior com pequena porção de manteiga; mão esquerda segurando pão em foreground próximo ao rosto; recorte até cintura, vestido amarelo-pálido com pregas. Camera position context: 50mm f/2.8, ISO 100, 1/1000s, handheld vertical, como foto lifestyle editorial. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” — top-center, SF Pro Display Regular, branco #FFFFFF, tracking +20, line-height 100%, tamanho sm; 2) “Health you can actually feel.” — centro, Georgia Display Semibold, branco #FFFFFF, tracking 0, line-height 110%, tamanho xl; quebra em 3 linhas com ‘actually’ recebendo leve 2% maior; 3) “Your 90-day health timeline with Mito.” — bottom-center, SF Pro Text Regular, branco #F2F2F2, tracking +10, line-height 120%, tamanho xs. Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone; apenas leve vignette radial #000000 a 10% no perímetro; guia invisível de rule-of-thirds. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, solar, intimista, científico-chic, sofisticado, real, convidativo. Referências: Apple keynote slide (tipografia/clamp de hierarchy), Aesop minimal product (paleta e silêncio), Calvin Klein editorial 90s (luz dura), Equinox campaign (corpos reais premium). Anti-padrões: Não usar cores neon/saturadas; Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; Não incluir UI de app; Não exagerar no HDR; Não criar aparência “AI glow plástico”. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais definidas, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, nítido porém orgânico, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo from a high ~35° angle, showing a young woman (short slicked-back hair) joyfully biting a slice of white bread; story of tangible, simple health. Lighting: hard direct sun from right at 45°, 5000K, high intensity with crisp shadows; slight natural fill; gentle rim on cheekbones. Palette: sand #EADFCC, butter #F4E5B0, warm peach #E9B99A, soft terracotta #C7856C, matte white #F6F3EE, shadow gray-brown #4A443E. Film grade: Kodak Portra feel, -0.2 stop, lifted blacks +5, medium contrast. Texture: 35mm grain 6%, subtle halation, soft bloom, mild organic blur. Composition: subject centered mid-frame; textured white wall casting diagonal shadow; light bench lower-left; white plate center-lower with a small butter pat; yellow-pale pleated dress; crop to waist; bread hand near face in foreground. Camera: 50mm f/2.8, ISO100, 1/1000s, handheld vertical. Overlays: “Mito” top-center (SF Pro Display Regular, white #FFFFFF, tracking +20, size sm); “Health you can actually feel.” mid-center (Georgia Display Semibold, white #FFFFFF, size xl, 110% LH); “Your 90-day health timeline with Mito.” bottom-center (SF Pro Text Regular, white #F2F2F2, size xs). No icons; subtle radial vignette 10%. Mood: clean, premium, solar, intimate, sophisticated. References: Apple keynote slide, Aesop minimal, Calvin Klein 90s, Equinox campaign. Avoid neon, medical icons, app UI, heavy HDR, plastic AI look. Keep realistic, natural shadows, subtle film grain, high-res, minimal composition.
primary.artDirection: Recrie uma cena solar minimalista, alto contraste, com luz dura lateral às 11h. Paleta: areia #EADFCC, manteiga #F4E5B0, pêssego #E9B99A, terracota #C7856C, branco fosco #F6F3EE, sombra #4A443E. Fundo: parede branca texturizada; banco claro. Modelo central de vestido amarelo-pálido; prato branco com pequena porção de manteiga; mão levando pão à boca. Tipografia: título Georgia Display Semibold em branco #FFFFFF, tamanho grande (xl), line-height 110%, tracking 0; palavra “actually” +2% de tamanho. Marca “Mito” no topo em SF Pro Display Regular, branco #FFFFFF, tracking +20; rodapé com SF Pro Text Regular, branco #F2F2F2, tracking +10. Três anti‑padrões críticos: não usar ícones médicos; não saturar cores/neon; não aplicar HDR/skin smoothing artificial. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia limpa) e Aesop (silêncio visual, tons terrosos). Vibe: editorial premium, científica porém calorosa, ‘health you can feel’ com alegria sutil e estética cinematográfica natural.

primary.composition: An overhead shot of a woman lying on her back on a black exercise mat, wearing light-colored activewear (bra top and leggings), performing an exercise with a resistance band. The text 'Mito x PVOLVE' is centrally overlaid in white. The background is dark and muted, suggesting a gym or studio setting.
primary.subject: A woman exercising on a mat, representing a brand collaboration between Mito and Pvolve.
primary.textOverlay: Mito x PVOLVE
primary.style: Fitness photography, branding, clean, minimalist, high-contrast
primary.hookSignal: O título “Mito x PVOLVE” em branco puro #FFFFFF, centralizado e flutuando sobre o mat quase preto #0D0D0F, contrasta forte e atravessa a diagonal da atleta — um stop‑scroll imediato pelo choque claro/escuro.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando uma atleta de ~30 anos em conjunto esportivo ecru, deitada em diagonal sobre um mat preto Pvolve, executando um movimento de sculpt com um elástico de resistência esticado na horizontal sobre o torso, expressão focada, tranças longas caindo ao lado. Iluminação low-key: key light suave a 45° vindo do topo-esquerda com softbox 120cm, 3800K, intensidade média/alta; fill mínimo 10% à direita, 4200K; rim light sutil atrás-direita 5600K para recorte no braço e cabelo; sombras profundas mas controladas. Paleta exata: asfalto espresso #2B211A → carvão #0D0D0F (mat) → ecru #F3EADF (top e legging) → highlights âmbar #C8925E na pele → cinza quente #6A5F58; grading com blacks levemente levantados e subexposição -0.3 EV. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6%, micro-contrast médio, vignette suave -0.2 nas bordas, blur cinematográfico orgânico discreto nas extremidades. Composição: regra dos terços; mat ocupa do terço inferior-esquerda ao centro; atleta diagonal do bottom-right ao top-left; mão direita no canto inferior-direito; rosto no terço superior-direito; elástico cruza o quadro horizontalmente no terço médio; background é piso de estúdio em marrom escuro. Camera position context: overhead como se capturada por boom/mini-drone estático, 45° off-axis; lente 50mm f/2.8, shallow DOF com foco no logotipo central e rosto. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: “Mito x PVOLVE” (centro), fonte Inter SemiBold, peso 600, cor #FFFFFF, tracking +2%, line-height 100%, tamanho xl, sem sombra; “PVOLVE” impresso no mat (top-left, vertical), fonte estimada Gotham/Helvetica Neue Bold, peso Bold, cor #EAEAEA, tamanho sm, rotação -90°. Elementos gráficos: nenhum além de um overlay radial preto #000000 a 12% para legibilidade do título; sem ícones. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, atlético, intimista, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide (tipografia minimal), Equinox campaign (fitness luxury, low-key). Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo extra. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não aplicar ícones médicos genéricos. Não criar glow/IA surreal. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, nitidez seletiva, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial overhead, high aerial angle showing a ~30yo athlete in ecru set lying diagonally on a black Pvolve mat, performing a sculpt move with a resistance band stretched across torso; focused look, long braids to the side. Low‑key lighting: soft key 45° top-left (120cm softbox, 3800K, medium-high), minimal fill 10% right (4200K), subtle rim back-right (5600K); deep but controlled shadows. Palette: espresso #2B211A → charcoal #0D0D0F (mat) → ecru #F3EADF (outfit) → amber highlights #C8925E → warm gray #6A5F58; slight lifted blacks, -0.3EV. Texture: 35mm film grain 6%, medium micro-contrast, gentle vignette -0.2, organic edge blur. Composition: rule-of-thirds; mat from lower-left to center; athlete diagonal bottom-right to top-left; face in upper-right third; band runs mid-frame; dark studio floor background. Camera: overhead on boom/mini-drone, 45° off-axis; 50mm f/2.8, shallow DOF focusing face and central logotype. Overlays: center title “Mito x PVOLVE”, Inter SemiBold, #FFFFFF, tracking +2%, size XL; printed “PVOLVE” on mat top-left, vertical, Bold, #EAEAEA. Graphics: none except subtle 12% black radial overlay. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, athletic. References: Apple keynote slide; Equinox campaign. Anti-patterns: no extra logos, no saturated colors, no generic medical icons, no surreal AI glow, no ornamental fonts. Keep photographic realism, subtle film grain, high-res, selective sharpness.
primary.artDirection: Paleta escura e premium: asfalto espresso #2B211A, carvão #0D0D0F (mat), ecru #F3EADF (look), highlights âmbar #C8925E na pele, cinza quente #6A5F58 para sombras; overlay radial preto 12% só para leitura do título. Tipografia: título central em Inter SemiBold 600, tracking +2%, branco #FFFFFF; nenhum subtítulo; respeitar capitalização “Mito x PVOLVE” (x minúsculo, PVOLVE em caps). O logotipo “PVOLVE” no mat aparece impresso em Bold, #EAEAEA, na vertical. Três anti‑padrões críticos: 1) Não inserir logos adicionais ou ícones. 2) Não usar cores vibrantes/saturadas; manter low‑key. 3) Não aplicar efeitos de IA/glow/HDR; realismo puro. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica minimal e central), Equinox campaign (luxury fitness com sombras dramáticas). Vibe geral: luxury wellness científico e atlético, intimista, com drama de luz e composição minimalista, onde a tipografia limpa guia a atenção sobre o gesto atlético diagonal.

primary.prompt: 1) Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica em close lateral, câmera na altura do rosto, mostrando a silhueta de uma pessoa adulta em perfil esquerdo contra um campo nebuloso teal-cinzento. 2) Sujeito principal: silhueta limpa de uma pessoa de ~30-40 anos, gênero neutro, cabelo curto ondulado, olhar projetado à frente; narrativa: um indivíduo anônimo em contemplação, representando personalização em saúde. 3) Iluminação: backlight/rim light suave vindo do topo-direita a 45°, difuso através de haze; temperatura 4800K, intensidade ~25% com sombras macias e sem fill no lado esquerdo (negative fill). 4) Paleta: obsidian teal #0C1416 → petrol #142527 → slate teal #2B3D3F → fog green #90A3A1 → mist gray #BAC7C5; grading com blacks levemente levantados (+12), sombras com viés cyan (+10), saturação -15%. 5) Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6%, bloom 8% apenas nas altas, halation 3%, leve vignetting 6%, blur orgânico 2% nas bordas. 6) Composição: rule-of-thirds; silhueta ocupa o terço esquerdo (top-left a mid-left), com recorte do nariz/lábios bem definido; grande negative space no terço direito para tipografia; foreground escuro (silhueta) vs background etéreo; horizonte inexistente. 7) Camera position context: tripod, 85mm f/2.0, ISO 320, 1/160s, shallow DOF, captura RAW com perfil flat. 8) Texto/overlay: - Conteúdo: "Your history. Your labs. Your health."; posição: mid-left, levemente acima da linha média; fonte: SF Pro Display; peso: Regular; cor: off‑white #E5ECEE; tracking: +2%; line-height: 115%; tamanho: md; animação: none. - Conteúdo: "Meet the AI\ndesigned for you." (quebra de linha após "AI"); posição: bottom-right (inferior direito, alinhado à direita); fonte: SF Pro Display; pesos: Medium (linha 1) / Regular (linha 2); cor: branco #F2F6F7; tracking: +1%; line-height: 112%; tamanho: xl para linha 1, lg para linha 2; animação: none. 9) Elementos gráficos: nenhum adicional (sem ícones, sem labels, sem logos). 10) Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, minimal, futurista orgânico. 11) Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product photography. 12) Anti‑padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não incluir ícones médicos genéricos. Não usar drop shadows pesados. Não criar aparência de IA/CG exagerada. 13) Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, nítido nas bordas do perfil, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram image, cinematic editorial portrait, side profile close-up of a gender-neutral adult silhouette on the left, against a foggy teal-gray field. Soft rim/backlight from top-right at 45°, diffused through haze, 4800K, ~25% intensity, no fill on the left. Palette: #0C1416 → #142527 → #2B3D3F → #90A3A1 → #BAC7C5; lifted blacks (+12), cyan shadows (+10), saturation −15%. Film grain 35mm 6%, bloom 8% on highlights, halation 3%, vignette 6%, subtle edge blur 2%. Composition: rule-of-thirds; silhouette occupies left third, strong negative space on right for type. Camera: tripod, 85mm f/2.0, ISO 320, 1/160s, shallow DOF, RAW flat. Overlays: "Your history. Your labs. Your health." center-left above midline, SF Pro Display Regular, off-white #E5ECEE, tracking +2%, line-height 115%, size md. "Meet the AI\ndesigned for you." bottom-right, right-aligned; SF Pro Display Medium (line 1) / Regular (line 2), white #F2F6F7, tracking +1%, line-height 112%, sizes xl/lg. No extra graphics. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote, Aesop. Avoid logos, saturated colors, generic medical icons, heavy drop shadows, AI-looking artifacts. Keep realistic photographic render, subtle film grain, crisp profile edge.
primary.artDirection: Paleta fria e contida: #0C1416 (sombra), #142527 e #2B3D3F (meios-tons), #90A3A1 e #BAC7C5 (neblina/luz). Texto sempre em branco #F2F6F7 ou off‑white #E5ECEE. Tipografia: SF Pro Display; headline em Medium, corpo em Regular; tracking leve (+1% a +2%); line-height ~112–115%; alinhamentos limpos (right-align no call-to-action). Sem ícones ou boxes. Fundo com gradiente orgânico nebuloso e rim light vindo do topo-direita. Anti‑padrões críticos: 1) Não usar cores vibrantes nem gradientes neon. 2) Não inserir qualquer ícone médico/estetoscópio. 3) Não aplicar sombras artificiais pesadas ou glow digital duro. Referências: Apple keynote (claridade, tipografia precisa) e Aesop (minimalismo sensorial). Vibe geral em 1 frase: ciência de ponta apresentada como luxo silencioso — clean, contemplativo e premium, com silhueta anônima, espaço negativo generoso e foco total na mensagem.

slides.subject: AI chatbot comparison, personalized health advice, blood sugar results, diabetes risk assessment, digital health interface
slides.textOverlay:
My dad is pre-diabetic. Am I trending towards diabetes myself?
ChatGPT
I'm not able to assess your individual risk, but having a family history of prediabetes can increase your chances. It's important to maintain a healthy lifestyle, including regular exercise and a balanced diet.
Mito MD
AI BETA
Your blood sugar results are all in the optimal range:
Fasting Glucose
5.2 mmol/L
AVERAGE
HbA1c
5.5%
OPTIMAL
Estimated Average Glucose (eAG)
111.15 mg/dL
These numbers show your body is handling sugar well, with no signs of prediabetes or diabetes. HbA1c reflects your average blood sugar over the past 2–3 months, and yours is well below the prediabetes threshold (5.7%). Keeping these values low reduces your risk of developing diabetes later in life.
• Exercise regularly: Aim for both aerobic (like running or cycling) and resistance training each week.
• Eat balanced meals: Include whole grains, vegetables, lean proteins, and healthy fats. Limit sugary drinks and refined carbs.
• Prioritize sleep: Aim for 7–9 hours of quality sleep each night.
• Manage stress: Practice mindfulness, yoga, or relaxation techniques to lower stress hormones that can affect blood sugar.

slides.subject: Comparison of generic AI advice versus specific, data-driven health recommendations from Mito MD regarding fatigue and related deficiencies.
slides.textOverlay:
I've been feeling tired lately. Why?
ChatGPT
To support your energy levels, try getting enough sleep, eating a balanced diet, exercising regularly, and managing stress.
Mito MD
AI BETA
Based on your health assessment, the most likely contributors are low iron stores (ferritin) and mild vitamin D deficiency. Both are common in young women and can lead to low energy, even before anemia develops.
• Increase iron-rich foods at every meal (lean red meat, beans, lentils, dark leafy greens) and pair with vitamin C sources.
• Take a daily iron supplement (15–25 mg) with a vitamin C–rich snack, and recheck ferritin in 8–12 weeks.
• Take 1,000 IU vitamin D₃ daily and get some midday sun exposure.
• Add 2–3 resistance workouts per week and aim for three balanced meals with enough protein.
Vitamin D
21.3 ng/mL
LOW
Ferritin
33.2 ng/mL
LOW
Hemoglobin
13.7 g/dL

slides.subject: Comparison of AI-powered health advice for hormonal imbalances and menstrual cycle regulation, highlighting personalized insights versus generic responses.
slides.textOverlay:
My cycles have been irregular lately and I'm experiencing more PMS symptoms.
ChatGPT
Irregular cycles and PMS can be caused by stress, diet, or hormonal imbalances. Consider tracking your cycle or speaking with your doctor.
Mito MD AI BETA
Your hormone results (estradiol and progesterone) were outside the expected range for your cycle phase, and could signal issues like irregular ovulation, polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), thyroid problems, or even early menopause. Low estradiol or progesterone can cause irregular or missed periods, mood changes, bone loss, and fertility problems.
To help regulate your menstrual cycle, focus on a few key areas:
• Improve nutrition: Address your mild iron and vitamin D deficiencies by eating iron-rich foods (like lean red meat, beans, and leafy greens) and taking a daily vitamin D supplement. Pair iron foods with vitamin C for better absorption.
• Exercise smartly: Add 2–3 resistance training sessions per week to support overall hormone balance, but avoid over-exercising, which can disrupt cycles.
Estradiol 22.8 pg/mL LOW
Progesterone 0.08 ng/mL LOW

posts.caption:
If you’re waking up tired, crashing in the afternoon, or feel “tired but wired” at night - it’s not just stress. Your cortisol rhythm, your body’s natural energy pattern, may be out of sync.

Chronic stress, nutrient deficiencies, and sleep disruptions can flatten your cortisol curve, which could deplete your sleep quality and energy levels.

And the fix isn’t more caffeine. It’s understanding what your biology is telling you and giving your body the right support.

Mito tests for DHEAS, thyroid hormones, ferritin, and iron levels to help you get to the bottom of your fatigue.
posts.hookLine: If you’re waking up tired, crashing in the afternoon, or feel “tired but wired” at night - it’s not just stress. Your cortisol rhythm, your body’s natural energy pattern, may be out of sync.

primary.prompt: 1) Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica em close-up frontal, ângulo de câmera ligeiramente abaixo do nível dos olhos, mostrando o rosto em meia-face com uma faixa desfocada de vidro à esquerda. 2) Sujeito principal: mulher de pele clara com sardas, ~30-35 anos, cabeça raspada curta, argola de prata no lóbulo direito, olhar cansado direcionado levemente para a esquerda, lábios neutros entreabertos, narrativa de exaustão elegante e introspectiva. 3) Iluminação: key light dura a 45° vinda da direita, 5200K, intensidade alta; fill suave por rebatedor off-white à esquerda (20%); micro rim difuso atrás à direita; sombras macias porém definidas, brilho especular na testa e dorso do nariz. 4) Paleta: fundo off-white #F5F5F2; vidro desfocado azul-acinzentado #DCE3E6 → transparente; pele pêssego #F3C0A2, nude #D9A38F, terracotta suave #C0745A; prata das argolas #C0C6CD; tipografia branca #FFFFFF. Grading: contraste baixo, blacks levemente lifted (#121212), subexposição -0.2 EV, balanço de branco neutro. 5) Textura/tratamento: poros e microbrilho visíveis, grain de filme 35mm 5%, nitidez alta no olho direito, blur orgânico lateral pelo vidro (bokeh suave), leve vignette 8%. 6) Composição: regra dos terços; rosto ocupa os dois terços direitos; faixa de vidro toma ~28% à esquerda; linha dos olhos no terço superior; queixo cortado no bottom edge; alça de regata branca aparece no canto inferior direito; fundo limpo. 7) Camera position context: câmera full-frame, 85mm f/2.0, ISO 100, 1/250s, distância ~0,8 m, handheld estável. 8) Texto/overlay: “Could it be adrenal fatigue?” posicionado mid-bottom center, fonte Inter Regular, peso Regular, cor #FFFFFF 92% opacidade, tracking +2, line-height 115%, tamanho sm. Headline: “More coffee isn’t fixing this kind of tired.” centralizado no bottom-third, fonte Canela (ou Georgia como fallback) Semibold, cor #FFFFFF, tracking 0, line-height 110%, tamanho xl; sem animação. 9) Elementos gráficos: faixa vertical de “vidro fosco” à esquerda (retângulo 4:5 altura, gradiente #DCE3E6 60% → #FFFFFF00), sem ícones, sem boxes. 10) Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, minimal, íntimo. 11) Referências: Aesop minimal product; Calvin Klein editorial beauty; Apple keynote slide para tipografia limpa. 12) Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não usar ícones médicos genéricos. Não suavizar pele de forma artificial. Não criar aparência de IA. 13) Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp no olho, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram editorial beauty photograph, close-up portrait, slightly low eye-level angle. Subject: fair, freckled woman ~30-35, shaved buzz cut, silver hoop on right ear, tired introspective gaze, lips relaxed; left side obscured by frosted-glass blur. Lighting: hard key at 45° from right, 5200K, strong; soft off-white bounce fill left (20%); faint rim right-back; gentle but defined shadows and specular sheen on forehead/nose. Palette: background off-white #F5F5F2; glass blur blue-grey #DCE3E6→transparent; skin peach #F3C0A2, nude #D9A38F, soft terracotta #C0745A; silver #C0C6CD; text #FFFFFF. Film grade: low contrast, lifted blacks #121212, -0.2 EV. Texture: visible pores, 35mm grain 5%, crisp eye, organic lateral blur, vignette 8%. Composition: rule-of-thirds; face fills right two-thirds; glass takes ~28% left; eye on upper third; chin cropped; white tank strap bottom-right. Camera: full-frame 85mm f/2.0, ISO100, 1/250s, ~0.8 m, handheld. Overlays: small Inter Regular “Could it be adrenal fatigue?” mid-bottom center (white 92%); large Canela/Georgia Semibold “More coffee isn’t fixing this kind of tired.” centered bottom-third (white). No icons, no logo. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, contemplative, minimal. References: Aesop, Calvin Klein, Apple keynote. Realistic, natural shadows, subtle film grain, high-res.
primary.artDirection: Paleta minimal: fundo off‑white #F5F5F2; vidro desfocado #DCE3E6→transparente; pele pêssego #F3C0A2 com nuances #D9A38F e #C0745A; prata #C0C6CD; texto #FFFFFF. Tipografia: headline com serif elegante Canela Semibold (fallback Georgia), branco puro; subtexto em Inter Regular branco 92% opacidade; tracking discreto (+2 no subtexto), line‑height compacto (110–115%). Distribuir headline no bottom‑third central, subtexto logo acima, ambos sem sombras. Três anti‑padrões críticos: 1) não suavizar a pele além do real; manter poros e brilho. 2) não inserir ícones/ilustrações médicas. 3) não usar cores saturadas nem fundos texturizados. Referências: Aesop (minimalismo táctil) e Calvin Klein beauty (close-up editorial cru). Vibe geral em 1 frase: luxury wellness científico e íntimo — um retrato limpo, com vidro fosco lateral, luz dura controlada e tipografia serif branca grande afirmando a mensagem.

slides.subject: Physiological causes of symptoms, including nutrient deficiencies, sleep apnea, anemia, insulin resistance, hormonal imbalances, and the impact of chronic stress on cortisol levels and the HPA axis.
slides.textOverlay:
So, What Causes These Symptoms?
• Nutrient deficiencies (B vitamins, magnesium, vitamin C)
• Sleep apnea
• Anemia or low iron levels
• Insulin resistance
• Hormonal imbalances

Chronic stress or high cortisol levels impact the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, your body’s stress control center. This can lead to imbalances in cortisol and other hormones, even if your adrenal glands themselves are healthy.

posts.caption:
We’ve been told supplements are harmless. 
But your body doesn’t treat them all the same.

Some pass through while others stay, gradually building up over time. More isn’t always better and testing will help you supplement smarter and help you understand what your body needs, and what it doesn’t.

primary.hookSignal: O contraste entre o macro âmbar orgânico e a frase grande em branco “Not every supplement gets flushed out.” ancorada no lado esquerdo cria o stop‑scroll imediato. O vazio negativo à esquerda, contra a textura rica das cápsulas, faz o olho travar no texto.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um macro abstrato de cápsulas gelatinosas de suplemento âmbar sobre fundo off‑white com microbolhas em suspensão. Sujeito principal: duas cápsulas translúcidas, ~3 cm, com bordas suaves e micro sedimentos avermelhados; a maior repousa no terço inferior, a segunda cruza diagonalmente do canto superior direito ao centro-esquerda; narrativa: visual de acúmulo, camadas que não “somem”, reforçando que nem todo suplemento é eliminado. Iluminação: backlight difuso a 45° pela direita-superior + fill suave 20% pela esquerda, 4200K (quente neutro), intensidade ~70%, highlights especulares controlados por polarizer, rim light sutil nas bordas; sombras macias, penumbra curta. Paleta: mel pálido #F3C77A → dourado #E9B354 → âmbar #C8752E → terra queimada #8C3D1F; pontos rubi #A5331A; fundo cinza‑quente #E7E3DE; tipografia branca #FFFFFF; vinheta fumê #1A1A1A a 18% de opacidade nos cantos inferiores. Grading: warm, blacks levemente lifted, contraste médio, halation discreta nos highlights. Textura/tratamento: nitidez micro nos detalhes das bolhas; grain de filme 35mm 5%; clarity -10; bloom 6%; zero banding; sem artefatos de IA. Composição: rule‑of‑thirds; espaço negativo no terço esquerdo para texto; bolhas concentradas no quadrante superior‑esquerdo; cápsula inferior ocupa 70% da largura no bottom‑third; cápsula superior cria sobreposição suave no mid‑right; fundo sem horizonte. Camera position context: lente macro 100mm f/5.6, top‑down com tilt de 15° para a direita, ISO 200, 1/125s, RAW, tripé. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) Heading: “Not every supplement gets flushed out.” posição: mid‑left; fonte: Inter; peso: Regular; cor: #FFFFFF; tracking: +2; line‑height: 110%; tamanho: xl. 2) Body: “Your body doesn’t treat every supplement the same. While certain vitamins flush out easily, others linger in your system, quietly accumulating.” posição: bottom‑left; fonte: Inter; peso: Regular; cor: #FFFFFF; tracking: 0; line‑height: 135%; tamanho: md. 3) Marca: “Mito” posição: top‑right; fonte: Inter; peso: Medium; cor: #FFFFFF; tracking: +40; tamanho: sm. Elementos gráficos: grade de margem segura 8% (invisível); vinheta radial sutil inferior para legibilidade (sem caixas). Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product. Anti‑padrões: Não adicionar logo extra; Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; Não aplicar drop shadows pesados; Não criar aparência de IA. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, nítido, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post. Cinematic editorial top‑down macro of translucent amber supplement gel capsules on a warm off‑white background with micro air bubbles. Main subject: two overlapping capsules; larger sits on bottom third, smaller crosses diagonally from top‑right to mid‑left, suggesting accumulation. Lighting: soft backlight 45° from top‑right + gentle left fill (20%), 4200K, ~70% intensity, controlled specular highlights, subtle rim light; soft short shadows. Palette: honey #F3C77A → gold #E9B354 → amber #C8752E → burnt sienna #8C3D1F; ruby specks #A5331A; background warm gray #E7E3DE; type #FFFFFF; faint vignette #1A1A1A at 18%. Grading: warm, lifted blacks, medium contrast, slight halation. Texture: crisp micro details, 35mm film grain 5%, clarity -10, bloom 6%. Camera: 100mm macro, f/5.6, ISO 200, 1/125s, RAW, tripod, top‑down with 15° right tilt. Composition: rule‑of‑thirds, negative space on left for copy; bubbles cluster top‑left. Overlays: Heading (Inter Regular, white, xl, tracking +2, LH 110%) mid‑left: “Not every supplement gets flushed out.” Body (Inter Regular, white, md, LH 135%) bottom‑left: explanatory copy. Brand mark “Mito” top‑right (Inter Medium, white, sm, tracking +40). No boxes; subtle radial vignette for readability. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote, Aesop. Avoid saturated colors, generic medical icons, heavy shadows, extra logos, AI look. Keep photoreal, minimal, sharp.

Tipografia: Inter — Heading Regular (xl, tracking +2, LH 110%, branco), Body Regular (md, LH 135%, branco), Marca “Mito” Medium (sm, tracking generoso +40, branco). Três anti‑padrões críticos: não usar ícones médicos genéricos; não saturar as cores (manter tons naturais de óleo); não aplicar sombras ou caixas pesadas sob o texto. slides.subject: Differences between water-soluble and fat-soluble vitamins.
slides.textOverlay:
Water-soluble vs.
fat-soluble
Not all vitamins behave the same way in your body. Only water-soluble vitamins, like Vitamin C & B, can be excreted through urine. The rest? Your body holds onto fat-soluble vitamins which include A, D, E, K.
slides.style: Minimalist, clean typography, soft-focus photography.

slides.composition: Minimalist typography on a blurred, warm-toned background. A large title is positioned on the left side, centered vertically, and a smaller block of explanatory text is placed on the bottom right.
slides.subject: Risks of excessive intake of fat-soluble vitamins and their storage in the body.
slides.textOverlay:
The problem with too much.

Unlike water-soluble vitamins, fat-soluble ones don't just pass through. They're stored in your fat and liver, meaning the more you take, the more your body holds onto. Over time, this can quietly build up and put stress on your system.

posts.caption:
Your energy spikes…then crashes. The scale won’t budget. You’re fighting to stay sharp at work. These could be signs of irregular blood sugar patterns that your HbA1c can reveal.

HbA1c is one of the best early indicators for rising diabetes risk, often catching issues that routine fasting glucose misses. 

Reduce your long-term risk for heart and metabolic issues,  stabilize your energy and sleep, and control your weight gain by tracking your HbA1c effectively.
posts.hookLine: Your energy spikes…then crashes. The scale won’t budget. You’re fighting to stay sharp at work. These could be signs of irregular blood sugar patterns that your HbA1c can reveal.
